are expensive and are made to measure for individual customers'houses.There are a wide range of finishes and options available to choose from. Conservatories which match garden glasshouses have become popular with customers who can afford them.Unlike Vunderg's other products,these are sold directly to individual home owners. ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 温室 最近，Vunderg开始使用与它的玻璃暖房系列相同的材料制造温室。这些温室价格昂贵， 而且是为客户的房屋量身定做的。有各种各样的装饰材料和选项可供选择。与花园玻 璃暖房相匹配的温室现在已经受到买得起它们的客户的欢迎。与 Vunderg 的其他产品 不同，这些产品直接销售给个人业主。 *Conservatories are structures made mainly of glass,which are attached to the side of residential houses.They form an additional room in a house and are popular in cool climates. *温室主要由玻璃制成，附着在住宅的侧面。它们在房子里形成一个额外的房间，在气 候凉爽的地区很受欢迎。 3.Future product development Vunderg is looking to move into another new market soon,as the market for making windows for houses is now saturated.This new market will be the manufacture and design of large 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 windows to be installed in the entrance halls of large,prestigious commercial buildings.These willbe bespoke items,designed and manufactured to customers'own specifications. 很快 Vunderg 希望进入另一个新市场，因为窗户的市场现在已经饱和。这个新的市场 将是制造和设计安装在大型著名商业建筑的入口大厅的大型窗户。这些都是定制的产 品，根据客户的要求设计和制造。 4.Recent performance The CEO is concerned by a recent fall in overall net profit margin despite modest revenue growth and good control of direct costs.In particular,he has said,'The conservatories part of the business may not be as profitable as its positive contribution(Appendix 1)may suggest. For example,our procurement department spends a lot of time sourcing special materials and finishes requested by customers.Many conservatories have leaked in the rain so we have to rectify these faults and work on a new design to prevent this happening.As we have only basic information systems,it is unclear how much some of these activities are costing.Over 20%of our factory space is dedicated to manufacturing conservatories.We may be better off discontinuing these products.' 尽管收入增长适中，直接成本得到了良好控制，但首席执行官对最近整体净利润率的 下降感到担忧。特别是，他说，“温室的业务可能没有它良好的贡献(见附录1)显示的 那么有利可图。例如，我们的采购部门花费大量时间采购客户要求的特殊材料和装饰。 许多温室在下雨天漏水，所以我们不得不纠正这些错误，并研究新的设计，以防止这 种情况发生。由于我们只有基本的信息系统，不清楚这些活动的成本是多少。单超过 20%的工厂空间被用于制造温室。我们最好停止生产这个产品。” The CEO has some experience of activity based costing(ABC)in a previous role and believes that activity based management(ABM)could help to improve Vunderg's strategic performance. He is keen to know what the limitations are of using the ABM method for Vunderg's products and customer types and the problems with its implementation before he makes a decision to implement it. 首席执行官在之前的工作中有一些作业成本法(ABC) 的经验，并相信作业成本管理 (ABM)可以帮助改善 Vunderg的战略绩效。在他制定是否实行ABM 之前，他非常想知 道在 Vunderg的产品和客户类型中使用ABM 方法的局限性是什么,以及实施ABM 方 法存在的问题。 5.Appendix 1 Contribution by product type for the year ended 30 June 20X5 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 Product type No.of units sold Total contribution(S'000) Windows 175,000 9,800 Glasshouses 3,800 969 Conservatories 650 910 截至20X5 年6月30日按产品类别划分的贡献 产品类型 窗户 玻璃暖房 温室 销售件数 175,000 3,800 650 总贡献(S'000) 9,800 969 910 二、问题解析 Requirements (25 marks) It is now 1 September 20X5. (a)Advise the CEO how activity based management (ABM)could help improve the strategic performance of Vunderg.(13 marks) 要求(25分) 现在是20X5 年9月1日。 (a) 向首席执行官建议作业基础管理(ABM)如何帮助改善 Vunderg的战略绩效。 (13分) 三、答题思路 本小题主要回答两个方面。 第一给出ABM 的定义(最多2分) 第二分别从，审查成本、价格和设计以及客户盈利能力分析三个角度来解答 ABM 对 于 Vunderg战略绩效的帮助。每个角度回答3-4点，每点1分，最多12分。 本道题目共计13分 1.Defining ABM ABM 定义 · applies activity based costing(ABC)principles in order to satisfy customer needs 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 using the least amount of resources. 基于作业成本法(ABC) 原则，以使用最少的资源满足客户的需求。 · ABC groups overheads into cost pools for an activity and identifies the cost driver for each activity. 作业成本法根据活动将间接费用归入成本池，并确定每项活动的成本动因 优 点 ： ■ a more accurate calculation of product costs. 可以更准确地计算出产品成本 ■ better control costs by controlling the activities which drive the costs. ■ 通过控制驱动成本的活动来更好地控制成本 ■ identify value added activities and non-value added activities. ■ 帮助 Vunderg识别增值活动和非增值活动 ■ non-value added activities should be reduced 非增值的活动应该减少 ■ allow cost reduction without affecting the quality of service or product for customers. 将在不影响客户服务或产品质量的情况下降低成本。 2.ABM 对于Vunderg 战略绩效的帮助 (1)Choosing which products to manufacture 选择制造哪些产品 · help to improve performance in terms of deciding which products to manufacture. 帮助提高在决定制造哪些产品方面的绩效表现 · important where a large proportion of a company's costs are overheads. 当公司的很大一部分成本是间接费用时，这一点尤为重要 Vunderg公司案例应用： · decide whether to discontinue an unprofitable product or whether to produce a new one by understanding the cost of a product,and its profitability. 通过了解产品的成本及其盈利能力，可以决定是否停止不盈利的产品，或 是否生产一个新的产品。 1.商业建筑的大窗户业务 ■ bespoke items and a large amount of design overheads 都是定制的项目，大量的设计间接费用 2.温室 ■ Loss making products are often those which are highly customised and produced in low volumes,such as the conservatories. 亏损产品通常是那些高度定制和产量低的产品，如温室。 - 采购间接费用 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 ■ identify the high overhead costs of the sourcing of special materials and finishes for these by the procurement department. 可以确定采购部门为这些特殊材料和装饰材料采购的高间接费用。 ■ by standardising the range of materials and finishes used,so that spends less time sourcing them. 通过将使用的材料和装饰材料范围标准化，从而减少采购部门采购它 们的时间。 - 工厂间接费用 ■ The conservatories earn 8%oftotal contribution in 20%of the factory space. 温室的贡献占总贡献的8%,但是使用了20%的工厂空间 ■ account for a disproportionate level of factory overheads. 在工厂的间接成本中占了不合理的比例。 (2)Review of costs,prices and designs 审查成本、价格和设计 · By understanding what drives the costs of a product 通过了解是什么驱动了产品的成本 · take actions to make an unprofitable product profitable 采取行动，让无利可图的产品变盈利 Vunderg公司案例应用： ■ in response to the initial quality problems when the glasshouses were first manufactured,but which now command premium prices. 制造玻璃暖房制造初期存在质量问题，但现在却获得了更高的价格。 ■ led to a faster resolution of these initial quality problems by identifying the causes,or drivers,of the product cost and taking action to manage these. 通过识别产品成本产生的原因或驱动因素，并采取行动管理这些问题， 从而更快地解决这些初期质量问题。 · identify products which may need to be re-priced. 帮助确定可能需要重新定价的产品 Vunderg公司案例应用： ■ customers may be prepared to pay more for the use of special materials and finishes in the conservatories. 顾客可能会为在温室使用特殊材料和装饰材料而准备支付更多的费用。 ■ could charge customers more for the use of special materials and finishes to cover the high overhead cost associated with procuring them. 可以向客户收取更多使用特殊材料和装饰材料的费用，以支付与采购 这些材料和装饰材料相关的高间接成本。 · identify possible improvements to the design of a product by focusing on activities which add value for the customer and eliminating those which do not. 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 通过专注于为客户增加价值的活动而排除那些不能为客户增加价值的活动 来确定产品设计的可能改进点 Vunderg 公司案例应用： ■ Selling leaking conservatories does not add value to the customer and incurs rectification costs. 销售漏水的温室不会为客户增加价值，反而会产生整改费用。 ■ The improvement in design to prevent the leaks occurring in the first place is an example of how ABM can be used to make the conservatories business more profitable. 在设计上的改进防止了漏水的发生，这是如何利用ABM 使温室的业务 更有利可图的一个例子。 (3)Customer profitability analysis 客户盈利能力分析 · Customer profitability analysis(CPA)involves apportioning overhead costs to different types of customers,or categories of customers,using ABM principles. 客户盈利能力分析(CPA) 涉及使用ABM 原则将间接费用分摊给不同类型的 客户或客户类别。 · better understanding of the profitability of selling to different customers 以更好地了解向不同客户销售的盈利能力 · help to decide whether to stop selling to certain customers or take other actions to improve their profitability. 可以帮助决定是否停止向某些客户销售，或采取其他行动提高其盈利能力 Vunderg 公司案例应用： ■ At Vunderg,CPA would be most useful for the glasshouses which are sold through 40 different retailers. 在 Vunderg,CPA 对销售给40个零售商的玻璃暖房最有用。 ■ Some of the costs of selling to these customers,such as trade discounts, should be relatively easy to identify. 向这些客户销售的一些成本，如贸易折扣，应该相对容易确定。 ■ Other overhead costs,such as those driven by the number of customer orders processed,may only be identified using ABM principles and may differ considerably between customers as the size oforders they place varies greatly. 其他间接费用，例如由所处理的客户订单数量驱动的费用，可能只能 使用ABM 原则来确定，并且由于客户下的订单规模差异很大，可能在 客户之间存在很大差异。 ■ The profitability of selling to the 40 retailers will therefore also vary considerably. 因此，销售给这40家零售商的盈利能力也将存在很大差异。 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 ■ improve the profitability of the least profitable ones. 可以采取行动，提高利润最低的零售商的盈利能力。 ■ include insisting on minimum order sizes to reduce the costs driven by the number of orders processed. 这可能包括坚持最低订单规模，以降低由处理的订单数量驱动的成本。 ■ also offer more product training or contribution towards advertising costs to increase sales volumes. 还可以提供更多的产品培训或对广告费用的投入，以增加销量。 二、问题解析 (b)As required by the CEO,assess the limitations of using the ABM method for Vunderg's products and customer types and the problems with its implementation.(12 marks) (b)根据首席执行官的要求，评估对 Vunderg 的产品和客户类型使用ABM 方法的局限 性及其实施方面的问题。(12分) 三、答题思路 本小题主要回答两个方面。 第一给说明使用ABM的局限性，可以从识别关键活动和驱动因素的困难，使用有限， 不正确的决策三个角度来回答，每个点1分，最多9分 第二解答实施ABM 的困难，可以分析对资源和成本的影响，也是每点1分，最多5分。 本道题目共计12分 1.Limitations of using the ABM method 使用ABM 的局限性 (1)Identifying key activities and drivers 确定关键活动和驱动因素的困难 · difficult to separately identify all of the key activities and what drives them,which makes the application of ABC principles difficult. 单独识别所有的关键活动和驱动它们的因素可能是困难的，这使得ABC 原 则的应用变得困难。 · hard to assign responsibilities for individual cost pools which may cut across departmental boundaries. 为由多个部门共同的成本池子分配责任可能是困难的。 (2)Limited use 使用的局限性 · ABM is most useful where products are customised and contain high overhead 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 costs such as design,procurement and customer administration. ABM 在产品的定制和存在高间接费用(如设计、采购和客户管理)的情况下 最有用。 Vunderg 公司案例应用： · use of ABM may be worthwhile for the conservatories business,which is highly customised,and for the bespoke windows for commercial buildings 对于高度定制的温室业务和商业建筑的定制窗户来说，使用 ABM 可能是 值得的 · 84%(9,800/11,679)of Vunderg's contribution is from windows used in residential housing.The implementation of ABM may not be worthwhile for this product.Since: 但 Vunderg 84%(9800/11679)的贡献来自住宅使用的窗户。实施ABM 对 于 这个产品可能不值得。因为： ■ highly standardised 产品高度标准化 ■ include few overhead costs,for example,relating to design and after sales service. 包括很少的间接费用，例如，与设计和售后服务有关的费用。 ■ manufacturing process will already be efficient. 制造过程也已经是高效的。 ■ The costs may already be well understood and controlled 成本可能已经被很好地理解和控制 · Vunderg does,however,need a good understanding of the overhead costs,as the residential windows market is competitive. 然而，Vunderg 确实需要很好地了解间接成本，因为住宅窗户市场是有竞 争力的。 · the use ofABM to choose which products to sell could be of little use.As: 使用ABM 来选择销售哪些产品可能没有什么用处。因为： ■ windows are highly standardised,Vunderg may be unable to pick and choose which items to produce. 窗户是高度标准化的， Vunderg 可能无法挑选和选择生产哪些项目。 ■ Design,specification and size will be dictated by the large construction companies who buy them and who will expect Vunderg to supply a complete range of windows. 设计、规格和尺寸将由购买它们的大型建筑公司决定，他们希望 Vunderg 提供完整的窗户系列。 ■ These companies would just buy from a competitor if Vunderg stopped producing the items they needed. 如 果 Vunderg 停止生产他们需要的产品，这些公司就会从竞争对手那 里购买。 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 ■ there may be little Vunderg could do to improve profitability,for example,by increasing prices, Vunderg可能无法通过提高价格等方式提高盈利能力 · Similarly,Customer profitability analysis willnot be useful in Vunderg 此外客户利润分析在 Vunderg可能不太有用 ■ as there are only a few large construction companies,Vunderg could not realistically stop trading with any one of them,nor could it raise prices because of the competitive market. 由于只有少数大型建筑公司， Vunderg 无法拒绝与任何一家建筑公司 的交易，也不能因为竞争激烈的市场而提高价格。 (3)Incorrect decisions 错误决策 · the use of cost drivers to charge overhead costs to conservatories should give a clearer indication of their profitability than under the current system. 使用成本驱动因素核算温室承担的间接成本应该比在当目前的系统更清楚 地表明这个产品的盈利能力。 ■ then take action to increase the profitability of these products,for example, by increasing the prices or reducing the costs. 然后可以采取行动提高这些产品的盈利能力，例如，通过提高价格或 降低成本。 · whether these products should be discontinued should,however,take into account the effect on glasshouse sales as customers like to buy glasshouses which match the materials used in the conservatories. 然而，在决定是否应该停止温室时，应该考虑到对玻璃暖房销售的影响， 因为客户喜欢购买与温室使用的材料相匹配的玻璃暖房。 ■ Discontinuing conservatories could reduce contribution from glasshouses by up to 17·1%(650/3,800),a total loss of contribution of approximately $166,000(17·1%of $969,000),which is significant. 停止温室销售会减少玻璃暖房的贡献，最多可减少17.1%(650/3800), 总贡献损失约为$166,000($969,000中的17.1%),这笔金额很大。 · As conservatories are at the start of their life cycle,expecting them to be profitable immediately could be unrealistic. 由于温室正处于生命周期的开端，指望它们立即盈利可能是不现实的。 · Just because a large proportion of factory space is dedicated to manufacturing conservatories does not mean that these costs will be saved in the short term if the products are discontinued. 仅仅因为很大一部分工厂空间用于制造温室，并不意味着如果这个产品停 产，这些成本就会在短期内节省下来。 ■ The depreciation or lease costs ofthe factory are fixed. 工厂的折旧或租赁费是固定的。 · Vunderg's main business is saturated and there is no prospect that the factory 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 space could be better used in making other products. Vunderg的主要业务已经饱和，工厂空间无法更好地用于制造其他产品。 ■ The factory may already not be fully utilised. 这家工厂可能没有被充分利用。 2.Problems of implementing ABM 实施ABM 的问题 (1)资源和成本影响 · does not have an ABM system,considerable resources and management time will be needed to set this up. 由于没有ABM 系统，因此需要大量的资源和管理时间来建立这个系统。 (2)员工是否支持 · may be resistance from staff 可能会有来自员工的阻力 ■ for example,because they do not want to change from the current costing system,which has been in use for a long time. 例如，因为他们不想改变目前已经使用了很长时间的成本计算系统。 (3)员工培训 · Staff may not understand the benefits ofABM,or how it works. 员工可能不理解ABM 的好处，也不理解它是如何工作的。 ■ need training,which is expensive and it may take a considerable time before ABM is working effectively. 需要培训，这笔费用很昂贵，而且可能需要相当长的时间才能有效地 发挥ABM 的作用。 (4)信息系统 · has only basic information systems and need to invest in these in order to collect large volumes of data on costs. 由于只有基础的信息系统，可能需要在这些系统上投资，以收集大量的成 本数据。 (5)成本效益原则 · have to consider whether the benefits of implementing ABM are greater than the costs of doing so. 不得不考虑实施ABM 的好处是否大于这样做的成本。 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用

Q3 一、题干解析 Company information CRC started as a clothing retailer 20 years ago with one store.The business expanded steadily and had 10 stores after 18 years of trading.Since then,the rate of expansion has increased rapidly with an average of four stores opening per year. CRC是一家成立于20年前服装零售商，当时它只拥有一家店铺。经过18年的经营，公 司业务稳步扩张，拥有10家门店。此后它的扩张速度迅速增长，平均每年有四家商店 开 业。 CRC is planning to open its first large out of town store soon and is also considering the acquisition of a food retailing business.Both of these willbe supplied with items using CRC's existing central warehouse. CRC计划很快开设其第一家大型外地门店，并正在考虑收购一家食品零售企业。这两 家店都将由CRC现有的中央仓库供货。 Introduction of RFID system At the beginning of the 20X5 accounting year,to cope with this rapid growth,CRC acquired a RFID (radio frequency identification device)system at its single central warehouse.This was to help manage inventory more effectively and speed up the processes for receiving items from suppliers and dispatching them to stores.Items are still moved manually by staff in the CRC warehouse where there is little automation compared to competitors.There has been some resistance from staff to the RFID system,which they find difficult to use.CRC is currently trying to reduce the number of suppliers it has to help increase efficiency in the warehouse. 在20X5会计年度开始时，为了应对这种快速增长，CRC 在其单个中央仓库购买了RFID (射频识别设备)系统。这有助于更有效地管理库存，并加快了从供应商处接收物品 并将其发送到商店的流程。CRC 仓库的工作人员仍然手动搬运物品，与竞争对手相比 CRC 几乎没有自动化。工作人员对RFID 系统有一些抵制，他们觉得很难使用。CRC 目 前正在努力减少供应商数量，以提高仓库的效率。 Budgeting system The budget setting process has remained unchanged since CRC was formed.All managers prepare draft budgets using spreadsheets and submit them to the CRC board for approval. Managers use the previous year results as a starting point when drafting the budgets and increase the variable costs in line with any anticipated growth in volumes.For example,when preparing the budget for the year ending 30 June 20X6,the manager of the central warehouse used the actual costs of running the warehouse from the previous year and increased them all by the same percentage.This was to reflect an anticipated increase in volumes in 20X6 over 20X5.Managers are appraised on their performance against the approved budgets. 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 自CRC成立以来，预算制定过程一直保持不变。所有管理人员使用电子表格编制预算 草案，并将其提交CRC董事会批准。管理人员在起草预算时以上一年的业绩为起点， 并根据任何预期的数量增长增加可变成本。例如，在编制截至20X6年6月30日的年度 预算时，中央仓库经理使用了上一年仓库运营的实际成本，并将其全部增加了相同的 百分比。这反映了预计20X6的销量将比20X5有所增长。根据批准的预算对管理人员的 绩效进行评估。 CRC has needed allits financial resources to fund its expansion and so it has only old and basic IT systems which are not enterprise resource planning systems,unified databases or networked systems. CRC把所有的财务资源用于扩张，因此它只有旧的和基本的IT系统，而没有企业资源 规划系统、统一数据库或网络系统。 It has been suggested to the CRC board that the current system of budgeting is no longer suitable and that the business should move to activity-based budgeting(ABB).The CEO has asked you to evaluate the potential introduction of ABB at CRC. 有人向CRC董事会建议，目前的预算编制系统不再适用，企业应转向应用作业基础预 算 (ABB ) 。首席执行官要求您评估在CRC公司引入ABB的可能性。 Central warehouse activity in July 20X5 The board has never seen an activity-based budget before and is unsure how it could be used to explain variances between actual and budgeted performance in the central warehouse.As an example,they would like to see howan activity-based budget for the year ending 30 June 20X6 could be used to explain variances from the actual results for the month of July 20X5. 董事会以前从未见过作业基础预算，也不确定如何使用它来解释中央仓库的实际绩效 和预算绩效之间的差异。例如，他们希望了解如何使用截至20X6年6月30日的年度活 动预算来解释20X5年7月实际结果和预算间的差异。 The two key activities which drive costs in the central warehouse are receipts of items into the goods inwards section and despatches of items from the goods outwards section.A receipt into good inwards involves accepting a delivery of items from a supplier,tagging those items and putting them away in the warehouse.Receipts from suppliers contain variable numbers of individual items.Despatches of items from goods outwards are to CRC's own retail stores. Cost driver rates for these two activities will be used to set monthly cost budgets for the warehouse. 推动中央仓库成本的两个关键活动是将货物的入库和出库。货物入库包括接受供应商 交付的物品，给这些物品贴上标签，然后把它们放进仓库。来自供应商的收据包含不 同数量的各类货物。货物出库是运到CRC 自己的零售店。这两项活动的吸收率(基于 成本动因计算)将用于编制仓库的月度成本预算。 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 The board asked an analyst to prepare an activity-based budget for the central warehouse for the year ending 30 June 20X6.The analyst has collected relevant information on the costs for the year needed to prepare the activity-based budget and has begun the work(Appendix 1). 董事会要求一名分析师为中央仓库编制截至20X6 年6月30日的年度活动预算。分析员 已经收集了编制作业基础预算所需的年度成本的相关信息，并已开始工作(附录1)。 The total annual cost relating to goods inwards needs to be determined.This should be used to calculate the budgeted cost of each receipt into goods inwards,in order to explain the variance between the budgeted cost and the actual cost of receipts of goods inwards for the month of July 20X5.The analyst has already correctly included the costs of the warehouse manager's salary and the lease of the RFID system into the incomplete activity-based budget in Appendix 1.The board has asked you to complete the analyst's work. July 20X5 there were 650 receipts into goods inwards.These receipts contained 100,000 items,which is the same as the budgeted number of items for the month.The actual total cost of activities driven by receipts into goods inwards for the month was $18,000. 为了使您能够完成计算，您被告知在20X5 年7月，有650张货物入库相关的收据。这些 收据包含100,000个项目，与当月的预算项目数相同。当月货物入库相关的实际总成本 为18,000美元。 It is now 1 September 20X5. 现在是20X5年9月1日。 Their only job is to attach RFID tags to items when they are received,before the items are put away in the warehouse.All items received are RFID tagged and the costs of tagging are allocated entirely to the cost of goods inwards.Each tagger can attach 35,000 tags per month and is paid an annual salary of $24,000.The cost of each individual RFID tag is negligible. 3.RFID标签的成本是经过专门培训的员工(即标签工)的工资成本。他们唯一的工作 是在收到物品时，在物品放入仓库之前，将RFID标签贴在物品上。所有收到的物品都 进行了RFID标记，标记的成本完全分配到货物入库的成本种。每个标签工每月可以贴 35,000个标签，年薪为24,000美元。每个RFID 标签的成本可以忽略不计。 4.There were 12 full-time warehouse staff throughout the year to 30 June 20X5 who were each paid an annual salary of $22,500.Two more staff will be recruited at the beginning of the new budget year.50%of the warehouse staff work in goods inwards and 50%in goods outwards. 4.截至20X5 年6月30日，全年共有12名全职仓库工作人员，每人年薪22,500美元。在新 的预算年度开始时，将再招聘两名工作人员。50%的仓库工作人员从事货物入库工作， 50%从事货物出库工作。 5.The cost of heating and lighting relates to all sections of the warehouse and cannot be apportioned directly to goods inwards or goods outwards.The actual heating and lighting cost for last year was $10,000 and the warehouse manager has proposed a budget of $10,500 for the coming year.The general cost of inflation though is expected to be zero. 5.供暖和照明费用涉及仓库的所有活动，不能直接分摊到货物入库或货物出库上。去 年的实际供暖和照明成本为10,000美元，仓库经理提出明年的预算为10,500美元。成本 的综合通货膨胀率预计为零。 内部资料，仅供学习交流使用 6.The annual number of receipts into goods inwards expected is 9,000,containing a total of 1,200,000 items.These are expected to occur evenly over the year. 6.预计每年货物入库的收据数量为9,000张，物品件数为120万件。预计这将在一年内匀 速发生。

(12 marks) (b)按照董事会的要求完成附录1中的分析师工作，并解释20X5 年7月每次入库的预算 成本和实际成本之间的差异。(12分) 三 、答题思路： 本小问的要求有两个：

2. 解释20X5 年7月每次入库的预算成本和实际成本之间的差异。答题角度为先计算 差异，再分析差异产生的可能原因。 计算差异： √20X5 年7月，货物入库的预期总成本为$19,825(每次收货的预期成本$30.50* 收货次数650)。实际成本为$18,000,即有利差异为$1,825。 total expected cost for receipts into goods inwards ·$30.50 budgeted cost per receiptx650 receipts actual cost was $18,000 giving ·a favourable variance of$1,825 原因1-收货次数： √ 实际和预期的货物数量都是一样的(100,000 items), 所以可以从收货次 (number of receipts)不同的角度来解释差异。 ·100,000 items were processed in July 20X5 which is the same as the budgeted amount √预期收货次数为750(9,000/12),实际收获次数为650。预计每次的货物入库成 本是$30.5,实际是$27.69,所以每次收货有$2.81的好的差异。 number of receipts budgeted was 750(9,000/12) actual number of receipts was only 650 ·equivalent to $27.69($18,000/650)per receipt ·a favourable variance of$2.81 per receipt √好的差异是由于实际的收货次数比预期少导致的，实际的收获次数比预期少可 能是因为实际每次收货的货物数量高于预期。 ·the favourable variance may be due to the receipt of larger quantities of items from suppliers in each delivery 原因2-供应商： √ 如果有部分货物入库成本是随货物数量变动的，那么通过减少供应商数量以从 每家供应商那买购买更多货物也可能会获得折扣以节约成本。 ·variable with the number of items this would result in a cost saving ·because of the reduction the number of suppliers with fewer suppliers individually supplying more items

Q1 一、题干解析 Company information Arkaig Manufacturing(Arkaig)is a world-leading,listed manufacturer of production machinery for other industries.It has customers in the mining,cement and chemicals sectors and seeks to provide them with the equipment,software and service for their products. Arkaig Manufacturing(Arkaig)是一家上市的，世界领先的为其他行业生产机械 的制造商。它的客户来源于采矿、水泥和化工行业，并主要负责给客户的产品 提供设备、软件和服务。 The aim of Arkaig is 'to maximise shareholder wealth by providing world-class, tailored automation solutions,which use technology innovatively,show improved machine downtime and reduced energy consumption for our customers.'This is supported by an entrepreneurial culture among all employees who should 'treat the business as if they owned it'. Arkaig 的目标是“通过给客户提供世界级的、量身定制的自动化解决方案，主要 包括给客户提供创新的技术，改善机器停机时间，减少能源消耗，以使股东财 富最大化”。这一目标是得到了企业文化的支持，该企业文化要求所有员工应该 “像企业所有者一样对待企业”。 Strategic internal performance reporting There has been criticism of the business'current performance reporting by one of the directors at a recent board meeting.However,the chief executive officer(CEO) believes that the reporting system,which he put in place two years ago,is an excellent one. 在最近的一次董事会会议上， 一名董事对该公司目前的业绩报告提出了批评。 然而，首席执行官认为，他两年前建立的报告制度是一个优秀的制度。 In preparation for the next board meeting,the CEO needs an evaluation of the current report.As an example,a recent report used by the board for its strategic review is given in Appendix 1.The CEO stressed that it was the report and not the performance of the business which should be evaluated. 为了准备下一次董事会会议，CEO 需要对当前报告进行评估。作为一个例子， 附件1给出了董事会最近用于战略审查的一份报告。首席执行官强调，应该评 估的是报告，而不是企业业绩。 Economic value added Another criticism of the performance management of Arkaig was that it lacked an over-arching measure of performance.As a result,the CEO is considering the introduction of economic value added(EVATM)to replace return on capital employed (ROCE)as a principal performance measure.The CEO wants to present this idea at the next board meeting and so needs an illustrative calculation of EVATM along with a brief explanation of its benefits as a replacement for ROCE.The data in Appendix 2 should be used for the calculation. 对 Arkaig 绩效管理的另一个批评是，它缺乏一个全面的绩效衡量标准。因此， 首席执行官正在考虑引入经济增加值(EVATM)来取代投资回报率(ROCE) 作为主 要绩效指标。首席执行官想在下次董事会会议上提出这个想法，因此需要计算 EVATM, 以及一个简短的解释，说明它作为 ROCE 替代品的好处。应使用附录 2中的数据进行计算。 Performance hierarchy The earlier work requested focuses on the strategic level of the organisation and the CEO is keen to ensure that the other levels of the organisation (tactical and operational)do not get ignored in this discussion.However,before undertaking any specific work,he wants to make a presentation at the next board meeting.Therefore, he wants you to provide him with a brief description of the nature of the information required for performance measurement at these three different levels and explain how this information is influenced by the extent of planning and controlling activity at each of the levels of the performance hierarchy.He wants examples which would be relevant to Arkaig to illustrate these points in order that the presentation is made more concrete for the directors.He will then prepare the slides for the presentation himself. 早期工作的要求侧重于组织的战略层面，而首席执行官希望确保组织的其他层 面(战术和运营)在这次讨论中不会被忽视。然而，在开始任何具体工作之前， 他想在下次董事会上做一个报告。因此，他希望您向他简要描述这三个不同级 别的绩效评估所需信息的性质，并解释这些信息是如何受到绩效层级中每个级 别的计划和控制活动影响的。他想要一些与 Arkaig 相关的例子来说明这些观点， 以便让董事们更具体的理解。然后他将自己准备演讲用的幻灯片。 Value chain In order to analyse the operational aspects of Arkaig,the CEO has employed a consultant to produce a value chain analysis(Appendix 3).The value chain analysis has highlighted certain critical activities within Arkaig where there was concern about the performance management aspects.The CEO would like you to assess the performance management implications of the consultant's comments on the critical areas identified for Arkaig. 为了分析 Arkaig的运营方面，首席执行官聘请了一位顾问进行价值链分析(附录 3)。价值链分析强调了 Arkaig 内部的某些关键活动，这些活动涉及绩效管理方 面。首席执行官希望你评估顾问确定的 Arkaig 关键领域的评论对绩效管理的影 响。 Appendix 1 Year ended 30 June 20X5 Mining Cement Chemicals Total Previous year Total Industry average 20X5 20X5 20X5 2. 与前一年相比，收入下降了2.9%,但订单增长了0.7%,这表明未来的销售 水平将保持不变。 3.净利润率增至4.9%,再次超过4.6%的行业基准。 4.该公司继续向员工强调其企业文化。 Appendix 2 Economic value added The following details have been gathered for the 20X5 EVATM calculation: 1.The operating profit of Arkaig was $3,175m.This includes a depreciation charge of$1,780m. 2.Amortisation charges of $95m in the year have been incurred. 3.The corporation tax rate is 25%.Tax of $694m was paid in the year. 4.The company has spent $90m this year and each year for the previous 10 years on long-term brand building. 5.The economic depreciation for the year is estimated to be$1,907m. 6.This year and each year for the previous 10 years,economic depreciation has included a $10m write-down of the value of brand building. 7.Research and development expenditure of $705m was incurred in the period leading to an economic asset of $4,233m at the year end. 8.Interest paid in the period was $213m. 9.Capital employed during the period(from the statement of financial position): Sm Opening 19,404 Change in period 977 Closing 20,381 10.Cost of capital: Equity 12.0% Debt(pre-tax) 3.8% 11.Gearing 45%debt/(equity+debt) 经济增加值 以下是20X5 EVATM计算的详细信息： 1.Arkaig 的营业利润为31.75亿美元。其中包括17.8亿美元的折旧费。

Note: The areas noted as not critical do not require comment. 价值链分析 主要活动： GQL DEN EDUCATIQN -进库物流(接收、处理和存储投入)-仓库和配送业务由一个旧的信息系统控制， 该系统向业务管理提供信息。 -业务-目前不是一个关键的关注领域。 -出库物流(将产品交付给客户)-仓库和配送业务由一个旧的信息系统控制，该系 统向业务管理提供信息。 -市场营销和销售-目前不是一个关键的关注领域。 -售后服务-这是 Arkaig 创收的一个重要来源。然而，某些董事担心过度关注这 一活动。 支持活动： -采购-目前不是一个关键的关注领域。 -技术开发-目前不是一个关键的关注领域。 -人力资源管理-Arkaig 旨在招聘、留住和激励符合其企业文化的员工。 -企业基础设施(规划、财务、质量控制、法律事务)-目前不是一个关键的关注领 域 注意：标注为非关键的领域不需要分析。 二、问题
explanation_zh: Required: It is now 1 September 20X5. Write a report to the chief executive officer(CEO)of Arkaig to respond to his instructions for work on the following areas: (i)the performance reporting at Arkaig; (11 marks) (ii)the introduction of economic value added(EVATM); (15 marks) iii)the information requested on the performance hierarchy; (10 marks) (iv)the value chain analysis prepared by the consultant. (10 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the format,style and structure of the discussion of your answer. (4 marks) (50 marks) 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 向 Arkaig首席执行官(CEO) 写一份报告，以回应他对以下领域工作的指示：(i)Arkaig 的业绩报告； (11分) 向 Arkaig首席执行官(CEO) 写一份报告，以回应他对以下领域工作的指示： (ii) 引入经济增加值(EVATM); (15分) (iii) 不同管理层级要求的信息； (10分) (iv)顾问编制的价值链分析。 (10分) 讨论答案的形式、风格和结构将获得专业分数。 (4分) (50分) 三、答题思路： 这道题目是需要写一份报告，所以需要拥有报告的基础格式 Report heading 共四行，四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant/A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date:指定日期/考试日期 标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据 section A中第一个问题内容一般分为以下2种情况 评估Performance report——Performance reporting+management issues+公司名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+ 公司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结 section A 中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduction 能够运用连接词描述 Section A中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:The CEO of Arkaig Manufacturing(Arkaig) From:An Accountant Date:September 20X5 Subject:Performance reporting and management issues at Arkaig This report evaluates the current performance report used by the board for strategic review.Next,the use of economic value added(EVATM)at Arkaig is illustrated and its use compared to return on capital employed (ROCE).Then,the differences between performance measurement and management at the different levels of the management hierarchy are discussed with reference to Arkaig.Finally,the implications of a value chain analysis for performance management are assessed. 本报告评估当前董事会用于战略审查的绩效报告。其次，说明了经济增加值 (EVATM) 在 Arkaig 的使用，并将其与投资回报率(ROCE) 进行了比较。然后，参 考 Arkaig, 讨论了不同管理层级的绩效评估与管理之间的差异。最后，评估了 价值链分析对绩效管理的影响。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (i) Strategic performance reporting 题目要求评价企业的报告，评价报告主要包括一下三个步骤： 第一步，拆分使命，例如确定目标的优先级，选择策略，最多2分； 第二步，评价报告是否有助于实现企业的使命，例如明确说明报告帮助达成使 命方面不充分的地方，说明使命的要素，提供有关决策的信息，并以有关的例 子加以说明，最多11分； 最后一步，分析其他方面，例如评论中信息不足，数据过载，表述笼统等问题 是否存在，最多4分。 √ 拆分使命 ●主要目标：通过为客户提供合适的产品，使股东财富最大化。 ◆ The primary aim of Arkaig is to maximise shareholder wealth by providing suitable products for its customers. ●次要目标：产品应该具备以下几个品质：世界一流；量身定做；创新运用技 术；显示改善的机器停机时间；并为客户减少能源消耗。 ◆ These products should have a number of qualities:be world-class;tailored; use technology innovatively;show improved machine downtime;and reduce energy consumption for customers. · 次要目标：应该得到企业文化的支持 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION ◆ This should be supported by an entrepreneurial culture among the employees. √ 评价报告是否有助于实现企业的使命 ●总述：报告包括一些常见的财务指标，但它们与企业使命的联系很松散。 ◆ Overall,the report contains a number of common financial measures but they are only loosely connected to the stated mission. ●主要目标方面：没有衡量股东财富，目前使用的是税后绝对利润和 ROCE 与行业平均水准比较来评估，但这些指标跟股东价值之间无直接 联系，建议使用 EVA。 ◆ no direct measure of shareholder wealth ◆ the absolute profit after tax and ROCE ◆ benchmarks the net profit margin and ROCE with industry averages ◆ indirectly linked to value ◆ use EVATM is appropriate · 次要目标-质量方面：没有单独衡量要求的任何一项。目前报告包括的收 入增长可以间接衡量客户的态度，但没有与竞争对手或市场份额比较， 是无法得出关于产品质量的结论。并且与产品相关的这些元素很难进行 整体度量，因为它们可能单独依赖于每个产品线。每个目标依次情况为： a) 世界一流：可通过市场份额或客户调查答复来衡量。 b) 量身定做：可通过每次安装的单独设计费用或客户调查答复来衡量。 c) 创新运用技术：可以通过与竞争的产品功能比较来衡量，或者也可以 通过获得行业奖的数目来衡量。 d) 机器停机时间和能耗：需要对每条生产线进行具体测试。 ◆ does not measure any of these individually ◆ indirect measure of customer attitude through the revenue growth figure ◆ but without competitor comparison or a market share ◆ not possible to draw a conclusion about any of the qualities of the products. ◆ difficult to measure overall as they are likely to be dependent on each product line individually ◆ world class-market share or customer survey responses. ◆ tailored -the cost of individual design for each installation or customer survey responses. ◆ Technological innovation-comparison of features with the competition or alternatively,by number of industry awards won. ◆ Machine downtime and energy consumption -specific testing of each product line. ●次要目标-企业文化：没有衡量员工文化，尽管有评论说它已达成，但这 缺乏证据 ◆ no measure of the employee culture ◆ there is a comment that it is being achieved but this lacks evidence √ 其他方面 ●总体优点：该报告显示了各分部的财务表现以及整个企业的财务表现， 提供一些行业平均水平对做标杆管理很有用。 ◆ shows the financial performance by sector as well as in total for the business ◆ the provision of some industry averages is useful in benchmarking performance ●计划信息不充足：缺乏有关客户和竞争对手的外部信息使得一些数字难 以解释。 ◆ For planning purposes,the lack of external information about customers and competitors makes some of the numbers difficult to interpret ◆结合案例举例： there is no indication whether the fall in revenue is due to general economic conditions or specific faults with Arkaig ●控制信息不充足：提供了前一年的信息，但不足以确定趋势(这需要至少 三年的信息)。没有迹象表明企业是否通过提供使用差异来分析，从而达 成其预算。 ◆ For control purposes,there is previous year information given but not sufficient to establish a trend(which requires at least three years of information). ◆ 结 合 案 例 举 例 ：no indication of whether the business is meeting its budgets through the provision of variances. ●表述方面的优点：报告清晰明了，避免了给读者带来过多的数据。它使 用的术语对于专业人士来说很容易识别。提供的叙述性评论是有帮助的。 ◆ clear and avoids overloading the reader with data. ◆ uses terms which would be easily recognisable to those used to reading accounts ◆ helpful that a narrative commentary is provided ●表述方面的缺点：报告中的评注只是重述表格中的数字。它应该对每个 主要变化提供重要的解释。 ◆ commentary does not go beyond restating the figures in the table. ◆ should provide the significant explanations for each of the major ◆ 结 合 案 例 举 例 by stating why the ROCE has exceeded the industry average. ◆ handle the less quantitative aspects of performance such as innovation and employee culture ◆结合案例举例 it would be helpful to state what mechanisms are in place to emphasise the entrepreneurial culture(such as percentage of employees who own shares and the total proportion of equity owned by staff). (ii)Economic value added(EVATM) 本小问首先需要计算本期的 EVA, 并且对计算结果进行评价，最多12分，然 后需要将EVA 与 ROCE 进行比较， 一点一分，最多5分。 √ 具体计算参照下面内容： Economic value added Operating profit Add back: Amortisation Marketing capitalised spend capitalised Marketing written-off Adjusted capital employed Year ended 30 June 20X5 Sm 3,175 95 90 705 1,780 694 53 1,907 3,191 19,404 3,528 900 (100) 23,732 WACC=(55%x 12%)+(45%x3.8%x(1-25%))=7.88% EVA=NOPAT-(WACCx capital employed)=1,321 √ 对EVA 计算结果的评价： 去年创造了13.2亿美元的价值。税后的营业利润净额超过了企业所使用的 资金成本。 ·created $1.32bn of value in the last year. ·The net operating profit after tax more than covers the cost of the capital used by the business √ 对 比EVA 和 ROCE · 与股东财富最大化的目标关系： EVA: 与股东财务最大化的目标相联系 ROCE: 直接联系要少，更多的是与关于产生利润的会计假设有联系 ◆ EVA is link to the overall corporate objective of maximising shareholder wealth ◆ ROCE gives a much less direct link and more tied to the accounting assumptions around producing a profit figure ●从计算结果分析的难易程度： EVA 比较简单，如果计算结果是正数，则企业产生的回报高于融资提供 者所要求的回报。 ROCE 需要设定一个基于行业情况的目标，并且这个目标的设定可能有 点主观。 ◆ The basic test of performance is simple for EVA if it is positive,then the business is generating a return above that required by the providers of finance ◆ ROCE requires a target level to be set usually based on benchmarking to the industry sector and the setting of this target return can be somewhat subjective. ●是否会导致目标不一致： EVA 鼓励对未来进行投资，将例如广告和研发等成本从绩效期移除，并 将其视为资本支出。这将减少管理层制定一些牺牲长远但满足短期目标 的目标不一致决策。 ROCE 因为使用的是财务报表中未调整的资本反倒会存在目标不一致的 决策。 ◆ EVA encourages investment for the future by removing such costs from the performance period and treating them like capital expenditure ◆ reduce the dysfunctional temptation for management to engage in some short-term decision-making ◆ a problem with the unadjusted capital employed figure from the financial statements which is used in ROCE ● 沟通方面： EVA 与净现值(NPV)一致，因为现值增加的企业将增加 EVA 。因 为 NPV 是企业广泛使用的评估指标，这样有助于沟通。 ◆ EVA is consistent with net present value (NPV) ◆ businesses with an increasing present value will increase EVA. ◆ aid communication as NPV is a widely used appraisal measure for businesses √ 总结：使用EVA 更好 ◆ worthwhile for a large entity such as Arkaig iii)Performance hierarchy 简单描述一下对不同层级的管理层进行绩效评估时所需信息的特质(时间跨度+ 来源+用处)。解释每个层级的信息如何受到计划和控制活动程度的影响(也就 是说信息主要是用来做计划活动还是控制活动?然后进一步解释具体是什么计 划活动或控制活动)。根据前两个要求，结合案例，举例说明。因此，答案的结 构应该以三个level 为 subtitle, 每个level 下应回答问题中的这三个部分。 · Strategic level 1.Nature of information required (战略层要为企业制定使命进而制定能够实 现使命的长期战略，因此战略层的绩效取决于企业战略和使命的实现，所 以战略层主要需要获得长期信息以及外部信息从而确保企业战略目标和使 命可以实现) √Depends on the achievement of the strategies and overall mission of the business. √The information will be long-term and externally focused. √Ensures that strategic objectives and mission are achieved. 2.How this information is influenced by the extent of planning and controlling activity (因为战略层主要为企业制定使命和长期战略，然后将企业的长期 战略目标拆分成较为短期和较为具体的战术层需要负责的目标，再依据这 √ Such as for forecasting. 些目标来考核战术层的绩效，所以战略主要做的是计划活动) √Information willbe used mainly for planning rather than controlling. √ Such as for forecasting. 3.For example(结合案例进行举例) √Board report evaluated above (本案例中需要评估的 Strategic performance report 就属于战略层需要的信息) √Information on competitors and markets against which the company's performance can be benchmarked. · Tactical level 1.Nature of information required (战术层关注的是由长期目标拆分来的较为 短期的部门目标或者业务单元目标，所以战术层的绩效取决于是否合理有 效的部署企业的资源去实现部门或者业务单元的目标，因此战术层主要需 要获得较为短期的信息和内部信息从而确保资源合理有效的使用) √Concerned with shorter term and more detailed objectives. √Much of the information willbe relatively short-term and internally generated. √Ensure resources are used efficiently and effectively. 2.How this information is influenced by the extent of planning and controlling activity ( 战术层主要关注的是怎样规划和使用企业的资源去实现部门或者 业务单元的目标，所以战术层既做计划活动(制定预算),也做控制活动 (差异分析)) √Contain information to aid some short-term planning but will focus more on controlling. √ Such as for setting budgets and for variance analysis. 3.For example(结合案例信息，进行举例) √The achievement of budget targets. √The sales and marketing department might be required to report quarterly on changes in the order book. · Operational level 1.Nature of information required(运营层关注的是每天具体的活动和任务， 因此运营层的绩效取决于每天的工作和具体的任务是否完成，所以运营层 需要获得短期的，具体的内部信息去确保可以完成具体的工作任务) √Focuses on the day-to-day activities √Information is mainly internal,detailed and task-specific. √Ensures that specific tasks are achieved. 2.How this information is influenced by the extent of planning and controlling activity(运营层主要关注的是否能做好具体的工作去实现每天或者每周的小 目标，因此运营层主要做的是控制活动(得到实际结果，然后和标准去做 对比)) √Information willbe aimed to assist operational level in controlling the business in order to achieve its short-term plans(weekly sales or monthly profit targets). √ Such as for routine controlling and programmed decisions 3.For example(结合案例信息，进行举例) √Actual results of weekly sales or monthly profit (iv)Value chain 本道题目首先需要解释价值链的定义以及基本应用，最多三分，然后分别从已 经评估好的重要价值链领域去深入分析，也就是进库，出库售后和人力资源管 理四个方面，每点一分。 ●价值链的定义：价值链是业务整合的一个模型，显示了组织和联系业务 活动的方式。该模型强调活动创造价值并产生成本。 ◆ a model of business integration showing the way that business activities are organised and linked. ◆ it is activities which create value and incur costs. ● 活动分类： 主要活动，客户可以直接与之交互并“看到”正在创造的价值； 次要活动，支持主要的活动。 ◆ primary ones which the customer interacts with directly and can 'see'the value being created ◆ secondary ones which support the primary activities. ●作用：通过将活动相互联系起来的链来创造价值。因此，在不同的活动 之间和跨部门边界之间必须有信息流。这条链不会止于组织的边界 ◆ value creation through a chain linking activities to each other ◆ flow of information between the different activities ◆ this chain will not stop at the organisation's boundaries √Inbound &outbound logistics进库和出库物流 · 目前的问题：有一个旧的仓储和传递信息的系统。可能会导致效率低下。 ◆ an old warehousing and distribution information system. ◆ lead to inefficiencies. ●对业绩的影响：最先进的系统将与生产和销售系统结合在一起，可以更 好地控制库存，减少挑选库存的错误，减少过时的情况，而改进的分配 可以更快地交付给客户，降低运输成本。 ◆ A state-of-the-art system would be integrated with the production and sales systems ◆ better stock control with fewer errors in picking inventory and reduced obsolescence ◆ improved distribution could lead to faster delivery to customers with reduced costs of transportation. √After-sales service 售后服务 ● 目前的问题：不应该是企业收入的重要来源，但是目前的情况可以推断 与企业产品质量不合格有关。 ◆ an inconsistency in having an area which generates a significant amount of revenue ◆ the failure of reliability of the business'products. ●对业绩的影响：重要的是要确定客户对产品可靠性的态度是否会受到影 响，并且他们认为这项服务是否是必要的(可能通过对竞争对手的故障率 /机器停机时间进行基准测试来判断)。 ◆ identify that customers'attitude to product reliability is not affected and that they see this service as necessary ◆ benchmarking failure rates/machine downtime against competitors √Human resource management 人力资源管理 ●对业绩的影响：对实现企业文化是至关重要。企业文化可以通过奖励制 度来实现，员工通过持股或股票期权计划获得奖励。其效果可以通过提 高的盈利能力和增加的创新来衡量。 ◆ important to achieving the entrepreneurial culture at Arkaig ◆ realised through the reward system where employees are rewarded by share ownership or a share option scheme ◆ measured through improved profitability and increased innovation.

stem_zh: Q2 一、题干解析 Company information Veyatie is a fashion clothing retailer which caters for both male and female customers of all adult age groups.Veyatie has 10 retail stores.The company's information systems are basic for a business of its size and focus solely on financial information. Veyatie 是一家时尚服装零售商，同时面向所有成年的男性和女性顾客。 Veyatie 内设有10家零售店。该公司的信息系统是其业务的基础，该系统只专注于财务 信息。 Veyatie's strategic objectives are 'To maximise shareholder wealth by increasing the number of retail stores,making our customers completely satisfied,ensuring our stores are attractive and offering the widest range of fashion clothing in our market.' Veyatie 的战略目标是“通过增加零售店的数量，使我们的客户完全满意，确保 我们的商店具有吸引力，并在我们的市场上提供种类最广泛的时尚服装，从而 最大限度地增加股东财富。” The Veyatie board has seen little need for non-financial performance indicators (NFPIs)so far,preferring instead to focus attention on cost control and working capital management.As a result,all senior managers are appraised against targets for operating profit margin,inventory turnover and the current ratio. 到目前为止，Veyatie 董事会对非财务业绩指标的需求很少，他们将注意力放在 成本控制和营运资本管理上。因此，所有的高级管理人员的表现都依据营业利 润率、库存周转率和流动比率的目标进行评估。 Customer satisfaction Following a period of poor financial performance,Veyatie began collecting data on one aspect of non-financial performance,customer satisfaction,as the board had been advised that this is a key driver of financial performance. 在一段时间的财务业绩不佳之后，Veyatie 开始收集某非财务业绩方面的数据， 即客户满意度，因为董事会曾被告知，这是财务业绩的一个关键驱动因素。 The data collection began at the start of Quarter 320X3 and there is now data available for two complete years(Appendix 1).Veyatie has found it difficult to interpret this qualitative data and also the trends in this data.Some board members question its usefulness and propose reverting back to reporting just the financial indicators which they are used to. 数据收集开始于20X3 年第3季度，现在已有整整两年的数据(附录1)。 Veyatie 发现很难解释这些定性数据以及这些数据中的趋势。一些董事会成员质 疑它的有效性，并建议恢复只报告他们所习惯的财务指标。 Veyatie collects this data by asking customers to rate their satisfaction with their visit to the store as they are paying for their items.The scores range from 1(completely dissatisfied)to 5(completely satisfied).The mean score is the performance indicator reported to the board and the senior managers.Customers are encouraged to leave a score by having their names entered into a quarterly prize draw to win tickets to major football matches,concerts and amusement parks. Veyatie 通过要求顾客对他们光顾商店的满意度进行打分来收集这些数据。分数 范围从1(完全不满意)到5(完全满意)。平均分数是报告给董事会和高级经 理的绩效指标。我们顾客通让顾客参加可赢得大型足球比赛、音乐会和游乐园 的门票的季度抽奖的方式来鼓励顾客留下一个带有名字的评分。 Balanced scorecard A consultant has suggested to the board that the introduction of a balanced scorecard approach may improve business performance,as Veyatie is unlikely to achieve all of its strategic objectives in the near future.The board has already heard what the benefits of the balanced scorecard are,but are sceptical about these. 一位顾问向董事会建议，引入平衡记分卡的方法可能会改善业务业绩，因为 Veyatie 不太可能在不久的将来实现其所有的战略目标。董事会已经听说了平衡 记分卡的好处，但他们对这些好处持怀疑态度。 The board has asked for your advice on the problems of implementing and using the balanced scorecard approach at Veyatie.One aspect of this advice should focus on the selection of suitable performance measures and the consultant has already chosen some performance measures which could be included in a balanced scorecard at Veyatie(Appendix 2).These have been provided to help you illustrate your advice on the problems of using the balanced scorecard. 董事会已经就在 Veyatie 中实施和使用平衡记分卡方法的问题征求了您的意见。 该建议的一个方面应集中于选择合适的绩效指标。顾问已经选择了一些可以包 括在 Veyatie 的平衡记分卡中的绩效指标(附录2),提供这些信息是为了帮助 您说明关于使用平衡记分卡问题的建议。 Note:The board would welcome your advice on how to refine the performance measures as part of your advice on the problems of using and implementing the balanced scorecard,but does not want you to give a detailed evaluation of the advantages and disadvantages of each performance measure,or to suggest completely new measures. 注意：董事会会欢迎你将如何完善绩效衡量标准的建议作为关于使用和实施平 衡记分卡问题的建议的一部分，但不希望你给去详细的评估每个绩效指标的优 点和缺点或建议新的指标。 Appendix 1 Customer satisfaction data 客户满意度数据 Percentage of customers giving customer satisfaction scores*between 1 and 5 客户满意度得分*在1到5分之间 Narrative Completely satisfied Very satisfied Satisfied Somewhat dissatisfied Completely dissatisfied 20X3 Score Q3 Q4 Q1 5 5% 5% 50% 4 10% 5% 0% 3 70% 65% 0% 2 10% 20% 0% 1 5% D 5% E DI50% 20X4

Q2 45% 1% 1% 8% 45% Mean score 3 ·00 2 ·85 3 ·00 2 ·94 2 ·90 2 ·70 2 ·95 2 ·93 *Satisfaction scores were collected from a large number of customers when paying for their items. *收集了大量顾客的满意度评分。 Appendix2 Perspective Financial Customer Intemal business processes Learning and innovation Performance measure Operating pofit margin Inventory turnover Current ratio Customer satisfaction Market share Stock out percentage¹ Total employee training days² Notes: 1.Stock out percentage is the percentage of product lines which are unavailable for sale in each store at the beginning of each trading day. 1.缺货百分比是在每个交易日开始时在每个商店无法销售的产品线的百分比。 2.The human resources department already records the total number of employee training days.Employee training covers the three main areas of health and safety training,training in handling customer complaints and training staff to understand the range of products available and how to display them attractively in the store. 2.人力资源部门已经记录了员工培训的总天数。员工培训包括三个主要的培训 领域：健康和安全培训，处理客户投诉的培训，和培训员工了解可用的产品的 范围以及如何在商店中吸引人地展示它们。

Q2(a) 二、Requirement 解 析 ： (a)Assess the difficulties in using and interpreting the customer satisfaction data at Veyatie. (10 marks) (a)评估使用和解释客户满意度数据的难点。 三、答题思路： 本问题可从客户满意度数据的具有主观性(Subjectivity),是汇总数据和平均数 据(Aggregated and mean data), 是不完整的数据(Incomplete data), 难识别趋势 Subjectivity(Identifying trends)等方面作答，具体答题思路如下： Subjectivity √ 客户对自己的满意度的评价是主观的。 " own assessments of satisfaction are subjective √ 导致主观的原因：不同的顾客可能对他们的店铺有不同的期望，并会对 他们参观的不同方面给予不同程度的重视。 ■ have different expectations of their visit will attach different levels of importance to different aspects of their visit √ 反映出来的情况：在评价满意度时，客户可能倾向于使用中间的分数， 而不愿使用最高和最低的分数。这似乎是数据中的情况，在大多数季 度，客户没有给出1或5分。 ■ may tend to use the middle scores ■ be reluctant to use the highest and lowest scores ■ in most quarters customers do not give the scores of 1 or 5. Aggregated and mean data √ 单 一 汇总数据的缺点：
1. 收集一个汇总数据反映顾客满意度无法表明他们对商店顾客的访问的 哪些方面感到满意或不满意。 ■ a single measure does not indicate what aspect of their visit to the store customers are satisfied or dissatisfied 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION

2. 如果不知道客户是对哪些方面感到满意，就很难知道如何提高客户满 意度。 ■ Without knowing which aspects are satisfied with ·be hard to know what to do to improve customer satisfaction √ 算术平均数的缺点及弥补措施：使用平均分数也可能使数据难以解释。 中位数或模态分数的计算可能是更可取的，因为这减少了由非常高或非 常低的分数引起的平均数的失真。 ■ the mean score make the data hard to interpret ·median or modal score may be preferable because this reduces the distortion to mean scores caused by very high or low scores. Incomplete data √ 这些数据可能不能代表范围广泛的客户群体。 "may not represent the views of a wide range of customers √ 购物行为导致不同：这些分数是在顾客在收银台购买商品时收集的。这 并不能反映那些不满意而不买任何东西的顾客的观点。 ■ collected when customers are buying goods at the till ■ does not reflect the views of the customers who were dissatisfied √ 奖品的影响：抽奖的奖品可能对男女顾客和不同年龄的顾客有不同的吸 引力。 ■ may appeal differently to male and female customers and to customers of different ages √ 不完整数据导致的后果：将这些数据当作代表客户的观点可能会产生误 导，并导致做出不正确的决定。 ■ may be misleading ·lead to incorrect decisions being taken Identifying trends √ 识别趋势的意义：是克服在解释客户数据时遇到的一些问题的一种方法， 但可能很难确定趋势。 ·one way of overcoming some of the problems of interpreting the customer data ·may be difficult to identify trends √ 趋 势 分 析 对 Veyatie 的意义：像 Veyatie 这样的时尚零售商中，可能存 在季节性和短期或周期性的趋势，但很难解释长期的趋势是什么。 ■ fashion retailer may be seasonal and short-term or cyclical trends ■ hard to interpret what the long-term trend is

Q2(b) 二 、Requirement 解 析 ： (b)Advise the board as requested of the problems of implementing and using the balanced scorecard approach at Veyatie. (15 marks) (b)根据要求向董事会就 Veyatie 中实施和使用平衡记分卡过程中的问题提供建 议。 三 、答题思路： 本小问可从指标的选择 (Selecting measures),平衡记分卡中指标间可能的冲突 (Conflicting measures), 董事会承诺 (Board commitment),收集和解释数据 (Collecting and interpreting data) 等方面作答，考生需注意题干信息中又明确 指出不需详细的评估每个绩效指标的优点和缺点，也不需要给出关于新指标的 建议 。 本小问具体答题思路如下： Selecting measures √ 原则：必须选择与Veyatie 的关键成功因素和战略目标相一致的评价指 标 。 ■ are congruent with Veyatie's critical success factors(CSFs)and strategic objectives. √现状：战略目标之一是是增加商店数量，但目前没有指标用于衡量这一 目标 。 one of the strategic objectives to increase the number of stores not reflected at all in the measures selected √原因：缺乏衡量这一目标的指标可能是 Veyatie 不太可能在不久的将来 开设新店的原因。 ■ lack of a suitable measure for this objective ·why Veyatie is unlikely to open new stores in the near future √ 应避免： 1.不能仅仅因为它们容易测量就选择措施。 ·be selected just because they are easy to measure 举例：人力资源部门已经记录了员工培训天数的总数，选择这个指标仅 仅是因为数据很容易获得。员工花在不同类型的训练上的天数尚不清楚。 ■ total number ofemployee training days ■ been selected just because the data is readily available ·days spent on the different types of training is unclear 虽然员工的健康和安全培训显然很重要，但它并不能直接帮助Veyatie 实 现其战略目标。 · staff health and safety training ■ not directly help Veyatie achieve its strategic objectives 改进方法：最好是衡量培训员工了解现有产品范围的天数，以及如何在 商店中吸引人地展示它们，因为这与Veyatie的战略目标直接相关。 ■ days spent training staff ■ to understand the range of products available and how to display them attractively in the store ·as this directly relates to Veyatie's strategic objectives 2.使用过多的财务指标和内部指标 平衡记分卡方法的好处之一是，它给企业提供了一个整体视角，涵盖了 财务和非财务以及内部和外部因素。 ·presents a holistic view of a business covering financial and non-financial and internal and external factors 现状：目前所选的指标确实涵盖了平衡记分卡的所有四个角度，财务角 度和内部角度的指标更多。 ·do cover all four perspectives of the balanced scorecard more measures in the financial perspective most of the measures are internally focused 理由：如客户满意度这样的非财务因素，会推动企业未来的业绩增长， 并将使 Veyatie 能够实现其战略目标。 ■ drive future performance ·enable Veyatie to achieve its strategic objectives Conflicting measures √ 原则：选择在平衡记分卡中使用的指标时，必须注意选择不相互冲突的 指标。否则管理层可能会不知道应该关注什么指标，或者忽略某一指标 而只关注另一指标。 ■ select measures which do not conflict with each other ■ managers will not know which measure to focus on ·may simply ignore Q3 一、题干解析 Company information Daldorn is a manufacturer of heavy steel items.It is funded by a venture capitalist organisation (VC).Following a period of poor performance,the VC has expressed concern that Daldorn's board members are focusing too much on their own interests, while neglecting to adequately measure and manage company performance in respect of other stakeholder groups. Daldorn 是一家重型钢铁制品制造商。它得到了风险投资机构 (VC ) 的资助。 经过一段不佳的业绩表现后，VC 表示担忧，认为 Daldorn 的董事会成员过于关 注自身利益，而忽视了充分衡量和管理公司在其他利益相关者群体方面的绩效。 The company has experienced severe cash flow difficulties due to financial losses made on the sale of several new products.These difficulties have been attributed to poor pricing decisions,which were the responsibility of the board and have resulted in many employees losing their jobs. 由于多个新产品销售造成的财务损失，公司经历了严重的现金流困难。这些困 难被归因于董事会的不良定价决策，导致许多员工失去了工作。 Key stakeholder groups The VC has identified three key stakeholder groups at Daldorn: 主要利益相关者群体 VC已经确定了Daldorn 的三个主要利益相关者群体： The board The VC is concerned that due to the past losses made on several new products,the board has become too cautious in their attitude towards potential new projects and,in particular,to the pricing of new products.Given the importance of the board to the success of Daldorn,the VC has recently implemented a new bonus scheme.This is an attempt by the VC to revise the board's appetite for risk and encourage them to take more risks,for example,in deciding on the price of new products.Board members will now receive a very large annual performance-related bonus for Daldorn's achievement of challenging targets set on the financial performance measure of return on capital employed(ROCE). VC 担心，由于过去在多个新产品上的损失，董事会在对潜在新项目，尤其是新 产品定价方面变得过于谨慎。鉴于董事会对 Daldorn 成功的重要性，VC 最近实 施了新的奖金计划。这是 VC 试图修改董事会的风险偏好，鼓励他们更愿意承 担风险，例如在新产品定价方面。董事会成员现在将因 Daldorn 达到设定的投 资回报率 (ROCE) 财务绩效目标而获得丰厚的年度绩效奖金。 Employees The manufacturing process at Daldorn does not require employees to have a high level of skilland so most of the manufacturing employees are relatively low skilled. Other employees in other departments have roles which can require specific skills and qualifications.There is a high level of unemployment in the region where Daldorn is based. Daldorn 的制造流程不需要员工具备高水平的技能，因此大多数制造员工的技能 相对较低。其他部门的其他员工可能需要特定的技能和资格。Daldorn所在地区 的失业率较高。 Government and regulators Daldorn operates in a strict regulatory environment.Daldorn has a good record of compliance,but recently its own scientists have discovered high concentrations of a toxic pollutant,which is a waste product from its own manufacturing processes,in the soil near to its factory. Daldorn 在严格的监管环境中运营。Daldorn 在遵守法规方面有良好的记录，但 最近，该公司自己的科学家发现其制造过程中的一种有毒污染物在工厂附近的 土壤中浓度很高，这是其制造过程的废弃物。 The VC has asked for your advice on whether Daldorn's existing measures shown in Appendix 1 adequately measure the company's performance in managing the concerns of each of these three key stakeholder groups.You may justify the use of alternative measures,but the VC wants only one measure for each stakeholder group and is not concerned about the potential conflict between measures at this stage.As part of this work,the VC expects you to briefly comment on the power and interest of the three stakeholder groups. VC 请你就 Daldorn 附录1中所示的现有措施是否足够衡量该公司在管理这三个 主要利益相关者群体的关切方面提供建议。你可以论证替代评估指标的使用， 但只需要为每一类利益相关者群体选择一个评估指标，并且 VC 目前不关心指 标之间的潜在冲突。作为此工作的一部分，VC 希望你简要评论这三个利益相关 者群体的权力和利益。 Pricing decision Daldorn is about to launch a new product and needs to determine an appropriate price to charge.The variable cost of each product is uncertain and,hence,there are three possibilities for each demand level.The total contribution of the products at the three possible anticipated levels of demand are shown in Appendix2. Daldorn 即将推出一种新产品，需要确定一个合适的售价。每种产品的变动成本 是不确定的，因此对于每个需求水平，存在三种可能性。附录2显示了产品在 三种可能的预期需求水平下的总贡献。 Investment projects Two new mutually exclusive manufacturing projects,which are totally unconnected to Daldorn,have become available for the VC to invest in.The VC has undertaken many similar investments before and is an almost entirely risk neutral investor. VC 有机会投资两个新的相互排斥的制造项目，与 Daldorn 毫无关联。VC 以前 进行过许多类似的投资，几乎是风险中性的投资者。 Two important exogenous(external)variables affecting the net present value(NPV) of the new projects,A and B,are the worldwide demand for steel products and the level of tariffs applied to the import of a key raw material.The probabilities of these two variables are independent.The VC has estimated the probabilities of there being low,medium or high levels of these two variables in Appendix 3,together with an estimate of the expected NPV for project A for each level of demand and tariff.An analyst has already calculated that the overall expected value of project B is $1,347 million. 影响新项目 A 和 B 的净现值 (NPV) 的两个重要外生(外部)变量是全球钢铁 产品需求和对关键原材料进口的关税水平。这两个变量的概率是独立的。VC 在 附录3中估算了这两个变量的低、中和高水平的概率，以及每个需求水平和关 税水平下项目A 的预期 NPV 的估算。一位分析师已经计算出项目 B 的整体预 期值为1,347百万美元。 Appendix 1 Stakeholder Measure Board Return on capital employed Employees Training costs Government/regulators No measure specified Appendix 2 Demand,selling price and variable cost for the new product Demand* 1,200 1,200 1,200 950 950 950 500 500 500 Unit selling price $'000 75 75 75 95 95 95 140 140 140 Unit variable cost $'000 37 40 50 37 40 50 37 40 50 has been correctly calculated to be 106. 2)An analyst has already calculated that the overall expected value of project B is $1,347 million. 备注 1 ) 项 目A结果的标准差已正确计算为103,项目B 结果的标准差已正确计算 为106。 Q3(a) 二 、Requirement 解析 Assess the performance measures shown in Appendix 1 in relation to the three key stakeholder groups as required by the VC.(9 marks) 根据 VC 的要求，评估附录1中显示的与三个主要利益相关者群体相关的绩效 指标。(9分) 三 、答题思路 根据每三种利益相关者对组织的影响及兴趣来确定相应的评估指标。 Board -Key players with high power and interest 高权力和高利益的关键参与者 -Need to understand and approve company strategy 需要理解和批准公司战略 -Motivation is vital for driving company performance 激励对推动公司绩效至关重要 -ROCE familiar to the board,but may discourage new investments ROCE 对董事会而言较为熟悉，但可能会抑制新投资 -Alternative measures like Economic Value Added (EVATM)can be considered 可以考虑替代性指标，如经济附加值 (EVATM) Employees -High interest,relatively low-skilled,individually low power,keep informed 高度关注，相对低技能，个体权力较低，保持告知 -Rights likely legally protected in strict regulatory environment 严格的监管环境中，员工的权益可能受到法律保护，增加了其权力 -Need to be informed to prevent alignment with more powerful groups 需要通知员工以防止他们与更有力的利益相关团体联合 低技能员工： -Training costs may not suit low-skilled workforce 培训成本可能不适合低技能员工 -Measures related to productivity may be more useful 与员工生产力相关的指标可能更有用 高技能员工： -Some highly skilled employees may benefit from training cost measurement 一些高技能员工可能受益于培训成本的测量 -Precise measures like the percentage achieving relevant qualifications may be more appropriate 更精确的指标，如达到相关资格或技能水平的员工百分比，可能更为合适 Government and Regulators -High power,low interest,keep satisfied 高权力，低利益，保持其满意 -Should be kept satisfied to prevent them from becoming key players 确保满足他们的需求，以防止他们成为关键参与者 -Measures related to environmental performance can satisfy them,such as pollutant levels in the soil 与环境绩效相关的指标可以满足他们，例如土壤中的污染物水平 ONLINE DELIVERY PLATINUM

Q3(b) 二、Requirement 解析 Evaluate which price the board would choose for the new product based on the board's revised attitude to risk and briefly comment on the drawbacks of the decision rule used.(5 marks) 根据董事会对风险态度的修订，评估董事会将为新产品选择哪个价格，并简要 评论决策规则的缺点。(5分) 三、答题思路 1.确定董事会的风险偏好： -Very large performance-related bonuses -They have a risk-seeking attitude to risk in order to maximise their bonus 非常高的绩效奖励鼓励寻求风险的态度 2.根据风险偏好确定决策原则： - Likely to use the "maximax"decision rule,maximizing maximum contribution 可能会使用“最大值最大化”决策规则，以获取最大贡献 3.根据决策原则判断是否投资该项目： -The price is $95,000 which would give a maximum contribution of$55,100,000 选择的价格：95,000美元，最大贡献为55,100,000美元 4.决策原则的缺点： -may encourage the board to take excessive risk, -does not take into account the probabilities of each outcome -these probabilities are difficult to determine 最大最大化的缺点：可能鼓励过度冒险，不考虑概率，概率很难决定

Q3(c) 二、Requirement 解析 Advise the VC which of the two new investment projects it should undertake, including an evaluation of the appropriateness of the numerical technique used.(11 marks) 建议 VC 应承担两个新投资项目中的哪一个，包括对所使用数值技巧的适当性 的评估。(11分) 三、答题思路 1.判断 VC 的风险偏好，对应的决策原则及其优缺点 - VCAlmost entirely risk-neutral VC 几乎完全是风险中性 -Suitable to use the Expected Value (EV)approach to select the project with the highest expected NPV 使用期望值 (EV) 方法选择具有最高期望NPV 的项目是合适的 -EV is a long-run average and assumes repeated decisions EV 是一种长期平均值，假设重复的决策 -Probabilities and cost of capital estimates are subjective and could be inaccurate 概率和资本成本估计是主观的，可能不准确 -VC's experience makes probability estimates more reliable 风险投资公司的经验使概率估计更可靠 2.计算项目A 的EV 值，根据EV 给出结论 -EV calculations for both projects result in the same NPV of$1,347million -would be indifferent to which project to undertake 两个项目的 EV 计算结果为相同的NPV, 为1,347百万美元 (W1) 。 二个项 目没有区别 3.项目评估中需要考虑的其它因素 □ 风 险 ： -Project A has a slightly lower standard deviation(103),indicating lower risk compared to project B(106) 项目A 的标准偏差略低(103),相对于项目B(106) 风险较低 -VC may choose project A due to lower risk and being risk-neutral 风险中性的 VC 可能选择项目A, 因为风险较低 □变量、外部因素： -Further work like sensitivity analysis or PEST analysis can assist the VC's decision-making. 进一步的工作，如敏感性分析或PEST 分析，可以协助VC 的决策 W1-Expected NPV of Project A* Tariff Low Med Deman High Total High 48 (1,200×0.04 100 (1,000×0.01 54 (900×0.06) 202 Med 170 (1,700×0.10) 375 (1,500*0.25) 150 (1,000×0.15) 695 Low 111 (1,850×0.06) 240 (1,600×0.15) 99 (1,100*0.09) 450 Total 329 715 303 1347 *Assuming the probabilities of the two variables are independent. 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION

Q1 一、 题干解析 Organisation information You are a performance management consultant brought in by the chiefexecutive officer (CEO)of the Department for Internal Affairs(DIA)for the country of Deeland.The department handles,among other areas,the policing of Deeland.The CEO is a government employee reporting to the Minister for Internal Affairs.The Minister for Internal Affairs is an elected politician appointed by the leader of the Deeland government. 你是一名绩效管理顾问，由Deeland 国家的内政部(DIA)首席执行官(CEO)聘请来 的。该部门负责Deeland 的警务工作和其他的一些领域。首席执行官是需要向内 务部长报告的。内政部长是由Deeland 人民选举出来并由Deeland 政府领导人任 命 的。 The government of Deeland has recently changed and the new Minister for Internal Affairs has instructed the CEO of the DIA to improve the performance of the Deeland Police(DP)by implementing the Minister's new mission statement for DP:'to protect the community and prevent crime while providing a value for money service.'As part of this implementation,the CEO has identified the following four key areas for action: 1.Protecting and supporting those at risk of harm 2.Ensuring criminals are caught and brought before the courts 3.Achieving long-term sustainable solutions to the causes of crime 4.Addressing new forms of crime arising in the virtual world Deeland 的政府最近发生了变化，新内政部长要求内政部的首席执行官，通过执 行新部长为Deeland 警察制定的新使命，来提高Deeland 警察(DP)的绩效，新使 命是：“保护社区，防止犯罪，同时提供物有所值的服务。”作为实施这一计划的 一部分，首席执行官确定了以下四个主要行动领域：

4. 应对虚拟世界中出现的新形式的犯罪 The new Minister wants general improvement in the first three of these areas,as her political campaign was based around criticism of the previous government's perceived failure on these points.It is widely agreed that in the second area,the major concern is the catching of criminals since,historically,there is a high probability that once caught they are brought before the courts.The third area is being addressed through increased involvement with local communities in order to identify and address the causes of crime. The fourth area of crime in the virtual world (the use of computers to facilitate crime) was hardly addressed under the previous government and the Minister wants to see the creation of a task force which will develop skills in detection and prosecution of virtual crime. 新部长希望在前三个方面得到明显改善，因为她当时政治竞选活动就是以批评上 届政府在这三面方面的明显失败的为基础的。普遍认知，在第二个领域，主要的 问题是如何抓住罪犯，因为根据历史经验，罪犯一旦被抓住就很有可能被送上法 庭。第三个领域，为了查明和解决犯罪的原因，目前正在通过增加地方社区的参 与来解决这个问题。虚拟世界犯罪的第四个领域(使用计算机促进犯罪)在上届政 府中几乎没有建树，部长希望看到在这个方面建立一个特别工作组，负责发展侦 测和检控虚拟犯罪的技巧。 CSFs and KPIs In a recent meeting with the CEO,the Minister indicated that she felt that the four key areas were too vague and in order to better focus actions,the Minister's adviser has suggested the following critical success factors(CSFs): 1.Greater protection and more support for those at risk of harm 2.Be better at catching criminals 3.Reducing the causes of crime by increased involvement with local communities 4.Create a task force to develop skills in detection and prosecution of virtual crime 部长最近在与首席执行官的一次会谈中表示，她认为四个关键领域过于模糊，为 了更好地采取行动，部长的顾问建议了下列成功的关键因素：

4. 成立一个特别行动小组，负责发展侦测和检控虚拟犯罪的技巧 Initially,the CEO did not see why the four key areas originally given could not be used as CSFs.He wants you to provide justifications in the light of the Mi nister's concerns for the changes which the adviser has made to each of these.Then,using the above CSFs,he wants you to provide justified recommendations of up to two key performance indicators(KPIs)per CSF in order to measure performance. 最 初 ，CEO 不明白为什么最初的四个关键领域不能用作CSFs 。他想让你说明部 长的顾问对每一处改动的理由。然后，根据上面的CSFs, 他希望您为每个 CSF 提供最多两个合理的绩效指标(KPIs)的 建 议 ，以便衡量每一个成功关键因素的绩 效表现。 In order to help you with the KPIs,the CEO has provided you with a table of data (Appendix 1)which has been used in the past when considering DP's performance. However,you are allowed to suggest new data which would help in measuring performance.The CEO has made it clear that at this stage,no calculations are required. 为了便于制定 KPIs,CEO 为你提供了一个数据表(附录1),这是过去在衡量 DP 的绩效时使用的数据。不过，你可以提出有助于衡量绩效的新数据。CEO 已经明 确表示，关于这部分，不需要进行任何计算。 Value for money Since DP is funded wholly through Deeland's general taxation,the CEO wants to be able to report on whether DP is providing a value for money(VFM)service as required by the new mission statement.He has heard of the 3Es(economy,efficiency and effectiveness)but needs an explanation of these three headings and how this links to the work on CSFs and KPIs already requested.Then,he requires an evaluation,using the data given in Appendix 1,of whether DP provides such a service.He understands that the evaluation may be limited,as Appendix 1 may not give a data set to perform a full VFM exercise. 由于DP 的资金完全来自Deeland 的税收，CEO 希望能够报告DP 是否按照新使 命的要求提供了物有所值(VFM)服务。他听说过3E(经济性、效率性和效益性), 但需要解释这三个标题的具体含义，以及这些与之前要求的 CSFs 和 KPIs 之间 的联系。然后，他要求使用附录1中给出的数据对DP 是否提供这样的服务进行 评估。他知道这个评估可能是不全面的，因为附录1可能没有提供执行完整VFM 所需的所有数据。 Non-financial performance indicators The new Minister has come from a business background into politics and so far,in departmental discussions,she has focused heavily on the financial aspects of running the Department of Internal Affairs.The CEO wants to help her change focus towards using non-financial performance indicators (NFPIs)and so to understand why financial indicators are not particularly useful for public sector organisations such as DP.The CEO wants you to explain this in your report and illustrate your explanation with examples relevant to DP. 这位新部长在进入政治之前是在企业工作的，到目前为止，在部门讨论中，她一 直把重点放在管理内政部的财政方面。首席执行官希望帮助她将重点转向使用非 财务绩效指标(NFPIs), 从而理解为仕么财务指标对 DP 等公共部门组织不是特别 有用。首席执行官希望你在报告中解释这一点，并用与DP 相关的例子来说明你 NG pPONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM的解释。 GOLDEN EDUCATION NG pP ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM League tables The Minister is interested in benchmarking as this was often done during her days in business.As a result,she joined an international initiative for creating a league table of fire service data by sharing information with other nearby countries.The CEO believes that the Minister will want to introduce this idea for DP and so wants an evaluation (including recommendation)of the use of an international police force performance league table and its link to targets for DP.The CEO is especially concerned about the police officers'reaction to this new idea as they have a powerful union,which has widespread public support.Therefore,he also needs you to explain how the use of league
