explanation_zh: It is now 1 September 20X5. Write a report to the CEO of the Department for Internal Affairs to respond to his instructions for work on the following areas: (i) the critical success factors and key performance indicators for Deeland Police; (16 marks) (ii) an evaluation of the value for money service provided; (13 marks) (iii) the use of non-financial performance indicators; (7 marks) (iv) the use of league tables in measuring the performance of Deeland Police. (10 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the format,style and structure of the discussion of your answer. (4 marks) 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 向内务部首席执行官写一份报告，回应他在以下方面的要求： (i).Deeland 警察的关键成功因素和主要绩效指标；(16分) (ii).评估所提供服务的物有所值；(13分) iii).使用非财务指标；(7分) (iv).使用排行榜衡量Deeland 警察的工作表现。(10分) 回答的格式、风格和结构将被授予专业分数。(4分) 三、 答题思路： 这道题目是需要写一份报告，所以需要拥有报告的基础格式 Report heading 四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant/A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date: 指定日期/考试日期 标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据section A 中第十个问题内容分为以下2种情况 评估 performance reportGOPerformance reporting+managerment issues+ 公司 名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+ 公司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结 section A 中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduciton 能够运用连接词描述 Section A 中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:The CEO,Department of Internal Affairs (DIA) From:An Accountant Date:1 September 20X5 Subject:Performance measurement and management at Deeland Police(DP) This report recommends and justifies critical success factors(CSFs)and key performance indicators(KPIs)for DP based on the four critical areas of performance. DP is then evaluated on the value for money(VFM)provision of its service.Finally, the use of a league table of police performance and the setting of targets for DP is assessed,with comment on the employee reaction to such a management approach. (i)Critical success factors(CSFs)and key performance indicators(KPIs) 这一问需要解决两个问题。 1.provide justifications in the light of the Minister's concerns for the changes which the adviser has made to each of CSFs, 给出 CSF 更改的原因。 在构建答案时，需要说明新的 CSFs, 并针对每一个新的CSF 具体说明修改 原因，所以可以用每一个 CSF 作为回答的副标题。修改的主要是让 CSF 要 符合 SMART 原则，也就是 Specific 明确的，Measurable 可衡量的，Achievable 可达成的，Relevant 相关的，Time-limited 有时限的。所以可以从这几个点来 回答 √Greater protection and more support for those at harm ■ a straight-forward improvement 更明确 √Be better at catching criminals ■ bringing them before the courts does not appear to be critical 更明确 √Reducing the causes of crime by increased involvement with local communities ■ improvement using the mechanism suggested 更明确 √Create a task force to develop skills in detection and prosecution of virtual crime ■ as desired by the Minister 更明确以及可衡量的 2.using the above CSFs,he wants you to provide justified recommendations of up to two key performance indicators(KPIs)per CSF in order to measure performance 根据上述的CSFs, 每一个提出最多2个合理的KPI 因此在构建答案的时候需要给出最多2个可以衡量的 KPI, 给多会对 professional marks 造成影响。此外给出的KPI 还需要进一步分析，说明这些 KPI 为什么可以衡量相应的CSF √ Area 1 ■ 关于protectiGngO的LDEPI-登记为有EDCA险TIO的N暴力犯罪案件受害者的每年人 数百分比变化 -Percentage change year on year of the number of victims of violent crimes, once they are identified as at risk · 需要建立一个“有风险”人群的登记册 · a register of ‘at risk'people would need to be created ■ 关于 supporting 的 KPI-工作人员在支持活动中平均花在每个受害者 身上的时间变化百分比。 -Percentage change of staff hours spent with each victim on average in support activities. ■ 进一步分析 · 两个指标目前都无法衡量因为没有数据 ◆ Neither can be measured ◆ data is not collected · 第一个指标可以通过衡量暴力犯罪的受害者人数来间接解决，如 果得到更好保护，这个指标应该下降 ◆ indirectly addressed by measuring the number of victims of violent crimes ◆ a fall if those at risk are better protected √Area 2 ■ 关于clear-up rate的 KPI-犯罪案件侦破率的百分比的变化 -the percentage change in the percentage of crimes solved · “解决”与“抓获”是不一样的，因为可能有一些情况下，警 察认识罪犯，但他们逃脱了追捕 ◆ 'solved'is not the same as criminal caught' ◆ where the police know the criminal,but they escape capture ■ 进一步分析 · 将抓住的罪犯送上法庭并不是重要衡量领域，因为不送上法庭概 率很低 ◆ bringing the criminal before the courts once caught does not appear to be a critical area ◆ low risk possibility · 关键衡量领域是确保犯罪案件被解决并送上法庭 ◆ Ensuring crimes are solved and criminals are brought before the courts' √Area 3 ■ 指标是-这一年Deeland犯罪总数的百分比变化。 -the percentage change in the total number of crimes in Deeland in the year. ■ 进一步和分析 · 减少犯罪原因可以让这个KPI 长期下降，使用三年移动平均更好 ◆ create a long-term trend downwards ◆ better to use a three-year moving average of the change · 犯罪的根本原因无法准确衡量，因为影响因素很多，给出的指标 很难衡量改变是否可能长期稳定 ◆ underlying causes of crime may not be accurately measured ◆ whether the changes are sustainable in the long term,which will be difficult to do √Area 4 ■ 指标是-工作小组中各个角色的百分比和报案的虚拟犯罪被解决的百 分比 -percentage of roles in the task force filled · 这要求计划一个组织适当的工作小组，可能会很复杂，因为是新 的领域，可能不知道需要多少工作人员和他们应该具有什么资格 ◆ a plan for the organisation of a suitable task force ◆ may be complicated as this is a new area where knowledge of how many staff and what qualifications they should have may not be present -percentage of virtual crimes reported which are solved · 显示工作小组的有效性 ◆ shows the effectiveness of the task force ■ 进一步分析 · 目前数据无法衡量这两个指标 ◆ not sufficient to measure this. (ii)Value for money(VFM) 第二个问题需要回答三个方面的问题 1.an explanation of these three headings解 析 3E 的意思 √Economy 经济性 ■ the optimisation of the resources 资源最优化 ■ ensuring the appropriate quality of input resources are obtained at the lowest cost确保以最低的成本获得合适质量的投入资源 √Efficiency 效率性 ■ the optimisation of the process by which inputs are turned into outputs 如 何投入产出流程最优化 √Effectiveness 效益性 ■ how the outputs of the organisation meet its goals产出如何满足组织的 目标 2.how this links to the work on CSFs and KPIs already requested 3E 如何跟之前的 CSF 与 KPI 相关联 √Effectiveness 与效益性有关 √The KPIs measure the achievement of the goals of DPKPI衡量是否达成DP 的目标 √outcomes rather than processes or inputs in this case因此与结果有关，与流 程或者投入无关 3.Considering the situation at DPspecifically 衡 量DP 在 3E 方面表现如何 这部分需要包含计算，并且需要说明改变的情况和含义 √ 因为没有外部数据，所以这份衡量是根据历史数据比较 ■ no data is given ■ VFM can only be judged against previous years'data √Economy-looking at the cost of buying inputs观察购买投入的成本 · 衡量指标 · the principal input is staff-90·1%of total costs 主要投入是员工-占总成本的90 · 1% · the cost per employee-$40,318 每个员工的成本-$40,318 · 改变情况 · 3·8%reduction on the previous year 较 上 年 减 少 8 % · 原 因 ◆ mix of staff is changing with more administrative staff replacing police officers 工作人员的结构正在发生变化，更多的行政人员取代了警察 ◆ as police officers may be more expensive 因为警察可能更贵 ◆ useful to obtain the average police officer salary 对获得警察的平均工资很有用 ■ 含义(目前无法判断，需要跟相似国家的或者其他外部指标比较) · should compare to external figures such as the national average wage · or the average salary of staff in other police forces in similar countries √ Efficiency · 衡量指标 · Solved crimes per police officer-20X5:7.855,20X4:7.918,20X3: 7.915 每名警察解决的犯罪-20X5:7.855,20X4:7.918,20X3:7.915 · Solved crimes per employee (police officers and admin staff)-20X5: 5.929,20X4:5.994,20X3:6.022 每名员工(警察和行政人员)解决的犯罪-20X5:5.929,20X4:5.994, 20X3:6.022 · Police officers per 1,000 population -20X5:3.19,20X4:3.23,20X3: 3.30 每1000人的警察人数-20X5:3.19,20X4:3.23,20X3:3.30 · 改变情况 · The trend in the number of police officers is downward 警察人数呈下降趋势 · The number of crimes which each is solving is falling-down 0·8% from 20X3 每个人破案的数量正在下降-比20X3 下降了0.8% ■ 含义 · Performance in this area is therefore poor. 这个领域表现糟糕。 √Effectivene ss-从四个方面衡量 ■ Protection and support of those at risk 保护和支持处于危险中的人 · 衡量指标 ◆ The percentage of violent crime 暴力犯罪的百分比 ◆ no measure of support provided. 没有关于支持的评估。 · 改变情况 ◆ remains flat over the three years of data at 20%of the total number of crimes reported 在过去三年的数据中保持不变，占所报告的犯罪总数的20% · 含义 ◆ remains broadly unchanged 基本保持不变 ■ Solving crimes解决犯罪 · 衡量指标 ◆ The clear-up rate 破案率 · 改变情况 ◆ fallen from 56·7%to 55·0% 从56.7%下降到了55.0% · 含义 ◆ reflects the change in staff mix as police officer numbers have fallen 反映了随着警察数量的下降，工作人员组合的变化 ■ Causes of crime · 衡量指标 ◆ Number of crimes reported in the year 本年报案数量 · 改变情况 ◆ upwards with an increase of 2%each year over the last two years 在过去的两年里，每年以2%的速度增长 · 含义 ◆ reflect the falling numbers of police officers in DP 反映了DP 警察数量的下降 ■ Virtual crime · 衡量指标 ◆ not possible to measure 无法衡量 (iii)Non-financial performance indicators (NFPIs) 本题需要回答为什么财务指标在DP 不适用并提出适合的例子。 √Public sector organisations have a number-of differences compared to profit making entities 公共部门组织与营利性组织相比有许多差异 ONLINE DELIV √partly addressed with the use of non financial performance indicators. 可以通过使用非财务绩效指标来部分解决 √DPmust consider the use of NFPIs in order to capture the aspects of DP's mission which are fundamentally non-financial and subjective,such as protecting the community. DP 必须考虑使用NFPI, 因 为DP 使命的本质上主要涉及非财务和主观的方 面，例如保护社区。 √ Lack of profit measure 第一个不适用原因-缺乏利润指标 · DP is not expected to make a profit. DP 不以盈利为目的 · no specific charge for the service to the public and the police are funded through general taxation by the government. 对公众的服务没有具体收费，警察的资金来自政府的税收 · The problem with using purely financial measures -solely cost measures. 使用纯财务指标的问题在于，它们只是成本指标。 · If only financial measures are used-positive progress would only be seen in cost reduction. 如果只使用财务措施，那么这将意味着只有在降低成本方面才能看到积 极的进展。 · reduce the quality of the service and so fail to achieve DP's mission. 这很可能会降低服务质量，从而无法实现 DP 的使命。 √ Multiple objectives 第二个不适用原因-多个目标 · In a profit-making organisation,the goal is clear 在一个盈利组织，目标是明确的 · difficult to say with DP which is the single,overriding objective. 很难说DP 具有单一的，明确的目标 · must be an attempt to balance and so compromise between the different areas which have been set out in order to achieve overall success. 必须努力在为取得全面成功而制定的不同领域之间取得平衡和妥协 · DPillustrates this problem in that it has four critical areas,none of which focus on financial goals and can only be measured in non-financial terms. DP 说明了这一问题，因为它有四个关键领域，没有一个关注财务目标， 只能以非财务术语衡量。 √ Difficulty in defining suitable financial measures 第三个不适用原因-难以确定合适的财务指标 · Many non-profit seeking organisations provide services for which it is difficult to define a cost unit 许多非营利组织提供的服务很难确定成本单位 · With DP,the cost unit could be cost per crime reported or cost per crime solved or cost per member of the population. DP 的成本单位可以是每个报告的犯罪的成本或每解决一次犯罪的成本 或每人口成员的成本。 · the benefits of the service are mainly non-financial such as a greater feeling of security among the public. 这项服务的好处主要是非财务方面的，例如公众的安全感更高。 (iii)League tables 本道问题也涉及两个方面的回答 1.an assessment of the use of an international police force performance league table and its link to targets for DP评估排行榜以及说明跟DP 目标的关联 答题的框架也就是排行榜的优点及缺点 √ 首先是优点 ■ effectively benchmarks performance 有效地评测表现 ■ positive effect on behaviour 对行为产生积极影响 ■ can indicate areas of best practice 可以指出最佳实践的领域 ■ offers the possibility of improving performance by copying that best practice. 提供了通过复制最佳实践来提高表现的可能性。 ■ relative performance. 是相对的绩效表现评估。 √ 其次是缺点 ■ only measures relative performance.只衡量相对表现 · The best force could be producing an unacceptable performance in absolute terms ● 就绝对值而言，最好的部队可能还是会产生不可接受的表现 ■ Different external environments 不同的外部环境会产生影响 ■ Difficult to get a single measure 很难得到一个单一的评估指标 √ 与DP目标的关联 ■ how to rank the different forces 如何对不同的部队进行排名 ■ selection of the areas &the weighting given to them 区域的选择和给予它们的权重 · affect the position of the different forces 影响不同部队的位置 ■ what gets measured,gets done ■ 衡量了什么,就做了什么 · DP management will change their priorities DP 管理层将改变他们的优先级 · undermine the alignment of their behaviour with the given mission of DP 产生目标不一致行为 ONLINE DELIV -PLATINUM ■ calculation of the rank must encompass the key variables which will drive DP's desired performance 排名的计算必须包含驱动DP 期望表现的关键变量 2.How the use ofleague tables and targets might affect police officers'behaviour 排 行榜对警员行为的影响 √whether they feel a sense of accountability for the score 他们是否对分数有责任感 ■ do not feel that they can affect the rank 如果不觉得自己能影响排名 ·ignore it 忽略它 · actively undermine it in public through their union's public statements 通过工会的公开声明积极地在公共场合阻碍排名 √present the government with difficulty 给政府带来困难 ■ police are considered the experts 警察被认为是专家 ■ criticism will carry weight with the electorate 批评将对选民产生影响 √demotivated by the league tables 被排行榜打击积极性 ■ rank does not reflect the valuable work which they do 排名并不能反映他们所做的有价值的工作 · 例如创建新的虚拟犯罪任务组 creating the new virtual crime task force ■ rank is driven by factors outside of their control. 排名是由他们无法控制的因素驱动的。 · 例如该部队的预算可能会被削减，或者报告的犯罪数量与 Deeland的经济状况之间可能存在联系 the budget for the force may be cut,or there may be a link between the number of crimes reported and the economic conditions in Deeland

stem_zh: Q2 一、题干解析 Company information Clonyard is a private company which sells shoes to adults and children.Clonyard has several retail shops.The mission of Clonyard is 'to satisfy customers by providing footwear of excellent quality for the modern world.'Clonyard has built its reputation on providing footwear to those who have specialist needs in footwear,such as minor medical issues,and Clonyard's staffexcel at spending time with customers to determine customers'correct requirements.Clonyard has achieved modest growth over the past five years. Clonyard 是一家向成人和儿童出售鞋子的私企。Clonyard 有几家零售店。Clonyard 的使命是“通过为现代世界提供优质的鞋类来满足客户的需求。”Clonyard 以为那 些有专业需求的人(比如医务人员)提供鞋而闻名，Clonyard 的员工擅长花时间 与客户在一起来确定客户的需求。Clonyard 在过去的五年里取得了适度的增长。 Twelve months ago,Clonyard was the subject of a successful but hostile take-over bid by Elrig,a listed company.Elrig's mission is 'to return value consistently to our shareholders by growing our market share and by offering unrivalled value for money for our customers.' 12个月前，Clonyard 被上市公司Elrig 进行了恶意收购。Elrig 的使命是“通过增 加我们的市场份额和为客户提供无与伦比的性价比来不断为股东创造价值。” Elrig's primary motivation for the takeover was to enhance its market share by acquiring a niche operator.In addition,Erig's directors also believe that there is likely to be consolidation in the industry in the near future and the purchase of Clonyard by Elrig is a reaction to that belief.Having acquired Clonyard,Elrig is keen to retain the Clonyard brand and is also keen to ensure that all aspects of Clonyard's business operations are integrated into those of Elrig. Elrig 进行收购的主要动机是想通过收购一家利基运营商来提高其市场份额。此 外 ，Elrig 的董事们认为在不久的将来该行业可能会出现整合，而 Elrig 收购 Clonyard 就是他们对此的反应。在收购了Clonyard 后，Elrig 希望保留 Clonyard 的品牌，也希望确保 Clonyard 的所有业务运作都能整合到 Elrig 的业务运作中。 Current situation Elrig has taken a decision at board level that a similar range of inventory is maintained throughout all Elrig and Clonyard shops.Managers of Clonyard's individual shops are unhappy with this as this is contrary to the individual specialisms which shop managers were encouraged to develop previously.As a result,several managers have left the business. Elrig 已经在董事会层面做出决定，所有Elrig 和 Clonyard 的商店都保持类似的库 存范围。Clonyard 个别门店的经理对此不满意，因为这与以前鼓励门店经理发展 个人特色的理念相反。有几位经理因此已经离开了公司。 In order to help with the integration ofClonyard into Elrig's business,Elrig has ensured 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION that each Clonyard shop will have at least one of Elrig's employees working there. Clonyard's staff have complained that the Elrig members of staff are more focused on ensuring a sale is made than spending the required time with customers.Clonyard staff have also expressed concern about the lack of technical product knowledge of Elrig's staff. 为了帮助将Clonyard 整合到Elrig 的业务中，每个Clonyard 工厂至少有一名 Elrig 的员工在那里工作。Clonyard 的员工抱怨说， Elrig 的员工更注重确保销售的完 成，而不是花必要的时间与客户在一起。Clonyard 员工也对 Elrig 员工缺乏技术 产品知识表示担忧。 Elrig has retained most of Clonyard's directors.These directors have found it challenging to adjust to Elrig's focus on pursuing market share and recently said,It's as though they don't measure anything else.Every report we get is about market share and the message is always that we need more of it,as quickly as possible.' Elrig 留用了Clonyard 的大部分董事。这些董事们发现，要适应 Elrig 对追求市场 份额的关注具有挑战性，他们最近说，‘他们似乎没有衡量其他任何东西。’我们 收到的每一份报告都是关于市场份额的，其信息总是，我们需要尽快获得更多的 市场份额。 The chief executive officer(CEO)of Elrig was recently told by a management consultant that Elrig should consider using the McKinsey 7S model (Appendix 1)to help with the integration of Clonyard into Elrig’s operation.The management consultant indicated that she felt that Elrig should only focus on the four soft elements in this model for now. GOLDEN EDUCATION Elrig的首席执行官(首席执行官)最近被一位管理顾问告知， Elrig 应该考虑使 用麦肯锡7S 模型(附录1)来帮助将Clonyard整合到Elrig的运营中。管理顾问 表示，她认为Elrig 目前应该只关注这个模式中的四个软因素。 Introduction of an ERPS Elrig and Clonyard are currently utilising different computer systems.It is therefore difficult for staff at all levels of Elrig's operations to obtain access to Clonyard's performance data.The board of Elrig has complained that any information it receives on Clonyard's operations or performance is too late to enable the board to make decisions.The director of operations for the group,for example,has indicated that she does not see any reports on inventory levels at each Clonyard shop until at least three months into the financial year.She has also indicated that Clonyard shops appear to wait too long for goods to be delivered to them from their suppliers. Elrig和 Clonyard目前正在使用不同的计算机系统。因此，Elrig各级业务的工作 人员都难以获得 Clonyard 的业绩数据。董事会抱怨说，它收到的任何关于 Clonyard 运营或业绩的信息都为时太晚，董事会无法做出决定。例如，该集团的 运营总监表示，在财政年度结束前三个月，她才能看到关于每个堆场店库存水平 的报告。她还表示，Clonyard 商店似乎需要等很久才能从供应商那收到货物。 The group sales director indicated that the data he receives on Clonyard's monthly financial performance is at least three weeks late.This offers no opportunity to introduce discounted products at an appropriate time,which is a very common sales approach for Elrig. 集团销售总监表示他至少晚了三周才收到 Clonyard 的月度财务业绩数据，这导 致没有机会在适当的时间给产品打折。打折是 Elrig 的常见销售方法。 Elrig's employees in general have expressed concern that Clonyard's computerised information systems are outdated and that Clonyard's employees do not use the computer system as much as they should.For example,it was reported that it is common practice for a Clonyard employee to place an order for inventory over the telephone and not enter the order onto the computer system until after the order has been delivered. Elrig 的很多员工对 Clonyard 的计算机信息系统已经过时且 Clonyard 的员工没有 像他们应该的那样经常使用计算机系统表示了担心。据报道， Clonyard 的员工通 常会通过电话下订单且直到订单交付后才在计算机系统上输入订单。 The board of Elrig has decided that it needs real time access to Elrig's overall business operations,including Clonyard,and is considering the purchase of an enterprise resource planning system (ERPS).Further,a director of Elrig has indicated:'the use of a shared up-to-date information system such as an ERPS will ensure that the Clonyard operation is completely integrated within the Elrig one.The Clonyard employees will also be delighted with the brand new system.' Elrig董事会认为需要能实时监测 Elrig的整体业务运营(包括 Clonyard), 他们 正在考虑购买一个企业资源规划系统(ERPS) 。 此外，Elrig 的一位主管表示： “使用共享的最新信息系统，如ERPS, 将确保Clonyard 的操作完全集成在Elrig 的信息系统中。Clonyard 的员工也会对这个全新的系统感到高兴。” Appendix 1 StructureSystemsShared valuesStyleStaffStrategySkills Structure Systems Shared values Style Staff Strategy Skills The soft elements are:skills,staff,style and shared values. 软性因素是：技能、员工、风格和共同的价值观。

Q3 一 、 题干解析 1.Company information Roan University(Roan)is based in Teeland,which is a developed country.The government of Teeland has stated that it will cut part of the funding for the university and has made it clear that Roan must develop new replacement income streams.Roan willremain state owned. Roan 大学 (Roan) 位于发达国家 Teeland 。Teeland 政府表示它将削减该大学的 部分资金，并明确表示 Roan 大学必须开发新的替代收入。罗恩将继续为国有大 学。 Saugh University(Saugh)is based in Deeland,which has a developing economy and which is culturally different to Teeland.Saugh's funding is from the government of Deeland and this funding is secure for the foreseeable future.The government of Deeland has indicated that it wants the university to developjoint ventures and alliances with universities in developed countries. Saugh 大学 (Saugh) 位于Deeland,Deeland 为发展中经济体，文化与Teeland 不 同 。Saugh 的资金来自Deeland 政府，这笔资金在可预见的未来是安全的。 Deeland 政府表示，希望该大学与发达国家的大学建立联盟。 Roan and Saugh have recently entered into a joint venture to set up a new university in Deeland.The new university is called RS University(RSU).Roan and Saugh each own 50%of the joint venture and a new purpose-built campus has been constructed.RSU will welcome students within three months Roan 和 Saugh 最近成立了一家合资企业，将在Deeland 建立一所新大学。新大 学被称为RS 大学(RSU) 。Roan 和 Saugh 各自拥有合资企业50%的股份，并且 专门建造的新校园已经建成。RSU 将在三个月内招收新学生。 Details of the joint venture Roan and Saugh have established a joint management board(MB)to manage the long- term and short-term operations of RSU.The MB's membership is 50%from each university,plus at least one government representative from Deeland.The MB meets at least three times per annum and the position of chairman on the MB rotates between Roan and Saugh on a meeting-by-meeting basis. Roan 和 Saugh 成立了一个联合管理委员会 (MB), 负责管理 RSU 的长期和短 期运营。MB的成员来自两所大学，每所大学占比50%,加上至少一名来自Deeland 的政府代表。管理委员会每年至少举行三次会议，委员会主席的职位在Roan 和 Saugh 之间轮流举行会议。 Roan has stated that its aim for the joint venture RSU is 'to internationally expand our provision and lead educational developments in the global arena by enhancing our revenue streams from innovative sources.'Saugh,however,has made it clear that it will view the success of RSU by the quality of the graduates who are produced and by the contribution these graduates make to society. Roan 表示，其成立合资企业 RSU 的目标是“通过增加创新来源来增加的收入， 在国际上扩大我们的人才供应，并在全球范围内引领教育发展。”然而，Saugh 已 经明确表示，它的成功将基于培养的毕业生的质量和这些毕业生对社会的贡献。 Saugh is keen that Roan sends as many home-based staff from Teeland to teach at RSU in Deeland as is possible but Roan would prefer to recruit local staff in Deeland to undertake its teaching obligations at RSU.Roan's teaching staff have voiced concerns about the extensive travel involved to teach at RSU and have also indicated that their work at Roan is likely to suffer if they teach at RSU.Specifically,they feel that they would not be able to effectively undertake their teaching duties,research activities or supervision of students at Roan.Negotiations are currently taking place between the teachers'trade union,which Roan's staff belong to,and management at Roan which could result in all Roan's teaching staff refusing to teach at RSU. Saugh 希望 Roan 从 Teeland 派遣尽可能多的家庭工作人员到Deeland 的 RSU 任 教，但 Roan 更愿意在 Deeland 招聘当地工作人员，以承担其在 RSU 的教学义 务。Roan 的教职员工对在RSU 任教所需的长途旅行表示担忧，并表示如果他们 在 RSU 教书，他们在Roan 的工作可能会受到影响。具体来说，他们觉得自己无 法有效地履行教学职责、研究活动或监督Roan 的学生。Roan 的员工所属的教师 工会和 Roan 的管理层目前正在进行谈判，这可能导致 Roan 的所有教职员工拒 绝在 RSU 任教。 Public view of the joint venture There has been some criticism of the joint venture within the local community in Teeland.A parent of one of the students studying at Roan has written,on behalf of a newly-formed public pressure group,to the local newspaper saying,'All the attention at Roan is on this inappropriate joint venture.My son was told that he could not receive any help or guidance as the staff who could help him were all overseas helping with the development of RSU.His exam results were three weeks late as there was no one there to mark the exams.This is not acceptable.Roan should exist to educate Teeland students primarily.Everything else is secondary.' Membership of the public pressure group is growing. Teeland 当地社区对这家合资企业提出了一些批评。一位在Roan 学习的学生的家 长代表一个新成立的公众压力团体写信给当地报纸说，"Roan 所有的注意力都集 中在这个不合适的合资企业上。我儿子被告知他不能收到任何帮助或指导，因为 可以帮助他的工作人员都在海外帮助 RSU 的发展。他的考试成绩迟到了三个星 期，因为那里没有人给考试打分。这是不可接受的。Roan 的存在应该主要是为 了教育Teeland 的学生。其他一切都是次要的。” 公众压力团体的成员越来越多。 Stakeholder analysis Roan has undertaken an analysis of its stakeholders using Mendelow's matrix.Part of this work is supplied below,along with the justifications for the categorisation of the three stakeholder groups. Roan 利用 Mendelow 矩阵对其利益相关者进行了分析。以下提供了这项工作的 一部分，以及对三个利益相关者群体进行分类的理由。 Government of Teeland-the government would be keen to know of any financial problems or difficulties with the joint venture but,generally,it would belong in segment A so minimal effort should be expended. Teeland 政府—政府很想知道合资企业的任何财务问题或困难，但一般来说，它 属 于A 部分，因此应尽可能少地投入精力。 Roan teachers'trade union-the teachers'trade union's power could be high if it has the backing to recommend to the management of Roan that Roan employees will not travel to or teach at RSU.If Roan can recruit local staff for RSU,the power and interest of the trade union will both be low as there will be little or no need for its involvement. If Roan cannot recruit local staff,then the power and interest of the trade union will both be high and it will fall into category D of being a key player. Roan 教师工会—如果教师工会得到支持，向 Roan 管理层建议 Roan 员工不去 RSU 或在RSU 任教，那么它的权力可能会很高。如果Roan 能够为RSU 招募当 地员工，工会的权力和利益都将很低，因为教师工会几乎没有影响力或根本没有 必要参与。Roan 如果不能招聘当地员工，那么工会的权力和利益都将很高，它 将属于D 类关键角色。 Public pressure group in Teeland the group has a very high level of interest in the joint venture and its power may be determined by its size.If it grows significantly,then its power may become high also.For the present,its power is likely to be low so the group will fall into category B-kept informed. Teeland 的公众压力组织—该组织对合资企业有很高的兴趣，其权力可能由其规 模决定。如果它规模显著增长，那么它的力量也可能变得很高。目前，它的影响 力可能很低，因此该群体将属于B 类—随时了解情况。 二、 问题解析 Required: It is now 1 September 20X5. (a)Discuss the problems that will be encountered in managing and measuring performance in the RSU joint venture.(16 marks) 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 (a) 讨论RSU 合资企业在管理和衡量绩效时会遇到的问题。(16分) 三、答题思路 根据我们知识点中JV 合资企业存在的问题： Objectives of the venture need to be specified and agreed by all parties 合 资 企 业 的 目 标需要明确并得到各方同意 The management structure of the venture needs to be set up 需要建立相应的管理团 队 Performance measurement metrics need to be agreed in advance 业绩评估方式应事 先确定 Reporting of information 需要分享和整合双方信息 Risk management can be difficult 可能有着不同的风险偏好 Sensitive information 对分享商业机密信息存在顾虑 Not possible to specify all future possibilities 在未来可能出现没有预见的新问题 结合题目信息，分别找到业绩管理和业绩评价的问题，每个问题依次论述。每个 点1分，最多16分。 业绩管理的问题： 1目标不一致 2 建立稳定的管理团队 业绩评价的问题： 1 结合案例找信息讨论 Managing performance √Establishing common objectives建立共同目标 先用小标题列举问题，目标一致性问题，Roan 的目标是寻求新的收入来源。Saugh 创办合资企业的主要目的是提高其在本国乃至全球的知名学府地位。两个大学目 标截然不同，Roan和Saugh 对RSU也就存在目标不一致，产生冲突，关注财务 会导致质量不好，对RSU的业绩管理出现问题。 · Different objectives The initial problem is establishing its objectives and goals and the aims of each university for the joint venture of RSU are different. 两所大学对RSU 合资企业的目标是不同的。 Roan: ·Roan's main purpose for undertaking the joint venture is to find a new revenue stream. Roan 成立合资企业的主要目的是寻找新的收入来源。 ·Roan's focus will be on maximising that return rather than maximising revenue to the disregard of cost. Roan 的重点将是最大化回报，而不是无视成本而最大化收入。 ·In terms of performance management,finance and resource utilisation and consumption are likely to form the core of Roan's management system. 在绩效管理方面，财务、资源利用和消耗领域将构成Roan 管理系统的核 心 。 Saugh: ·Saugh's main purpose is to enhance its status within its own country,and perhaps globally,as a renowned institution of learning. Saugh 创办合资企业的主要目的是提高其在本国乃至全球的知名学府地 位 。 ·The focus for Saugh in terms of how performance of RSU is managed is likely to be on the reputation of Saugh,staff development and the destinations of its graduates. Saugh 在 RSU 绩效管理方面的重点可能是 Saugh 的声誉、员工发展和毕 业生的就业。 结论：两所大学这些目标是矛盾的。 Focusing on the financial aspects can lead to a lack of investment which may damage the quality of the joint venture's provision and,ultimately,the contribution that the graduates of RSU can make to society. 专注于财务方面可能会导致投资不足，损害合资企业的供应质量，并最终损 害 RSU 毕业生对社会的贡献。 √Lack of stable leadership 缺乏稳定的领导 先用小标题列举问题，缺乏稳定的领导的问题， RSU 的董事长采用轮换制必 然无法带来稳定的管理者，因双方目标不一致，因此Roan 和 Saugh 大学的领 导者的管理行为也会不同。 ·The rotational nature of the chairman of the management board(MB)will almost ensure that there is a lack of stable leadership. 管理委员会主席的轮换性质导致缺乏稳定的领导。 ·The chairman is likely to be acting more in the interests of their own university than in the interests of the joint venture. 董事长的行为很可能更符合自己大学的利益，而不是合资企业的利益。 ·The inclusion of representatives from Deeland would clearly tip the balance in favour of Saugh. 加入 Deeland 的代表显然会使天平朝着有利于Saugh 的方向倾斜。 ·This is likely to lead to a loss of control for Roan which would clearly have an effect on the manner in which the joint venture is managed in terms of its performance. 这可能会导致Roan 失去控制，这显然会对合资企业的业绩管理方式产生 影响。 Measuring performance 业绩评价指标 √Roan: 基于财务回报的目标，所设定的财务指标。这里可以猜测Roan 大 学 可能衡量的指标有哪些。 ·Given the challenging funding environment in Teeland,Roan will be focused on the financial return of RSU. 鉴于Teeland充满挑战的融资环境，Roan 将专注于RSU的财务回报。 ·such as return on investment and operating surplus. 如投资回报率和经营利润。 ·Roan's focus is likely to be specifically on the fees charged,student numbers, costs incurred and on return on investment overall. Roan 的重点可能是收费、学生人数、产生的成本和总体投资回报。 ·that it would prefer a return to be achieved in the short term as well as over the long term. 更希望在短期和长期内都能实现回报。 ·Roan may therefore be keen to spend a significant amount on advertising,to boost student numbers in the short term,rather than wait for the reputation of RSU to grow by word of mouth. Roan 可能热衷于在广告上花费大量资金，在短期内提高学生人数，而不 是等待RSU 的声誉通过口碑增长。 √Saugh: 基于创造知名学府的目标，所设定的业绩指标。这里可以猜测Saugh 大学可能衡量的指标有哪些。 ·Saugh is unlikely to be interested in assessing the performance of RSU with any traditional financial metrics. Saugh 不太可能有兴趣用任何传统的财务指标来评估RSU 的业绩。 ·this may place Saugh in direct conflict with Roan with regard to many decisions. 这可能会使 Saugh 在许多决策上与Roan 发生直接冲突。 · 举 例 ：Saugh may feel that enhancing classroom technology in RSU is necessary without understanding that this would represent a significant further investment for Roan 例如，Saugh 可能认为加强RSU 的课堂技术是必要的，但对 Roan 来说是 一项重大的投资。 PLATINUM ·Saugh will be more focused on the quality of the students that are admitted to RSU,their performance whilst at university and their occupation and perhaps salary level on leaving the university. Saugh 将更加关注被 RSU 录取的学生的质量、他们在大学期间的表现、 他们的职业，及毕业工资水平。 √ 总 结 ：Roan will be more focused on recruiting as many students as possible whereas Saugh will be more focused on the grades that these students have achieved either at school or in previous study. Roan 将更加专注于招收尽可能多的学生，而Saugh 将更加专注这些学生在学 校或之前的学习中取得的成绩。 √ 列举并对比：两所大学业绩指标的不同，以及带来的影响。 ·Both universities willbe interested in how the students perform at RSU. 这两所大学都将对学生在RSU 的表现感兴趣。 ·Roan's reputation would suffer significantly,if it were to accept students who failed its programmes in large numbers. 如果 Roan 接受大量未通过其课程的学生，其声誉将受到严重影响。 ·However,Roan will be less focused on the level of excellence achieved by students of RSU than Saugh. 但是，Roan 将不会像Saugh 那样关注RSU 学生所取得的卓越水平。 ·Saugh may be keen to devote significant resource to developing strong links with local industry to ensure that RSU graduates are equipped with the correct skills.Saugh 可能热衷于投入大量资源来发展与当地企业行业的牢固联系， 以确保RSU 毕业生具备合适的技能。 ·Saugh will also want to devote significant resource to monitoring and measuring how the graduates perform after graduation. Saugh 还希望投入大量资源来监测和衡量毕业生毕业后的表现。 ·Saugh will definitely be motivated to measure how many of Roan's staff will teach at RSU. Saugh 会有动力衡量Roan 有多少员工将在RSU 任教。

Q3(b) 二、 问题解析 Required: (b)For each of the three stakeholder groups,recommend and justify an appropriate performance measure which could be used by Roan.(9 marks) 对于三个利益相关者群体中的每一个，建议并证明 Roan 可以使用的适当绩效衡 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM量标准。(9分) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 对于每个利益相关者群体： 建议指标-1分 衡量指标的合理性—最多2分 最多9分 √Government of Teeland Teeland政府 Teeland 政府不关心 RSU 的质量，只关心财务状况。因此指标为Roan 的资本结 构。 ·The government of Teeland is only likely to be interested in the performance of RSU if there is a significant failing. 只有在RSU 出现重大失误的情况下，Teeland 政府才可能对其关注。 ·e.g.:financial default through overspend or a scandal involving staff,the liquidity of Roan. 如由于超支导致的财务违约，员工的丑闻， Roan 的流动性。 ·Measure:the cash surplus of Roan,Roan的现金盈余 ·should be considered alongside the long-term liquidity of Roan 这项指标应该与Roan 的长期流动性一起考虑。 ·any long-term debt to fund the joint venture,and its capital structure.政府想了解 Roan 是否承担了任何长期债务来为合资企业提供资金，以及它在Roan 资本 中的总体比例结构。 √Teachers'trade union 教师工会 工会关心员工有没有被公平对待，因此指标是课时量。 ·Measure:the number of programmes or courses that are being offered in RSU. 教师工会将对RSU 提供的课程数量感兴趣。 ·The more programmes that are offered,the more likely it is that Roan staff willbe required by their employer to teach in Deeland. 提供的课程越多，Roan 员工就越有可能被雇主要求在Deeland 任教。 ·Fewer courses would increase the possibility that local provision for teaching could be found. 课程的减少将增加在当地提供教学的可能性。 √Public pressure group 公共压力组织 公共压力组织关心教师有没有花费时间在课程上，因此指标是 Roan 的员工在 Deeland 花费了多少时间。 ·how much time is being spent by staff of Roan,perhaps teaching staff in particular rather than those of a higher level of management,in Deeland. Roan 的员工在Deeland 花费了多少时间，尤其是教职员工。 ·Measure:this figure probably presented in absolute terms and measured month by month to allow for comparison and trend analysis. 以绝对值表示，并逐月测量，以便进行比较和趋势分析。 ·The higher this figure becomes the more active the pressure group is likely to become and the more the membership of the pressure group is likely to grow. 这个数字越高，压力团体就越可能变得活跃，压力团体的成员也就越可能增 加。

Q1 一 、题干解析 Company information Achilty Retail(Achilty)is a stock exchange listed business which sells a range of clothes from a website to consumers in Beeland.Achilty started as a chain of clothing shops but has slowly transitioned into a website only business,and sold its last physical shop recently. Achilly Retail(Achilly) 是一家已经在证券交易所上市了的企业，它通过网站向 比 Beeland 的消费者销售一系列的服装。Achilly 最初是一家服装连锁店，但后来 慢慢转变为只在网站上经营，它最近刚卖掉了最后一家实体店。 Achilty's mission is ‘to deliver long-term returns to shareholders through a combination of sustainable growth in earnings per share and payment of cash dividends'.This mission will be achieved by the following subsidiary objectives: -Improving product ranges; -Increasing the number of customers and their individual spend; -Focusing on customer service;and -Improving profitability by efficient cost control in purchasing and inventory management. Achilly 的使命是“通过每股收益和现金股息的可持续增长，为股东带来长期回 报”。这项使命将通过以下附属目标来实现： -扩大产品范围 ； -增加客户数量及他们的个人支出； -专注于客户服务； -通过采购和库存管理中的有效成本控制来提高盈利能力。 The board feels that while performance has been good compared to other retailers in general,it is lagging behind the growth of the online retail clothing sector.It is felt that many of the systems and processes have yet to adjust to the new reality of web-only business.As a result,the chief executive officer (CEO)has been reviewing the business in order to identify areas for improvement.She has focused on current performance reporting and the more effective use of the data which Achilty collects. 董事会认为，尽管公司与其他零售商相比，总体表现良好，但仍落后于在线零售 服装行业的增长。他们认为，许多系统和流程尚未适应纯网络业务的新现状。因 此，首席执行官(CEO) 一直在审查业务，以确定需要改进的领域。她专注于当 前的绩效报告和Achilty 收集的数据的更有效使用。 Current performance reporting At a recent board meeting,there was a debate as to whether performance towards this mission and its subsidiary objectives are being usefully measured.The director raising the concern believed that any fault might lie in the board's performance report for annual strategic review,although the CEO is fairly happy with the report.Therefore, the CEO wants a full evaluation of the current performance report (see Appendix 1 for the most recent example)in light of this debate and also,more generally,in terms of the best practice for reporting performance.There is no need to suggest new indicators. 在最近的一次董事会会议上，就是否有效地衡量了这项任务及其附属目标的执行 情况进行了讨论。有董事认为，尽管首席执行官对年度战略评估的董事会绩效报 告相当满意，但某些错误可能存在于该报告中。因此，首席执行官希望，根据报 告绩效的最佳实践，对当前绩效报告进行全面评估(最新示例见附注1)。不需 要提出新的指标。 Other proposed performance indicators At this board meeting and as a result of the disagreement about performance reporting, a number of new performance indicators were discussed.The CEO wants an assessment of these indicators,including their calculation if that is possible from the information supplied,and also,whether and how they link to the mission and subsidiary objectives. 由于对绩效报告存在分歧，这次董事会会议上讨论了一些新的绩效指标。首席执 行官希望对这些指标进行评估，包括根据所提供的信息进行计算(如果可能的 话),以及这些指标是否以及如何与使命及附属目标联系起来。 The indicators and additional information are given in Appendix 2. 指标和附加信息见附注2。 Role of the management accountant The CEO recently introduced a new enterprise resource planning system(ERPS).This system will provide a single database,operating across the whole organisation,to replace systems which have been built up in each function around Achilty's basic website.The functions,for example,purchasing,warehousing and fulfilment,and sales and marketing,willnow allwork on a common technology platform.Her plan is to move more decision making to individual managers of cross-functional teams who will work on all aspects of a given selection of product lines,such as women's or sports clothing.For example,purchasing will now liaise more closely with sales and marketing in order to ensure that the best possible and most profitable product range is available.It is hoped that this will reduce the number of senior managers and so flatten the organisational hierarchy. 首席执行官最近推出了一个新的企业资源规划系统。该系统将提供一个单一的数 据库，在整个组织中运行，以取代围绕Achilly 网站每个功能建立的系统。采购、 仓储和履约、销售和营销等职能现在都将在同一个技术平台上运作。她的计划是 将更多的决策权交给跨职能团队的经理们，他们将负责特定产品线的各个方面， 如女装或运动服。例如，采购部门现在将与销售和营销部门更密切地联系，以确 保提供尽可能好的、最有利可图的产品系列。她希望这将减少高级管理人员的数 量，从而使组织层级扁平化。 The CEO has been reading about the work of Burns and Scapens.She would like you to explain how you see the role of the management accountant changing in the current business environment both broadly and with specific application of the three drivers of change identified by Burns and Scapens to Achilty 首席执行官一直在阅读有关Burns 和 Scapens 的工作。她希望你解释一下，你是 如何看待管理会计师在当前商业环境中的角色变化的，无论是从广义上还是从 Burns 和 Scapens 对 Achilty 确定的三个变革驱动因素的具体应用来看。 Data warehouse In order to catch up with the rest of the online retail sector,the CEO believes that the key step will be to effectively use the vast amount of customer data which the website collects.In a further step forward in the use of information technology at Achilty,she plans to create a data warehouse and use its information to help to achieve the objectives of Achilty.The data warehouse will collect data from customer activities on the website and also,from social media. 为了追赶其他在线零售业的公司，首席执行官认为，关键的一步将是有效利用网 站收集的大量客户数据。在 Achilty 进一步使用信息技术的过程中，她计划创建 一个数据库，并利用其信息帮助实现 Achilty 的目标。数据库将从网站上的客户 活动以及社交媒体中收集数据。 Given the $50m cost,she wants an assessment of the opportunities and risks which such an expensive system would present. 考虑到其5000万美元的成本，她希望对如此昂贵的系统所带来的机遇和风险进 行评估。 Appendix 1 Strategic performance report for Achilty for year ended 30 June 20X5 Achilly 截至20X5 年6月30日的年度战略绩效报告 Financial performance by product area Women Men Children Sports Total Total Change on previous year 20X5 20X5 20X5 20X5 20X5 20X4 $m $m $m $m $m $m Revenue 85 ·1 53 ·2 42-5 31-9 212 ·7 192 ·6 10-40% Gross profit 44-6 25-6 23 ·3 16 ·4 109 ·9 106 ·7 3 ·00% Operating costs: Staff costs 45 ·3 44 ·1 2 ·70% Marketing 17 ·8 17 ·8 0 ·00% Other operating costs 27-6 25 ·6 7 ·80% Operating profit 19-2 19 ·2 0 ·0% Eamings per share(cents) 24-8 24 ·8 0 ·00% Dividend paid per share(cents) 2-5 2 ·5 0 ·00% Customer response Number of customer accounts('00Os) 1,014 973 4 ·20% Percentage of customer accounts with at least one purchase in the year 58% 61% -4 ·90% Average spend per customer purchase($) 122 ·3 108 ·4 12 ·80% Internal processes Deliveries within promised deadline 97% 97% 0 ·00% Number of product lines sold 2,104 2,107 -0 · 10% Commentary: earningsOverall performance is satisfactory as the business has maintained its per share and dividend. earnings Revenue is up by 10·4%on the previous year. The number of customer accounts and average spend per purchase have increased in the year. Deliveries to customers continue to be made within promised deadlines to a significant extent. 评 论： 整体业绩令人满意，因为该公司维持了其每股收益和股息水平。 收入比上一年增长了10.4%。 今年，客户账户数量和每次购买的平均支出都有所增加。 依旧对大部分的客户按时交付产品。 Appendix 2 Other proposed performance indicators: 1.Return on capital employed(ROCE) 2.Total shareholder return(TSR),which comes from share price change and dividend yield 3.Inventory days 4.Receivables days 被提议的其他绩效指标： 1.使用资本回报率 2.股东总回报 (TSR ), 受股价变化和股息率影响 3.存货周转天数 4.应收账款周转天数 Supplementary information for Achilty: Achilly的补充信息： Assets and liabilities Non-current assets Current assets Inventory Receivables Cash Current liabilities Non-currentliabilities Net assets Equity D 20X5 $m 54 8 ·7 1-6 0 10 ·3 15-5 EI21 27 ·8 EI 27 ·8 20X4 $m 52 7-9 1-5 0 9 ·4 14 22 25 ·4 25 ·4 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 二、Requirement
explanation_zh: It is now 1 September 20X5. Write a report to the chief executive officer(CEO)of Achilty to respond to her instructions for work on the following areas: (i)Current performance reporting . (15 marks) (ii)Other proposed performance indicators. (8 marks) iii)The changing role of the management accountant. (12 marks) (iv)The opportunities and risks of introducing a new data warehouse.(11 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the format,style and structure of the discussion of your answer. (4 marks) (50 marks) 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 向 Achilty 的首席执行官 (CEO) 写一份报告，回应她对以下领域的工作指示： (i) 当前绩效报告。(15分) ON ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (ii) 被提议的其他绩效指标。(8分) (iii) 管理会计角色的变化。(12分) (本小问对应知识点2021年9月从考纲中 移除，考生不需掌握) (iv) 引入新数据库所带来的机会和风险。(11分) 你答案的讨论形式、风格和结构将获得专业分数。(4分) 三、答题思路： 这道题目是需要写一份报告，所以需要拥有报告的基础格式 Report heading 四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant /A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date: 指定日期/考试日期标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据 section A 中第一个问题内容分为以下2种情况 评估 performance report——Performance reporting+management issues+ 公司名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+ 公司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结 section A 中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduction 能够运用连接词描述 Section A 中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:The CEO of Achilty Retail(Achilty) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM From:An Accountant Date:Sep 20X5 Subject:Performance reporting and management issues at Achilty This report evaluates the current performance report used by the board for strategic review.Next,certain proposed performance indicators are evaluated by calculation and for their fitness in measuring the achievement of the company's objectives.Third, given the new information system proposed,the factors driving change in the role of the management accountant are considered.Finally,the opportunities and risks associated with the introduction of a data warehouse system are assessed. (i)Current performance reporting 本小问的要求为：根据报告绩效的最佳实践，对当前绩效报告进行全面评估(最 新示例见附注1)。 考生可根据从以下3个维度搭建答题框架： 1.讨论当前的绩效报告是否有助于评估公司目标实现情况(最多可得8分); 2.讨论符合报告最佳实践的其他要点(最多可得5分); 3.针对附注1中的评论展开讨论(最多可得5分)。 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 1.讨论当前的绩效报告是否有助于评估公司目标实现情况： 这部分答题逻辑为先拆分目标然后进行具体讨论： √ 拆分目标： √Achilly 的使命可以分解为一个主要目标和多个附属目标。主要目标是： 通过每股收益的和现金股息的可持续增长，为股东带来长期回报。 ■ long-term returns to shareholders ·through a combination of sustainable growth in earnings per share and payment of cash dividends √ 这将通过以下方式(附属目标)实现： -扩大产品范围； 一增加客户数量及他们的个人支出； -专注于客户服务； -通过采购和库存管理中的有效成本控制来提高盈利能力。 -Improving product ranges; -Increasing the number of customers and their individual spend; -Focusing on customer service;and -Improving profitability by efficient cost control in purchasing and inventory management. √ 具体讨论： √ 该 报 告 确 实 提 供 了 许 多 有 助 于 评 估 公 司 目 标 实 现 情 况 的 信 息 。 然 而 ， 它 并不完整 ， 目标也不总是明确的 。 ONLINE DELVERY·PLATINUM ■ does provide much information which is useful ■ not complete or always clear on all objectives 1)主要目标： √ 关于主要目标的信息以每股收益和股息的增长数字表示。然而，从报告 中无法判断其可持续性。 ·presented as the growth figures for EPS and dividends " sustainability of these is not clear from the report √股东的投资回报率的可能会对整体业绩有一个更简单、更清晰的评估。 然而，如果没有预测的数字，很难判断这些是否是“长期”回报。 · 优 点 ：return on capital for shareholders may give them a simpler and clearer view · 缺 点 ：without forecast figures it is difficult to give a view of whether these are 'long term'returns 2)附属目标1: √产品范围是否扩大可以从收入增长和其他与客户角度有关的指标推断出 来，例如活跃客户账户的数量及其平均支出。 ■ be inferred from revenue growth other measures relating to the customer perspective 举例：number of active customer accounts and their average spend √ 缺点：这些指标并不精确，因为它们也受到服务水平的影响。 ·not precise as they are also affected by service levels 3)附属目标2: √ 该目标可通过客户响应数进行明确的衡量。然而，与其只寻求增加账户 数量，不如衡量活跃账户的数量，否则资源可能会被投放在从不购买的 账户持有人上。 · 优 点 ：clearly measured under the customer response heading · 缺 点 ：rather than seeking to only increase the number of accounts · 建 议 ：more useful to measure the active accounts otherwise resources may be poured into account holders who never purchase 4)附属目标3: √ 该目标可间接的通过收入增长和第2点所述的指标(即收入增长和其他 与客户角度有关的指标)来衡量。 ·indirectly measured ·through revenue growth and the measures noted in point 2 √ 目前报告中没有与网站易用性相关的网站体验相关指标。网站体验是与 客户的主要联系点，应给予更多关注。 · 缺 点 ：no indicator for the website experience 举例：relating to its ease of use · 建 议 ：the primary contact point with customers it should receive more ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUMattention ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM 5)附属目标4: √ 该目标的实现情况可通过采购毛利率来进行部分的衡量。但目前报告中 没有提供库存控制指标，例如与过时或注销有关的指标。 · 建 议 ：partially measured through gross margin for purchasing · 缺 点 ：no inventory control indicators offered, 举例：relating to obsolescence or write-offs 2.讨论符合报告最佳实践的其他要点： 1) √ 优点：该报告用类似于平衡记分卡(财务、客户和内部流程)的方法从 不同的角度进行评估是有用的。 ■ report is usefully broken into different perspectives similar to the balanced scorecard √ 缺点：目前报告没有提到创新和学习，这对于一个依赖技术的公司来说 是不寻常的，但考虑到这(创新和学习)不是一个战略目标，这似乎是 合理的。 ·no mention is made of innovation and learning ..unusual for a company dependent on technology ·but it is not a strategic objective and so this seems reasonable

stem_zh: 2) √优点：报告的财务部分将销售分为四个类型，鉴于Achilty 成立了团队， 应该评估董事会是否要求评估团队绩效，或者按产品类型对绩效进行更 广泛的评估。 ·financial part of the report breaks the sales into four areas ·be assessed whether the board requires team performance or this broader view of the performance by product types √缺点：应考虑到不同类型的盈利能力不一样，如果每种产品类型足够重 要，则需考虑单独披露并计算其营业利润。 ·operating margins should be calculated for each product type ■ if they are considered important enough to warrant separate disclosure

3) √有效的成本控制是通过经营利润率来衡量的，可能无法将其他经营成本 分配到特定领域来计算每个领域的利润率。 ·Efficient cost control is measured through operating margins ·may not be possible to allocate other operating costs to specific areas to give margins for each area √缺点：似乎没有使用详细的运营成本，目标中也没有提及这些成本，因 此这些成本可能都被归入“其他运营成本”下。 no use made of the detailed operating costs nor are they mentioned in the objectives ■ these might all be taken under one summary heading ‘other operating costs' √建议：成本控制非常重要，那么预算差异可能有助于董事会对其进行监 控。 ·variances to budget may assist the board in monitoring and controlling them

4) √财务和非财务指标的结合为董事会判断客户满意度提供了一个很好的视 角。 ■ mix of financial and non-financial indicators gives the board a good vantage point to judge customer satisfaction √缺点：缺乏行业增长和利润率等外部基准可能解释了为什么其他类似公 司的表现优于Achilly。 ■ the lack of external benchmarks · 举 例 ：industry growth and margins might explain why other similar companies are outperforming Achilty 3.针对附注1中的评论展开讨论： √ 总体角度：目前的评论简明扼要，并具有合理的优先顺序。然而，它并 没有涉及所有目标，且评论有时很含糊。 ·succinct and in a sensible priority order given the order of Achilty's objectives · 缺 点 ：does not address all of the objectives;the comments are sometimes vague 1)第 一条评论： √ 确实谈到了主要目标，但整体业绩令人满意这一说法似乎值得怀疑，因 为目前业绩是静态的(相较于去年没有增长)。 · 优 点 ：does address the primary objective · 缺 点 ：the claim that performance is satisfactory...performance is static seems questionable 2)第二条评论： √ 通过销售增长来衡量产品系列的吸引力，这似乎是一个合理的财务指标。 ■ measures the attractiveness of the product range through the sales growth ..appears a reasonable financial measure 3)第三条评论： √ 这与客户满意度间接相关。客户满意度难以衡量。然而，随着销售额的 增长，关于平均消费和客户数量增长的评论似乎表明了满意度。 ·indirectly related to customer satisfaction.….difficult to measure ·the comment about average spend and growing number of customers appear to indicate satisfaction √ 建议：更好的衡量标准可能会是活跃账户的数量，而不是所有账户的数 量 。 ■ a better measure might consider the number of active accounts rather than all accounts √ 建议：与每次购买的平均支出相比，某时期每位客户的平均支出更能衡 量客户满意度。 ·Average spend per customer in the period ·a better measure of customer satisfaction than average spend per purchase 4)最后一条评论： √ 交货时间的可被视为衡量客户满意度的指标。这意味着与效率有关的最 终目标没有得到评论。 ■ the customer satisfaction measurement ·the final objective relating to efficiency is not commented upon (ii)Other proposed performance indicators 本小问要求根据附注2评估被提议的其他绩效指标，包括根据所提供的信息进行 计算(如果可能的话),以及评估这些指标是否以及如何与使命及附属目标联系 起来。附注2中提及的绩效指标有4个，答题时应先进行相关计算(每点1分), 然后结合计算结果从ROCE、TSR、Inventory days、Receivables days这4个维度 (每个维度最多2分)进行讨论。 √ 计算： 20X5 20X4 ROCE(operating profit/(total assets - current liabilities)) 39 ·3% 40 ·5% Inventory days((inventory/cost of sales)x365) 31 34 Receivables days((receivables/revenue)x 365) 2.7 2.8 √ROCE: √ 指标意义：投资回报率 (ROCE) 是企业用来确定向资本提供者提供的 整体回报的指标。 ·a measure used by businesses to identify the return provided to the capital providers overall √ 应 用 ： 在Achilly, 主要目标与股东回报有关，因此权益净利率 (ROE) 可能是一个更好的选择。 ·primary objective relates specifically to shareholder returns ■ return on equity may be a better alternative. √ 缺 点 ： 对 于 像Achilly 这样严重依赖无形资产的公司来说，这 (ROE) 可 能不是一个特别有用的衡量标准。 ·may not be a particularly useful measure for a company such as Achilty which depends heavily on intangible assets √TSR √ 指标意义：股东总回报(TSR) 作为主要利益相关者的良好总结，将很 适合用于衡量主要目标的实现情况。 ·fit very well with the primary objective as a good summary for the principal stakeholders. √缺点：由于附注中并没有提供股价来衡量TSR 所需的资本损益和股息收 益率，因此无法计算TSR。 ·not possible to calculate TSR as no share price has been supplied in order to gauge the capital gain/loss nor the dividend yield √Inventory days √ 指标意义：库存天数可衡量持有的库存量，较低的库存量意味着需要的
