Q2 一、题干解析 Company information Totaig manufactures high quality and innovative small electrical appliances such as hairdryers and vacuum cleaners.All of the board of directors,who are the strategic decision makers,have always worked in the business and are members of the Totaig family.Most of the operational managers joined as factory workers when the business started and have taken on more responsibilities as the business has grown.Totaig 制造 高质量和创新的小型电器，如吹风机和吸尘器。董事会的所有成员，他们是战略 决策者，一直在公司工作并且都是Totaig 家族的成员。大多数运营经理在公司创 立时作为工人加入，并随着业务的增长承担了更多责任。 Totaig has basic and outdated IT systems for a business of its complexity and has always used traditional financial performance measures such as return on investment (ROI)and operating profit margin. Totaig 拥有基本而过时的 IT 系统，难以满足其 复杂性业务的需要，并且一直采用传统的财务绩效指标，如投资回报率 (ROI) 和营业利润率。 Totaig has historically had few competitors and the directors have focused on improving financial results from one year to the next,with little long-term planning.A number of overseas competitors have,however,recently entered Totaig's market.It is estimated that,within one year,these competitors will be able to produce at a similar unit cost to Totaig and that within three to five years,the quality of the competitors' products will be comparable to the current quality of Totaig's products.Totaig may have to invest heavily in product development and make acquisitions in the future in order to compete effectively. Totaig 历史上竞争对手较少，董事会一直专注于从一年到下一年改善财务业绩， 缺乏长期规划。然而，最近有一些海外竞争对手进入了Totaig 的市场。估计在一 年内，这些竞争对手将能够以类似的单位成本生产产品，而在三到五年内，竞争 对手产品的质量将与 Totaig目前的产品质量相媲美。为了有效竞争，Totaig 可能 需要大力投资产品开发并进行收购。 Value based management(VBM) A consultant has recently told the directors that implementing VBM may help Totaig to respond to the increase in competition over the next one to five years.The consultant has defined VBM as 'the alignment of the business strategy,management processes and culture on maximising shareholder wealth by focusing on key drivers of value’.The directors have accepted this as a reasonable definition of VBM and most of them now agree that VBM would be useful,though others are not yet convinced. 一位顾问最近告诉董事们，实施VBM 可以帮助Totaig 应对未来一到五年内竞争 的增加。顾问将VBM 定义为“通过关注价值的关键驱动因素，使业务战略、管 理流程和文化达到最大化股东财富的协同”。董事们接受了这个合理的VBM 定 义，大多数人现在同意VBM 会有所帮助，尽管还有一些人不太确信。 The directors have,however,asked you for further advice on one aspect of the implementation of VBM at Totaig.At her recent presentation,the consultant presented a slide(Appendix 1)showing the four steps in implementing VBM.The directors want your advice on how to implement Step 2,which is defining performance targets. Your advice should focus on the following four areas: □ Selection of appropriate measures and targets. □ Timescales to which the targets should relate. □ Management levels(strategic and operational)in the business to which the targets should relate. □ Difficulties in measuring and managing performance using VBM. 然而，董事们向您寻求关于在Totaig 实施VBM 的一个方面的进一步建议。在她 最近的演示中，顾问呈现了一张幻灯片(附件1),显示了实施VBM 的四个步 骤。董事们希望您就实施 VBM 的第二步，即定义绩效目标，提供建议。您的建 议应集中在以下四个方面： □选择合适的衡量标准和目标。 □ 目标应关联到的时间范围。 □ 业务中应与目标相关的管理层次(战略和运营)。 □ 使用VBM 进行绩效衡量和管理时可能遇到的困难。 Measuring value The directors are unsure of a suitable financial performance indicator for them to use to measure whether Totaig is creating value.As an illustration,they have asked you to evaluate,by calculating economic value added(EVATM),whether Totaig has generated value for the year to 30 June 20X5.You should use the financial information given in Appendix 2,and advise on the difficulties of using EVATM as a performance indicator at Totaig. 董事们不确定用于衡量Totaig 是否创造价值的合适财务绩效指标。作为示例，他 们要求您通过计算经济附加值 (EVAT) 来评估 Totaig 是否在截至20X5 年 6 月 30日的一年内创造了价值。您应使用附件2中提供的财务信息，并就在 Totaig 使用EVA 作为绩效指标可能遇到的困难提供建议。 二、问题解析 Required: It is now 1 September 20X5. (a)Advise the directors on the implementation of Step 2 of VBM as requested.(15 marks) 要 求 ： 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 (a) 根据要求为董事们提供有关实施VBM 的第二步的建议。 (15分) (b)Evaluate both whether Totaig has created value and the difficulties of using EVATM as a performance indicator at Totaig.(10 marks) (b) 评估 Totaig 是否创造了价值以及在Totaig 使 用 EVATM作为绩效指标时可能遇 到的困难。 ( 1 0 分 ) Appendix 1 Four steps in implementing VBM Step1-Produce a strategy for maximising value Step 2-Define performance targets Step 3-Create a plan to achieve the targets Appendix 2 Income statement for the year to 30 June 20X5 $'000 Operating profit 10,000 Interest expense(1,500) Profit before tax 8,500 Tax at 22% Profit after tax Notes: (1,870) 6,630 During the year,$450,000 of advertising cost which will generate sales in future periods was expensed to the income statement. The allowance for doubtful debts at the end of the period was $300,000,a reduction of $200,000 from the beginning of the period. The capital employed at the beginning of the period was $88,944,000. Totaig's after-tax weighted average cost of capital(WACC)is currently 9%.The company is financed by a mixture of equity and fixed and floating rate loans. The directors are considering changing Totaig's policies for the depreciation of non-current assets for the year ending 30 June 20X6. 注意事项： 在本年度，未来期间将产生销售的广告费用为450,000美元，已计入损益表。 期末的坏账准备为300,000美元，较期初减少200,000美元。 期初资本投入为88,944,000美元。 EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM Totaig 目前的税后加权平均资本成本 (WACC) 为9%。该公司的资金来自股权 和固定利率及浮动利率贷款的混合。 董事们正在考虑修改 Totaig截至20X6 年6月30日的非流动资产折旧政策。 三、答案解析 该题问题在题目背景当中， (a)小问需要解决的问题有四个方面： □选择合适的衡量标准和目标。 □目标应关联到的时间范围。 □业务中应与目标相关的管理层次(战略和运营)。 □ 使 用VBM 进行绩效衡量和管理时可能遇到的困难。 (a) √Selection of Appropriate Measures and Targets: 选择适当的衡量标准和目标的关键要点： 1.Value drivers like unit production cost and product quality create long-term value for Totaig. 价值驱动因素如单位生产成本和产品质量为Totaig 创造长期价值。 2.Targets should encompass both financial and non-financial aspects to ensure a balanced approach. 目标应涵盖财务和非财务方面，以确保平衡的方法。 3.Existing targets like ROI and operating margin are backward-looking and may hinder long-term investments. 现有的目标如投资回报率 (ROI) 和营业利润率是向后看的，可能阻碍了长 期投资。 4.Including targets related to product quality prevents overemphasis on cost-cutting at the expense of quality. 包括与产品质量相关的目标可以防止过分强调降低成本而损害质量。 √Time scale 时间范围 1.Totaig must set short-term and long-term targets,which should be linked together,for key value drivers 设定短期和长期目标，并且与关键价值驱动因素关联起来 2.Short-term:Competitors will be able to produce at a similar unit cost within a year,short-term target would reduce unit production costs within that timescale 短期：设定短期控制成本目标，应对竞争对手一年内实现低成本生产的压 力 3.Long-term:Totaig should set longer-term targets relating to quality 长期：设定质量相关长期目标，应对竞争对手可能的未来质量的发展优势 invest heavily in product development and make acquisitions 可以通过投入产品研发或者收购来实现 √Levels in the business and their related targets: 公司中的不同层次和相关目标： 1.Operational managers control unit cost of production and product quality targets. 运营经理控制生产单位成本和产品质量目标。 2.Directors,as strategic decision-makers,oversee targets related to potential future acquisitions. 董事会成员作为战略决策者，监督与潜在未来收购相关的目标。 √Difficulties in implementing VBM: 实施 VBM 时面临的困难：
1. 价值驱动因素： Totaig needs reliable information and may face challenges identifying value drivers due to outdated IT systems. Totaig 需要可靠的信息，可能会因为过时的信息技术系统而难以确定价值驱 动因素。
2. 信息：Implementing VBM may require substantial IT investments,potentially exceeding benefits. 实施VBM 可能需要大量的信息技术投资，潜在的成本可能超过了收益。
3. 管理者的经验：Operational managers may lack VBM experience,necessitating training for understanding and achieving targets. 运营经理可能缺乏VBM 经验，需要培训以理解和实现目标。
4. 员工：A cultural shift is required for all employees to prioritize shareholder value creation. 所有员工需要进行文化转变，以优先考虑股东价值的创造。

5. 高级管理者：Some directors may be skeptical of the usefulness of VBM. 一些董事可能对 VBM 的实用性持怀疑态度。 (b)EVA Calculation: Profit after tax Advertising costs expenses Decrease in allowance for doubtful debts Interest net of tax(1,500x78%) NOPAT $'000 6,630 450 (200) 1,170 8,050 Opening capital employed Opening allowance for doubtful debt Adjusted opening capital employed 88,944 500 89,444 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION NOPAT 8,050 After-tax WACCxadjusted capital employed(9%x89,444)(8,050) EVA 0 Since EVAis zero,Totaig neither created nor destroyed value. 由 于EVA 为零，Totaig 既没有创造也没有破坏价值。 (b)Difficulties of Using EVA as a Performance Indicator: 作为绩效指标使用EVA 时的困难：
1. 资金成本：Cost of capital may be challenging to reliably measure and can change over time. 资本成本可能难以可靠地测量，且会随时间变化。
2. 财务结构：Changes in Totaig's financial structure may lead to fluctuations in its weighted average cost of capital(WACC). Totaig 财务结构的变化可能导致其加权平均资本成本 (WACC) 波动。
3. 经济折旧：Economic depreciation estimation can be complex,and potential policy changes may affect EVATM comparability. 经济折旧估算可能复杂，潜在的政策变化可能影响EVATM 的可比性。
4. 计算：Managers may find EVA calculations challenging,impacting their ability to meet targets. 经理们可能会觉得EVATM的计算有难度，影响他们实现目标的能力。
5. 绝对数： EVA is an absolute figure,making comparisons with businesses of different sizes difficult. EVA 是一个绝对数值，难以与不同规模的企业进行比较。

6. 历史数据： EVA relies on historical data,which may not always reflect future performance accurately.Determining the value-addition of advertising expenses can be tricky. EVA 依赖历史数据，可能无法准确反映未来绩效。确定广告费用的增值可能 会有难度。

Q3 一、题干解析 Company information Coruisk is a clothing manufacturer in Teeland which produces a range of dresses which it sells to Ericht.The range of dresses are the only products which Coruisk produces and Ericht is its only customer. Coruisk 是 Teeland 的一家服装制造商，生产一系列服装，并销售给 Ericht。该系 列服装是Corusisk 唯一生产的产品，而 Ericht 是其唯一的客户。 Ericht is a well-known retailer in Teeland.Ericht has recently been affected by changes in consumer purchasing preferences to buying clothes online and,as a result, is keen to reduce its inventory holding as a way of reducing its costs.Ericht is also finding that it has an excess of goods which it has to discount as consumer tastes appear to change more quickly than in the past. Ericht 是 Teeland著名的零售商。最近，消费者在网上购买衣服的偏好发生了变 化，因此，Ericht 热衷于减少库存，以此来降低成本。Ericht 还发现，由于消费 者的品味似乎比过去变化得更快，它不得不对过剩的商品进行打折处理。 Current purchasing policy Coruisk currently obtains its raw material from four suppliers.Each of these suppliers operates differently in terms of the processes and procedures which they adopt in trading with Coruisk.Coruisk has been agreeable to this,as the quality of the raw material supplied has generally been acceptable. Coruisk 目前从四家供应商处获取原材料。这些供应商在与Coruisk 交易时采用不 同的流程和程序。Coruisk是接受的，因为提供的原材料质量总体上是可以的。 More recently,however,Coruisk has found reason to question the accuracy and quality of the raw material delivered from one supplier.Additionally,another supplier now only despatches material to Coruisk in full-load quantities as it wishes to optimise the use of its delivery vehicles. 然而最近，Coruisk 合理怀疑一家供应商提供的原材料的准确性和质量。此外， 另一家供应商现在只向Coruisk 发送满负荷数量的材料，因为它希望优化其交付 车辆的使用。 Current production methods The performance metric at Coruisk for production efficiency is the number of dresses produced per period.Coruisk's method of production is to produce individual dresses in long production runs which has helped in maximising output Coruisk 的生产效率绩效指标是每期生产的连衣裙数量。Coruisk 的生产方法是在 长时间的生产过程中生产单件连衣裙，这有助于最大限度地提高产量。 Staff working in the production department have their bonus based on this metric. Goods which have not been produced to the required standard have traditionally been rejected at the end of the production process.Coruisk's production control manager has indicated to you that the current production methods have been successful,as the company only has 5%of its goods returned from Ericht due to poor quality. 在生产部门工作的员工根据这个指标获得奖金。不符合标准的货物通常在生产过 程结束时被拒绝。Coruisk 的生产控制经理向你表示，目前的生产方法是成功的， 因为公司只有5%的货物因为质量差而从Ericht 退货。 JIT and costs of quality Ericht would like to move to a just-in-time (JIT)system of purchasing its goods from Coruisk.The board of Coruisk has asked you for help,as a management consultant,to advise it as to how the company may have to change its approach to the areas of purchasing and production to prepare itself for producing to JIT principles. 准备。 Ericht 希望采用及时制(JIT)系统，从Coruisk 购买商品。Coruisk 董事会向你寻求 帮助和建议，就关于公司如何改变其采购和生产领域，为按照JIT 原则生产做好 准备。 RY-PLATINUM The chief executive officer(CEO)does not believe that the company will encounter any problems in adapting to Ericht's requirements and has told you:'we have very good quality control practices and procedures in place and are confident that we are consistently supplying goods which are required at an acceptable price and at high quality.Our practice of testing goods at the final stage of production,and before they leave the factory,supports this.' 首席执行官(CEO) 认为公司在适应 Ericht 的要求方面不会遇到任何问题，并告诉 你：“我们有非常好的质量控制措施和程序，我们有信心可以持续供应价格合理 和质量高的货物。我们在生产的最后阶段和出厂前对货物进行检测的做法证实了 这一点。” Coruisk's CEO has also made available to you a list of costs which she believes address all relevant costs of quality.These costs are detailed in Appendix 1.The headings for a cost of quality report are also supplied in this appendix.She indicated that some of these costs have never been measured before and have been given financial values to help you give advice.She also told you that Coruisk's current revenue is $4·5million. Coruisk 的首席执行官还向您提供了一份成本清单，她认为该清单涵盖了所有与 质量相关的成本。这些费用详列于附录1。质量成本报告的标题也在本附录中提 供。她指出，其中一些成本以前从未被衡量过，但还是提供了财务价值，以帮助 你提供建议。她还告诉你，Coruisk 目前的收入是450万美元。 Appendix 1 CEO's estimates of quality related costs $'000 Estimated costs of handling complaints from Ericht 135 Material costs 2,000 Scrap(cannot be reworked) 58 Quality control supervisor's salary(employed full time) 35 Rework cost 72 Machine downtime 38 Product recalls and cost of goods returned 180 Labour cost of production 800 Quality audit 2 Foregone contribution from lost sales(estimated)* 85 Routine maintenance 8 Cost of quality report headings Costs of conformance: Prevention costs Appraisal costs Costs of non-conformance: Internal failure costs External failure costs *The foregone contribution from lost sales is an estimate made by the CEO of potential sales lost to Ericht due to problems related to production and delivery experienced by Coruisk. 附录1 CEO对质量相关成本的估计 S'000 处理Ericht投诉的估计费用 135 材料费 2,000 废弃物(不能返工) 58 质量控制主管工资(全职) 35 返工费用 72 机器停机时间 38 产品召回及退货费用 180 生产人工成本 800 质量审核 2 因销售订单丢失而损失的贡献(估计) 85 例行维护 8 成本质量报告标题 合规成本： 预防成本 评估成本 不合规成本： 内部失败成本 外部失败成本 *因销售订单丢失而损失的贡献(估计)是：是首席执行官对由于Coruisk 的生产和 交付问题导致的对Ericht潜在销售损失的估计。

1. 顾客投诉 ◆It is concerning that 3%($135,000)of the revenue figure is taken up by dealing with complaints from Ericht. 令人担忧的是收入的3%(13.5万美元)被用于处理来自Ericht的投诉。 ◆may be due to misunderstandings between the companies 可能是由于公司之间的误解 ■ could be rectified by the closer working relationship that JIT production principles demand. 这可以通过JIT生产原则所要求的更紧密的工作关系来纠正。 ◆ensure that it addresses these costs as it is completely reliant upon Ericht for its business. 确保解决这些成本问题，因为Coruisk的业务完全依赖于Ericht。

2. 奖励方案 ◆The amount of money attributed to product recalls and cost of goods returned(4%of the revenue figure)is concerning 归因于产品召回和退货成本的金额(占收入数字的4%)令人担忧 ■ suggests that defective products have not been detected in current quality control system. 因为这表明目前的质量控制系统没有发现有缺陷的产品 ■ due to the bonus system currently in place and the desire to produce quantity,quickly,and not quality. 这可能是由于目前的奖金制度，以及对生产数量、速度而非质量 的渴望 ◆A change to the production process should address this 生产过程的改变应该解决这个问题 ■ but could be met with hostility 可能遭受抵制 ■ if the workers'bonus is under threat 如果工人的奖金受到威胁 ■ need to introduce an alternative bonus scheme based on a quality-related metric which specifies,for example,the percentage of defects detected. 需要引入一种基于质量为指标的替代奖金方案，例如，检测到的 缺陷百分比。

3. 供应商问题 ◆The forgone contribution from lost sales is also concerning 因销售订单丢失而丢失的贡献也令人担忧 ◆indicates that Ericht has alternative supplier(s). 这表明Ericht有其他供应商 ◆this figure is considerably higher than Coruisk is estimating. 这个数字可能比corusisk估计的要高得多

4. 有效的质量成本管理方式 ◆The balance of the costs must change 成本的平衡必须改变 ■ the majority of costs are prevention and appraisal (costs of conformance)and not costs of internal/external failure(costs of non-conformance) 大部分成本应该是预防和评估(合规成本),而不是内部/外部失败 的成本(不合规成本) ◆ensure that it is producing to the standard which Ericht requests at the first time of asking 确保其生产符合Ericht第一次要求的标准 ◆must ensure that it provides more training for staff,more preventative machine maintenance,more supplier appraisal and vetting and moves to encourage a culture of zero defects with no faulty goods moving forward in the production process. 必须确保为员工提供更多的培训，更多的预防性机器维护，更多的 供应商评估和审查，并采取行动鼓励零缺陷文化，即在生产过程 中没有缺陷产品。 2021 Mar&Jun 真题解析

Q1 一 、题干解析 1.Company information Fiag自行车公司 (Fiag) 是发达国家Beeland的一个大型全国性自行车制造商。Fiag Bicycles(Fiag)is a large national bicycle manufacturer in the well-developed country of Beeland.It was a family-owned business until three years ago when it raised new funds from a venture capitalist (VC)to develop new models of bicycle.Of the eight models in its current range,two have been significantly redesigned and one totally new model has been launched in 20X4.This new model(the Zoam)has been developed over five years and is Fiag's most radical development to date,as it is lightweight and has an electrical battery which can assist less physically fit riders to cycle up hills.The VCinvested $30m in 20X2 and insisted that Fiag produce a mission statement as a clear indication of the company's objective. The objective of Fiag is 'to give the shareholders sustainable growth in returns by developing and manufacturing the best quality bicycles and so bring the joy of cycling to a broad customer base in Beeland'. Fiag自行车公司 (Fiag) 是发达国家Beeland的一个大型全国性自行车制造商。 它曾今是一个家族企业，直到3年前，它得到了一家风险投资 (VC) 机构投资， 用以开发新型自行车。在目前的八款车型中，有两款进行了重大的重新设计， 并且一款全新的车型已于20X4年推出。这款新车型 (Zoam) 开发了五年多的时 间，是Fiag迄今最激进的开发，它很轻且配有电池，可以帮助身体不健康的骑 手骑自行车上山。这家风投公司在20X2 年投资了$30m, 并坚持要求Fiag发布一 份使命声明，以明确表明公司的目标。Fiag的目标是“通过开发和制造最优质的 自行车，为股东带来可持续的回报增长，从而为Beeland的广大客户带来骑行的 乐趣 ” 。 2.Performance reporting The VC has a non-executive director on the board of Fiag.She has criticised the executive directors over the most recent performance report that was presented to the board meeting in order to review the annual performance to 30 June 20X5(Appendix 1). Firstly,she was very unhappy about what she felt were attempts to manipulate the picture of Fiag's performance presented in the report.Secondly,she repeated criticism that she had given in earlier board meetings that the report does not address the company's objectives.She then demanded that the executive directors take action on these points immediately and asked that the board meeting be reconvened once this is done.The chief executive officer(CEO)wants you,as a performance management expert in the company,to give him advice on these matters.He is committed eventually to a redesign of the performance reporting at Fiag but needs to understand the non- executive director's concerns more clearly before this begins.He is happy that there are no arithmetic errors in the presentation of the performance report but wants a critical eiderfresimngytue:question of manipulation in the impression given by the report 2.Assessing whether the current report addresses the company's objectives and briefly, any other issues in its presentation 风投机构在Fiag的董事会中任命了一名非执行董事。她批评了执行董事最近提 交给董事会的业绩报告，这份业绩报告是用以审查截至20X5 年6月30日的年度 业绩(附录1)。首先，她认为有人试图操纵报告中呈现的Fiag业绩，她对此非常 不满；其次，她再次批评了其早些时候在董事会会议上提到的，报告没有述及 公司的目标；然后，她要求执行董事立即就这些问题采取行动，并要求行动完 成后重新召开董事会会议。首席执行官(CEO)希望你作为公司的绩效管理专家， 在这些问题上给他一些建议。他致力于最终重新设计Fiag的业绩报告，但在开 始之前，他需要更清楚地了解这位非执行董事的担忧。他很高兴在业绩报告的 表述中没有算术错误，希望从你那里得到以下两方面批判性的审查： 1.解决报告呈线出来的操纵问题； 2.评估当前的报告是否体现了公司的目标，并简要地评估报告中的任何其他问 题。 3.External business environment The CEO has recognised that the company operates in an increasingly volatile external business environment.Therefore,he has employed a consultant to perform a PEST analysis and he has given you the relevant extracts of their report (Appendix 2).He stated that he does not want you to re-perform the consultant's analysis of the external environment. Instead,he wants you to focus on the implications of the PEST factors identified on Fiag's business and then on providing a justified recommendation of suitable performance indicators to measure the impact of those factors. 首席执行官已经认识到公司在一个日益动荡的外部商业环境中运营。因此，他 聘请了一名顾问进行 PEST 分析，并将他们报告的相关摘录(附录2)交给了你。 他表示不希望你重新执行顾问对外部环境的分析。相反，他希望你把重点放在 识别 PEST 的因素对 Fiag 业务的影响上，然后提供一个合理的建议，并推荐合 适的绩效指标来衡量这些因素的影响。 4.Production department A senior production manager(SPM)has recently been angry at her failure to receive part of her bonus for the year,when she felt she had performed outstandingly.She is rewarded her bonus in two parts:one part is shares in Fiag in order to reflect the overall company performance;and the other part is cash,based on the performance of her department compared to budget.It was this second part where her expectations were not met by the reward.During the year,there were significant price changes in materials used in production.The SPM has suggested that budget variances should be broken down into those that she can control and those that are out of her control,as such assessment is otherwise unfair. The CEO has supplied you with data relating to this in Appendix 3 and wants advice from you on the implications of this suggestion for management accounting at Fiag and for the SPM in this particular case. 一位高级生产经理(SPM)最近很生气，因为她在认为自己表现出色，却没有拿 到当年的部分奖金。她的奖金分为两部分：一部分是 Fiag 的股票，以反映公司 的整体业绩；另一部分是现金，基于她所在部门的绩效相比预算的完成情况， 她没有获得期望的第二部分的奖金。当年，用于生产的材料价格变动很大， SPM 建议将预算差异分为她能控制的和她无法控制的，因为基于现有的差异进 行评估是不公平的。首席执行官已在附录3中向您提供了与此相关的数据，并 希望您就该建议对Fiag 管理会计和 SPM 在此特定情况下的影响提供建议。 5.Appendix 1 Performance Report Year to 30 June 20X5 20X4 Improvement year on year Industry average $m $m % % Revenue 273 289 -6% Costs of sales 131 137 Gross profit 142 152 -7% Administrative expenses 50 52 Distribution expenses 28 29 Selling and marketing expenses 51 52 Operating profit 13 19 Operating margin 4.8% 6.6% 119 Exceptional costs 0 12 Net financing costs 0 0 Profit before tax 13 7 86% Commentary: -Revenue from new and redesigned bicycle models grew by 200%in 20X5 -20X5年，全新和重新设计的自行车车型的收入增长了200% -PBT has improved by 86% -税前利润 (PBT) 提高了86% -Operating margin has fallen by a small 1·8% -营业利润率小幅下降了1.8% Notes: 1.Administrative expenses includes the income from a two-year government grant of $5m p.a.(in 20X5 and 20X4)relating to Zoam. 1.行政费用包括与 Zoam 有关的两年政府拨款收入(20X5 和20X4), 每年$5m。 2.Revenue includes revenue from the Zoam(new electrical bicycle)($25m in 20X5, $5m in20X4). 2.收入包括来自Zoam(新型电动自行车)的收入(20X5为$25m,20X4 为$5m)。 3.Exceptional costs are the costs of developing the new electrical bicycle. 3.特别费用是开发新型电动自行车的费用。 6.Appendix 2 External business environment at Fiag(August 20X5) Extract of report by A Consultant Fiag的外部商业环境(8月20X5) 一名顾问的报告摘录 Political environment -The government of Beeland has recently provided tax allowances to citizens who use a bicycle to commute to work. -It has also supported cycling by building many new dedicated cycle-paths. 政治环境 -Beeland政府最近为骑自行车上下班的市民提供了税收减免。 -Beeland政府通过建造许多新的专用自行车道来支持骑行。 Economic environment -Beeland has seen steady economic growth for the last 20 years and this wealth has spread through all parts of society. -The introduction of significant import tariffs has surprised many businesses such as Fiag,who import raw materials or sub-components for final assembly. 经济环境 -Beeland在过去的20年里经济稳步增长，财富已经扩散到社会的各个方面。 -高额进口关税的出台令许多企业(比如Fiag)很惊讶，因为它们大量进口原材料 或者是用于最终组装的子部件。 Socio-cultural environment -Having a healthy lifestyle has become an increasingly popular aspiration for the people of Beeland. -The population of Beeland is ageing with increasing numbers of retired people. 社会文化环境 -拥有健康的生活方式已成为Beeland人民越来越普遍的愿望。 -Beeland的人口日趋老龄化，退休人数的不断增加。 Technological environment -Cheap,new materials are enabling lighter bicycles to be built without compromising their strength. -Battery technology has rapidly advanced so that it is feasible to fit lightweight electrical power units to bicycles. 技术环境 -廉价的新材料可以在不影响强度的情况下制造出更轻的自行车。 -电池技术迅速发展，让在自行车上安装轻型电池组件变得可行。 7.Appendix 3 Production department information Fiag's senior management set standard costs and budgets for each department once a year.The SPM’s problem arose in relation to the main product of the SPM's department,the Speedy.The original standard cost for this bicycle was set in the budget as $255 per unit.During the year,actual production costs on the bicycle were $22·5m with 85,000 Speedys manufactured.The main reason for the higher actual costs was a rise of 16%in material costs,as these materials are imported and the government has imposed extra tariffs on imported goods.If this had been known at the time that budgets were set,then the standard cost would have been set at $268 per unit.The SPM would receive the second part of her bonus(10%of base salary)if costs have a favourable variance. 生产部门信息 Fiag的高级管理层每年为每个部门制定标准成本和预算。 SPM的问题与其部门 的主要产品Speedy 有关。在预算中，这辆自行车的原始标准成本是每辆$255。 当年生产了8.5万辆speedy自行车，实际生产成本$22.5m, 实际成本上升的主要 原因是材料成本上升了16%,因为这些材料是进口的，政府对进口商品征收了 额外的关税。如果在制定预算时就知道这一点，那么标准成本将定为每辆$268。 如果成本差异是有利结果，SPM 将获得她奖金的第二部分(基本工资的10%)。 二、问题
explanation_zh: Requirements : It is now 1 September 20X5. Write a report to the chief executive officer(CEO)to respond to his instructions for work on the following areas: (a)the performance reporting at Fiag focused on: (i)the question of manipulation in the board report;(12 marks) (ii)whether the report addresses the company's objectives and the report's presentation; (14 marks) (b)the consultant's report on the external business environment;(12 marks) (c)the issue of performance measurement at the production department.(8 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the format,style and structure of the discussion of your answer. (4 marks) 现在是20X5 年9月1日。 写一份报告给首席执行官(CEO), 以回应他在以下方面的工作指示： (a)Fiag的业绩报告需侧重于： (i)操纵董事会报告的问题；(12分) (ii)报告是否述及公司的目标及报告的展示形式；(14分) (b)顾问就外部商业环境所作的报告；(12分) (c)生产部门的绩效评估问题。(8分) 在回答中展示的论述形式、风格和结构将获得专业分数。(4分) 三、答题思路： 这道题是需要写一份报告，所以需要有报告的基础格式 Report heading 共四行，四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant/A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date:指定日期/考试日期 标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据section A中第一个问题内容分为以下2种情况 评估 Performance report——Performance reporting+management issues+公司名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+公司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结 section A中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduction 能够运用连接词描述 Section A 中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:CEO of Fiag From:An Accountant Date:September 20X5 Subject:Performance reporting and management issues at Fiag Introduction This report evaluates the current performance report used by the board of Fiag,first against the accusations that it misrepresents performance and then,that it fails to measure Fiag's performance against its objectives.Second,justified recommendations of performance indicators arising from an analysis of the external business environment are offered.Finally,the report examines an issue associated with budget setting and its effect on staffrewards in the production department. 根据题目的3个要求架构答案，首先是针对业绩报告的分析，需要分为两部分， 一部分是关于报告的操纵问题， 一个是关于报告是否述及公司的目标及报告的 展示形式。 (i)Manipulation of board report报告的操纵问题 报告的操纵问题可从表内数据的展示和表外评述的客观、合理性入手。如： ● 没有行业平均值 · 没有同比变化数据 · 成本错误分类 · 误导性的评述 · 其他相关分析点 该问每个点1分，共计12分。 Omitting the bad news故意省略坏消息 ·Only one industry average(operating margin)只有一个平均值 o Does not provide a revenue growth comparator 没有展示收入的增长对比指标 o Revenue figures should be straight-forward to see if Fiag's fallof 6%is representative of the market as a whole 收入相关数据应该可以直观的展示与行业对比后6%的下降是否是 市场原因 ·Does not calculate many of the year-on-year changes很多同比变化都没有计 算 o May be because gross profit shows a deteriorating performance 这可能是因为毛利率等重要指标的表现正在恶化 ·Many of these calculations are unnecessary(detailed cost headings)许多不重 要的数据(成本明细) o No such case can be made for not showing the percentage fall in operating profit 不展示经营利润的下降百分比，单纯展示成本明细的意义不大 ·The revenue performance fall may be worse than portrayed营收的表现可能更 糟 o Range without the electrical bicycle has seen revenue fall from $284m to $248m(13%).This category covers 91%of the current revenue earned by Fiag. 除电动自行车外的收入下降了13%,该类别是Fiag收入的91% Misclassification of costs成本错误分类 ·Exceptional costs:appears to be part of the main activities and a central part of the strategy 特别费用：似乎是主要活动的一部分，也是企业战略的核心部分 o Their placement after the operating profit line means that key performance indicators such as return on capital employed are not affected so over-stating performance. 将它们排在营业利润线之后，意味着ROCE 等关键业绩指标不会 受影响，从而夸大业绩。 ·Administrative expenses:government grant income probably should be stated separately 管理费用：政府拨款收入可能应该单独列出 o It is material,short term and will not match to the fullfive years of costs associated with developing the electrical bicycle. 它金额较大、是短期的，与开发电动车相关的5年的成本不匹配 Commentary seems misleading评论似乎具有误导性 · Only selecting the growth in revenue from new models 只选择新型车的收入增长 o Rather than noting the underperformance of the range as a whole 没有指出整个系列的表现不佳 · Ignoring the widely used operating profit figure 忽略了广泛使用的营业利润数据 o Thereby bypassing the reason for the rise in profit before tax which is the fall in exceptional costs resulting from the completion of development of the new electrical bicycle model. 从而避免了解释税前利润上升的原因，是由于新电动自行车模型 开发完成后导致的异常成本下降这一异常因素 o The description that a fall in operating margin is small ignores a number of facts. 营业利润下降幅度很小的描述忽略了许多事实 o Operating margin fall is not 1·8%but 1·8 percentage points which is 27%on 20X4 经营利润率下降幅度是27%[(6 .6%-4 .8%)/6 .6%],而不是 1.8%(6.6%-4.8%)绝对数的下降 o No reference is made to the industry comparator of 11% 经营利润率没有跟行业数据11%进行比较分析 (ii)Measuring the achievement of the objectives of Fiag衡量Fiag 各项目标的达成情 况 根据题目背景， · 将目标分解为Primary 首要目标和secondary 次要目标，分解最多2分； ●每个目标的评估指标，共计最多10分； · 其他相关点，最多4分； 共计最多14分 具体内容如下： Primary: Fiag's overall objective is ‘to give the shareholders sustainable growth in returns'cC Fiag的总体目标是“给股东带来可持续的回报增长” Secondary: ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM · Developing the best quality bicycles; 开发最优质的自行车 · Manufacturing the best quality bicycles; 生产最优质的自行车 ·Bringing the joy of cycling to a broad customer base in Beeland. 为Beeland的广大客户带来骑行的乐趣 Primary: ·No direct measure of shareholder returns in the report 没有直接衡量股东回报 o Not even profit after tax,no statement of the gains which shareholders would make in income(dividends paid)or capital terms 没有税后利润、没有关于股东将以收入(支付的股息)或资本条款 获得的收益的声明 o Not possible to give capital growth through share price rise as Fiag is unlisted 由于Fiag 未上市，没有股价变化信息，因此使用股价上涨来衡量 资本增长不切实际 o Suggest:EVA,NPV 建议：采用EVA,NPV · Growth of the returns 回报增长 o Not all growths are provided 没有提供所有数据的增长情况 · Sustainability of the returns 回报的可持续性 o Unclear from the report ONLINE DELIVERY-F 报告中未清晰说明 o Suggest:examining the success of the supporting strategies 建议：检视支持战略的长期成效 Secondary: · No direct measure for quality 没有直接指标评估质量水平 o Indirect measure of customer attitude-revenue growth 间接衡量客户态度的指标-营收的增长 o No competitor comparison or a market share 没有与竞争对手/市场份额做比较 · No separately measure of development 没有单独的指标衡量研发水平 o No separate categories for all new products 对新产品的信息没有独立展示 o Suggestion:number of development projects,their state of completion, their market performance 建议：独立展示研发项目数量、完成进度、市场表现 ·Little measure for the efficiency of the manufacturing process apart from the gross profit 除毛利外，几乎没有衡量制造过程的效率指标 o Suggest:cycle time 建议：展示生产周期 ·Use traditional financial measures only 仅使用了传统的财务指标 · No measure of the customer base 没有指标衡量客户基础 o May be addressed by the growth in Zoam 可能通过Zoa m的增长来体现 o Lack of external competitor/market information 缺乏外部竞争对手和市场的信息 Other aspects ·Lack of external information,not suitable for strategic 缺乏外部信息，不适合战略决策 ·Not sufficient information to establish a trend analysis 没有足够信息来进行趋势分析 ·No budget information for controlling 没有预算信息来进行控制 ·The report is clear and in a traditional profit and loss decision making format,would be easily understood 报告采用传统利润表形式，格式清晰、易于理解 · Often the commentary does not go beyond restating the figures in the table, should provide the significant explanations 评述通常不仅仅是重申表格中的数据，应该提供关键重要数据的解释 iii)External business environment at Fiag Fiag的外部商业环境 问题要求：讨论PEST factors对Fiag 公司业务的影响，并找出合适的KPI 衡量各 要素 · 针 对PEST 每个方面： · 讨 论PEST分析的对业务的影响，最多2分； · 建议合适的KPI, 最多2分； · 所有论点需跟Fiag的业务相关，共计最多12分。 Political environment政策环境 Implication: · Tax allowances represent a financial incentive 税收优惠政策是一项财务激励 ·Building of new cycle paths should make cycling safer and so increase participation 修建新的自行车道使骑行更安全，刺激群众积极性 ·Increased demand for their products (volumes purchased) 对产品的需求增长情况(购买量) · Increased participation rates with total number of kilometres cycled 骑行总公里数的增长，参与率的增长情况 · Total market size for bicycles in Beeland Beeland自行车的总市场规模 · The growth of these indicators should be compared with revenue growth at Fiag 这些指标的增长都应与Fiag的收入增长进行比较 Economic environment Implication: ·Economic growth and the populace of Beeland has become wealthier 经济增长，Beeland民众变得更加富裕 ·For Fiag,this should mean growing volumes and margins although the cost base (e.g.staff costs)will inflate too 对Fiag而言，意味着销量和利润率会有所增长，尽管成本(员工成本)也将 上升 · The size and growth of the overall market 整体市场的规模将变大 ·Introduction of tariffs willincrease the costs and can negatively impact on profit margins 征收关税将增加成本，进而降低利润率 Measures: ·Market size/growth 市场规模/市场规模的增长 · Monitor the gross profit margin and operating profit margin 监控毛利率和经营利润率 Socio-cultural factors Implication: ·Increasing interest in health should drive the consumers'taste towards cycling 对健康的关注激发消费者对骑行的兴趣 ·Ageing demographic increase the attractiveness of the electrical bicycle over other models 人口老龄化使电动自行车相较其他车型更具吸引力 Measures: · Market size/growth 市场规模/市场规模的增长 · Market/growth of electrical bicycle 电动自行车的市场规模/其增长率 Technology Implication: ·Lightweight aspect will further enhance the model's attractiveness especially to the elderly 轻量化制造技术将提高电动自行车的吸引力，尤其是老年人 ·New materials could improve further the contribution per unit as material costs are cut 新型材料降低可进一步提高产品单位贡献 Measures: The average weight of Fiag's models(especially the Zoam)compared to the average of its competitors 与竞争对手的平均重量相比，Fiag 新 模 型(Zoam) 的平均重量 · Direct material cost per unit 产品的单位直接材料成本 (c)Production department 生产部门 · 解释和讨论planning and operational variances,最多3分； · 计 算 ：operational variance 1分 ；planning variance 1分，针对SPM的奖金的 结论1分； · 讨论高管后续的评估措施调整，最多4分； · 共计最多8分。 Principle of controllability 可控性原理 · Fiag should consider measuring the SPM's performance against factors within her control Fiag在评估SPM的业绩时，应根据她可控范围的因素进行衡量 · The general variances should be split into planning and operational variances 总的差异由此可分为计划差异和经营差异 Definition of planning and operational variance 计划差异和经营差异的定义 ·Planning variances are those which arise due to inaccurate forecasts or standards in the original budget setting 计划差异是由于原预算制定时预测不准确而产生的差异(非SPM可控) ·Operational variances are then the remainder due to the decisions of operational managers 经营差异是由于经理的决策而产生的差异 (SPM 可控) Calculate variances: Revised standard cost of production($268x85,000) Actual cost $m 22·78 22·50 Total operational cost variance 0·28F · The SPM is correct in feeling that she should have received a bonus SPM认为她应该拿到全额奖金是对的 · With the adjusted budget,her department has performed ahead of budget with a favourable variance 基于调整的预算，她所在部门经营业绩了超过预算 · Fiag's senior management should consider a change Fiag的高管应该考虑调整现有评估方式 · Otherwise staff will ignore the bonuses as not achievable,demotivation 否则员工会认为目标无法实现而无视奖金，抑制员工积极性 Revised standard cost($268x85,000) Original standard cost($255x85,000) Total planning cost variance $m 22·78 21·675 1·105 A · Whether the imposition of tariffs could have been foreseen 是否会征收关税本可以预见 · Could have been mitigated by purchasing from local suppliers so avoiding importing 也可以通过从当地供应商采购原材料而避免进口的不确定性

stem_zh: 6. 模型中具体术语的解释——灵活性、循环时间和浪费(模型关键维度详解) 论述以上观点也可以相互结合。对于其他合理要点，例如结合案例场景中的示 例来说明要点也可。 各个指标与总体愿景联系起来 √link the drivers of performance with the traditional financial results through the different layers of an organisation. 绩效金字塔目的是通过组织的不同层次将绩效驱动因素与传统财务结果联 系起来。 √each level of an organisation has different concerns but they must support each other in order to achieve the overallobjective (vision)of the organisation. 一个组织的每个级别都有不同的关注点，但它们必须相互支持，以便实现 组织的总体目标(愿景)。 √The pyramid shape is to emphasise that the measures should support this vision, through all layers of the organisation (from operational to strategic).Thus the vision flows down through each layer generating appropriate measures which,in turn,support it. 金字塔形状是为了强调组织的所有层面的指标(从运营到战略)都支持这 一愿景。因此，愿景通过每一层都会生成相应的指标，反过来支持它。 需要绩效驱动因素指标 √to produce a set of performance measures which covers the outputs (traditionally financial)and the drivers of those outputs. 目的是制定一套绩效指标，包括产出(传统上是财务指标)以及这些产出 的驱动因素。 measures at the operational level cover day-to-day issues of quality,delivery,and the cycle time of different processes and waste. 运营层的指标控制的是每天发生的事情，如质量，运输和周转期以及浪 费。 在外部和内部之间拆分 √The pyramid is split vertically between the driving forces of customer satisfaction (external)and flexibility/productivity (internal). 金字塔纵向切分为外部的客户满意度和内部的灵活性/生产力。 灵活性、循环时间和浪费 Flexibility indicates the business systems'ability to change in response to internal and external factors such as customer needs. 灵活性表示的是业务系统响应内部和外部因素(如客户需求)而变化的能 力 。 √Cycle time relates to all processes in the organisation from the credit cycle to product development to order processing. 周转期与组织中的所有流程有关，从赊购到产品开发到订单处理的全流 程 。 √Waste is a general term relating to the optimal utilisation of the business's resources and elimination of non-value adding activities. 浪费与企业资源的最佳利用和消除非增值活动有关。 二 、问题
explanation_zh: (b)Complete the analysis and evaluate the operational performance indicators at Harray,using the headings and data in Appendix 1.(12 marks) 使用附录1中的标题和数据完成分析并评估Harray的运营绩效指标。(12分) 三、答题思路： 找到正确计算的且合适的指标1分，评价分析每一点1分 浪费-最多4分：可根据题目中的机器生产效率来评价是否满负荷，是否浪费资源 质量-最高6分：根据题目找出衡量质量的指标为质量成本。找出退回订单数 量，返工成本来说明质量水平。 交付-最多4分：运输是外包的，通过考察准时交付率来衡量。 周转期-最多3分 最多12分 There are four operational headings in the pyramid which shall be considered in turn. 金字塔模型中有四个类别属于经营活动，应依次考虑。 √Waste is about optimal use of resources and minimisation of non-value adding activity. 浪费是与资源的最佳利用和非增值活动的最小化有关。 √There are 1.05 million keyboards produced but this only represents 86%utilisation of the capacity of the factory(2,695,680 minutes of production line time are available at 2.2 minutes per keyboard meaning that the factory can produce 1,225,309 at full capacity). 有一百零五万个键盘的产出但这仅代表工厂产能的86%(生产线的总时间是 2,695,680分钟，而每个键盘花费2.2分钟，意味着工厂可以满负荷生产 1,225,309个)。 capital invested in the factory is under-utilised,although an 80+%utilisation would be considered efficient for many manufacturing operations. 尽管80%以上的利用率被认为对许多制造业来说是有效的，但对工厂投资的 利用率却很低。 Quality: inspection and prevention costs(which represent the costs of preventing faults in the production process and inspecting to avoid faulty goods leaving the factory) and internal and external failure costs(which are costs resulting from faulty goods being identified before and after delivery to the customer). 质量可以通过四种成本类型来衡量：检查和预防成本(代表预防在生产过 程中的故障和检查以避免故障货物出厂)以及内部和外部故障成本(这是 由于在交付给客户之前和之后发现有缺陷的货物而产生的成本)。 √no data given for 20X5 on the costs of inspection and prevention. 没有给出20X5的检查和预防费用。 √the effectiveness of inspection can be measured in that only 0.4%of orders were returned while inspection stopped the delivery of 1.5%of faulty goods. 检验的有效性衡量指标：0.4%的订单被退回；通过检查终止了1.5%的瑕疵 货物的交付。 · a loss of $50,400 at standard cost from the scrapping of faulty keyboards although 60%of faulty boards identified were able to be repaired. 尽管60%的故障板能够修复，但报废故障键盘的标准成本仍然很高，损 失50400美元。 √The effectiveness of prevention can be measured in that there is a roughly 1.9% failure rate in total,which must reflect the good production practice at the factory. 预防的有效性衡量指标：大约为1.9%的总失败率，反映出工厂的生产流程 是良好的。 There are data on measures of the costs of internal failure from reworking goods ($18,900). 内部失败成本的有效性衡量指标：返工产品18900美元。 But there are no data on the costs ofexternal failures from 0.4%of customer returns which may incur further repair or warranty claim costs. 外部失败成本的有效性衡量指标：0.4%的退货中没有关于外部故障成本的 数据，退货可能会导致进一步的维修或保修索赔费用。 Delivery: √ outsourced to Achall and is reliant on Achall to provide the data on the quality of Achall's own service. 运输已外包给Achall,Harray 依赖Achall 提供有关Achall自身服务质量的数据 Harray can control by monitoring its own customer feedback to identify if Achall is under-reporting the late deliveries. 这代表了一种风险，Harray可以通过监控自己的客户反馈来确定Achall是否 在报告中故意低报延迟交货。 Based on Achall's data,92%of orders are delivered on time at an average time of 3.4 days. 根据Achall 的数据，92%的订单以平均3.4天的时间准时交付。 Cycle time: √Cycle time for working capital is being measured but this should be done for all the significant processes in Harray. Harray目前衡量的是营运资本的周期时间，但Harray的所有重要流程都应该 做周期时间的测量。 √The processes which have been identified so far are setting up production lines, running the production on an order and delivering the order. 到目前为止已经确定的流程是建立生产线、按订单生产和交付订单。 √Measurement of production cycle times is likely to be particularly important in assessing the efficiency of such a cost-conscious business. 生产周期的指标在评估效率的时候特别重要，尤其是在这样一个关注成本 的公司。 √There are data on delivery time(3.4 days on average)and on production time(2.2 minutes per production line).These should appear in the pyramid of indicators if they are deemed sufficiently important. 交货时间(平均3.4天)和生产时间(每个生产线2.2分钟)。如果这些指标 被认为足够重要，则应出现在金字塔的指标中。 二 、问题解析： (c)Evaluate the reliability of non-financial indicators as requested by the CEO,using the operational performance indicators from part(b).(7 marks) 根据首席执行官的要求，使用第(b) 部分的运营绩效指标评估非财务指标的可 靠性。(7 分 ) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 三、答题思路： 每个点1分： 财务数据： √ 审计需要审查财务系统 √ 财务系统中财务数据显然是量化的 √ 更可靠 非财务数据： √NFPI 的数据来源， √ 内部相对可靠 √ 外部可能更不可靠 √ 在Harray的每个点上应用一个合适的示例 最多7分 In order to understand the issues surrounding measurement of non-financial indicators,it is necessary first to consider the more commonly used financial ones. 为了理解围绕非财务指标衡量的问题，有必要首先考虑更常用的财务指标。 财务数据： √ Financial indicators will be produced by Harray's financial systems. 财务指标将由Harray的财务系统生成。 √ generate much of the cost information used,for example,in measuring the costs of quality. 这些系统将生成大量成本信息，例如，质量成本。 √ internally controlled and additionally monitored by the external auditors of the organisation. 它们是内部控制的并由外部审计员进行额外监控。 √ likely to be the most reliable data available. 财务数据可能是最可靠的可用数据。 非财务数据： √ for the measurement of headings such as cycle time,the data are often going to be non-financial. 对于周期时间等指标的衡量，数据往往是非财务性的。 √ Cycle time requires measuring how long processes take,for example,the length of time it takes a production line to produce a keyboard. 周期时间需要衡量流程所需的时间，例如，生产线生产一个键盘所需的时 间长度。 · These data are within the control of Harray and the data will be obtained by production records and interviewing the key personnel. 这些数据由Harray控制，数据将通过生产记录和关键人员访谈获得。 not be subject to the checking and controls over financial data and,therefore, may be more prone to error. 然而，它们将不受财务数据的检查和控制，因此可能更容易出错。 √ Other non-financial data used may come from external sources. 使用的其他非财务数据可能来自外部来源。 For example,at Harray,they are using the delivery data of Achall.This data must be treated carefully as there is an incentive for Achall to under-report late deliveries as there may be penalties for such non-performance in their contract with Harray (there is also the threat of losing the contract) 例如，在Harray, 他们使用Achall的运输数据。必须谨慎对待这些数据，因 为Achall报告延迟交付的情况，他们将受到合同中处罚(也有可能失去合 同 ) 。 √ Harray will want to ensure that Achall's data is reliable by checking it against its own customer complaint records. Harray将希望通过对照自己的客户投诉记录来确保Achall的数据是可靠的。 √Also,the definition of non-financial data is more subjective,for example,what constitutes a late delivery (though this should be consistent with the service level agreed in the contract). 此外非财务数据更加主观，例如，什么构成延迟交付。

stem_zh: Q3 一 、题干解析 1.Company information Gaddon has successfully operated a chain of90 gymnasiums in Jayland for many years. The founder of the business retired during 20X3 due to ill health.His daughter,who had graduated from the Jayland School of Business (JSB)in the same year,took over from him as Gaddon's CEO.As a student,the new CEO had worked as an intern in neighbouring Veeland.She knew that many citizens there have unhealthy lifestyles, and participation in sport and physical exercise is very much lower than in Jayland.As there were relatively few gymnasiums in Veeland,the CEO believed there was a great opportunity to expand the Gaddon brand there. 多年来，Gaddon公司在Jayland 成功运营了90家连锁体育馆。这家公司的创始人 在20X3年因健康原因退休。他的女儿同年毕业于Jayland商学院(Jayland School of Business,JSB), 接替他担任 Gaddon 的首席执行官。作为一名学生，新的 CEO 曾在邻近的Veeland 实习。她知道那里的许多市民有着不健康的生活方式， 参与体育和体育锻炼的人数远远低于Jayland。由于Veeland的体育馆相对较少， 这位首席执行官认为，在那里有很好的机会来扩张Gaddon的品牌。 2.Expansion into Veeland The CEO told the members of the board to draw up an ambitious plan to open a chain of 60 new gymnasium Veeland.Until then,Gaddon's strategy had remained unchanged for a long time and the business opened an average of one new gymnasium each year. Most of the board members had little experience of evaluating strategic change on the scale which was now being proposed and had relied on the former CEO to guide them on strategic matters. 这位首席执行官通知董事会成员起草一项雄心勃勃的计划，在 Veeland 开设60 家新体育馆。在那之前，Gaddon 的战略在很长一段时间内一直保持不变，该公 司平均每年开设一家新体育馆。大多数董事会成员在评估目前提出的规模的战 略变化方面几乎没有经验，他们过去是依赖于前任首席执行官在战略问题上指 导他们的。 At a board meeting,Gaddon's finance director expressed concerns about the amount of debt which would be required to fund the expansion and the high level of risk involved in operating overseas for the first time on such a large scale.Shortly after the board meeting,he resigned from the board and took a job in a competitor organisation.In addition,a number of other board members discussed privately that the expansion was unlikely to succeed in a nation as unhealthy as Veeland,but did not openly voice their opposition to the CEO's plans. 在一次董事会会议上，Gaddon 的财务总监对此次扩张所需融资的债的数额以及 首次大规模的海外运营所涉及的高风险表示担忧。董事会会议结束后不久，他 辞去了董事会职务，在一个竞争对手的公司中找到了一份工作。此外，其他一 些董事会成员私下讨论说，在像Veeland这样不重视健康的国家扩张不太可能取 得成功，但并没有公开表示他们对首席执行官的计划的反对。 In the absence of the finance director,the CEO did much of the financial evaluation of the expansion herself.She assumed that each new gymnasium would generate the same average annual revenue as those in Jayland of $432,000.On the same basis,fixed staff and operating costs would be $343,000.As the capital assets of $400,000 needed to set up each gymnasium would be depreciated over 25 years,she calculated that the annual profit from each gymnasium would be around $73,000 and the payback period based on the cash flows of the project would be 4.5 years. 在财务总监缺席的情况下，首席执行官自己对扩张计划进行了大量的财务评估。 她认为每家新体育馆的平均年收入将与 Jayland每家体育馆的平均年收入相同， 为432,000美元。同样的，固定的工作人员和营运费用将为343,000美元。考虑 到建立每家体育馆所需的$400,000美元的资产将在25年内折旧，她计算出每家 体育馆的年利润将约为73,000美元，且项目现金流计算的回收期将为4.5年。 In total,$24m was required to finance the expansion but the bank was only willing to give Gaddon a loan of $12m.Convinced that her plan would be a success,the CEO persuaded a wealthy family friend to lend Gaddon an additional $12m.Both loans were for 25 years and both had an annual floating interest rate of 5%. 此次扩张总共需要2400万美元，但该银行只愿意给Gaddon 一笔1200万美元的 贷款。首席执行官确信她的计划会取得成功，于是说服了一位富有的朋友再借 给 Gaddon 1200万美元。这两项贷款的期限都为25年，两者的年浮动利率都为 5%。 At the beginning of20X4,Gaddon opened the planned 60 new gymnasiums in Veeland. Though performance was better than some had expected,the number of customers at each gymnasium was much lower than for a similar gymnasium in Jayland,and customers were unwilling to pay such high membership prices. 在20X4 年初，Gaddon 在 Veeland 开设了计划中的60家新体育馆。虽然性能好 于一些人的预期，但每家体育馆的顾客数量比 Jayland 的类似体育馆中要少得多， 而且顾客不愿意支付如此高的会员价格。 At the end of July 20X5,the Central Bank of Jayland raised interest rates,and the rate of interest on Gaddon's loans was increased to 7%.It is now 1 September 20X5 and Gaddon has already missed the July 20X5 and August 20X5 instalments on both of its loan payments,in order to afford to pay creditors and staff wages. 20X5 年7月底， Jayland中央银行提高了利率，这导致Gaddon 借款的利率提高 到7%。现在是20X5 的9月1日，为了能够付款给债权人和支付员工工资， Gaddon 已经错过了20X5年7月和20X5 年8月的贷款分期付款。 3.G score model The CEO has contacted you as a performance management consultant to advise her on Gaddon's deteriorating financial position,and whether the business is at risk of corporate failure.You have decided to calculate the 'G score'for Gaddon to help with your work. 首席执行官联系了你这位以绩效管理顾问，希望你就Gaddon 不断恶化的财务状 况以及企业是否面临公司倒闭的风险向她提供建议。你已经决定通过计算 Gaddon 的“G score”以帮助完成工作。 The G score is a quantitative model for predicting corporate failure for companies listed in Jayland.It was created by a group of academics at the JSB.It is based on the statistical correlations between a company's key financial ratios and the success or failure of the company within two years of the sample data.It is derived from statistical analysis of the published accounts of all companies on the small Jayland stock exchange. “G score”是一个预测在Jayland 上市的公司失败风险的定量模型。它是由JSB 的 一群学者创建的。它是基于一个公司的关键财务比率和该公司在样本数据公布 后的两年内的成功或失败之间的统计学相关性。它来源于对 small Jayland 证券 交易所所有公司公布的账目的统计分析。 Calculation of the G score The G score is calculated by applying the following weighting factors to four key financial ratios and adding these weighted elements together. “G score”是通过将以下权重因子应用于四个关键财务比率，并将这些加权元素 相加来计算的。 G score=3G₁+4G₂+1.5G₃+1.2G₄ Where: G₁=Current assets/total assets G₂=Earnings before interest,tax,depreciation and amortisation/total assets G₃=Revenue/total assets G₄=Total assets/non-current liabilities 其 中： G₁= 流动资产/总资产 G₂= 利息、税项、折旧和摊销前收益/总资产 G₃= 收入/总资产 G₄= 总资产/非流动负债 Companies with a G score of less than 4 are in danger of corporate failure,where as companies with a score of 6 or more are not in danger of failure.Those companies with a G score of between 4 and 6 need further analysis to determine whether they are at risk of corporate failure. “G score”低于4分的公司面临着公司倒闭的危险，而6分或以上的公司则没有倒 闭的危险。那些“Gscore” 在4到6之间的公司需要进一步分析，以确定它们是否 面临企业倒闭的风险。 Extracts from Gaddon's 20X3 and 20X4 accounts are given in Appendix 1. 从Gaddon 的 2 0X3 和20X4 账簿中提取的摘要见附录1。 ONLINE DELIVE PLATINUM4.Appendix 1 ONLINE DELIVE PLATINUM Q1 一、题干解析 1.Company information Maddy is a fast-food chain which operates restaurants in several locations.It was established by the current board members,who are all shareholders,when they opened the first Maddy restaurant in 20X2.The restaurant quickly gained a good reputation,through positive customer reviews on social media,for the quality and price of its food,for its customer service and for its cleanliness.Since then,Maddy has grown quickly.By August 20X5 it had opened another 12 restaurants under the Maddy brand,with the same overall business model,product range and look and feel as the original restaurant. Maddy 是一家连锁快餐店，在多地都经营着餐厅。它是由现任董事会成员建立的， 他们都是股东，他们在20X2 年开了第一家Maddy 餐厅。社交媒体上顾客对食物 质量、价格、服务和清洁度的好评使得这家餐厅迅速获得了良好的声誉。自那以 后，Maddy 成长得很快。截止到20X5 年8月20日，公司已经开设了12家餐厅， 其整体商业模式、产品范围、外观和感觉都与一开始的餐厅相同。 Maddy's overall objective is to maximise shareholder wealth.To achieve this overall objective,Maddy has two supporting aims: 1.To increase the number of restaurants.Maddy has ambitious growth objectives to increase the number of restaurants,including franchise restaurants.Though Maddy is a successful business,the lack of available finance has meant that the rate of opening its own new restaurants has recently slowed. 2.To achieve like-for-like*revenue growth of at least 15%each year. The board believes a key factor in achieving this is for Maddy to achieve industry-leading performance across a range of factors relating to quality of service. *Like-for-like revenue growth is that achieved by means other than the growth due to the opening of new restaurants and excludes growth from other one-off events which may distort the measurement of performance. Maddy 的总体目标是使股东的财富最大化。为了实现这一总体目标，Maddy 有 两个支持性目标： 1.为了增加餐馆的数量。Maddy 有雄心勃勃的增长目标，以增加含特许经营餐厅 在内的餐厅的数量。虽然 Maddy 是一家成功的企业，但缺乏资金导致它自己开 设新餐厅的速度最近有所放缓。 2.同类收入增长每年至少达到15%。 董事会认为，实现这一目标的一个关键因素是，Maddy 将在与服务质量相关的一 系列因素上取得行业领先的业绩。 *同类收入增长是通过开设新餐厅以外的方式实现的，并且排除了其他可能扭曲 业绩衡量的一次性活动的增长。 In order to help achieve its overall objective,Maddy has recently established eight franchise restaurants consistent with the first supporting aim to increase the number of restaurants,including franchise restaurants.One of these franchise restaurants is located in a neighbouring country,where the Maddy brand is not widely recognised. 为了帮助实现其整体目标，Maddy 最近建立了8家特许经营餐厅以实现第一个支 持目标(增加包括特许经营餐厅在内的餐厅数量)。其中一家特许经营餐厅位于 Maddy 品牌没有得到广泛认可的邻国。 Each franchise is owned and managed by a franchisee and is operated as a business which is totally separate from Maddy.The franchisee pays franchise fees to Maddy and in return is able to trade under the Maddy brand.All food items,cooking equipment,fixtures and fittings and marketing materials are provided to the franchisee by Maddy,to the extent that from the customer's point of view,a franchise restaurant is indistinguishable from one owned by Maddy.The franchise fees paid by the franchisee to Maddy have two elements: 每个特许经营权都由一个特许经营商拥有和管理，并作为一个完全独立于Maddy 的业务来经营。特许经营商向Maddy 支付特许经营费，并可以根据Maddy 品牌 进行交易。所有食品、烹饪设备、固定装置、配件和营销材料均由Maddy 提供， 从顾客的角度来看，特许经营餐厅与 Maddy 拥有的餐厅没有什么区别。特许经 营商支付给Maddy 的特许经营费有两部分： 1.A one-off set-up fee which varies in amount according to the size of a new franchise.This covers the costs of fixtures,fittings and equipment,as well as staff training and the initial marketing of the new restaurant in the local press and online, using social media and pay-per-click advertising.For some of the new franchises, the set-up costs incurred by Maddy have exceeded the set-up fee agreed with the franchisee and the board is keen to ensure that this does not happen in the future. 2.An on-going fee of 10%of the franchisee's revenue is paid to Maddy,in return for provision of an extensive IT infrastructure,continuing IT and marketing support, and licence to trade under the Maddy brand. Note:All food items must be purchased by the franchisee from Maddy and the costs of these are additional to the franchise fees. 1.根据新特许经营的规模而变化的一次性启运费。这包括固定装置、配件和设备 的费用，以及员工培训和在当地媒体和网上对新餐厅的初步营销。对于一些新的 特许经营项目 ，Maddy 的启运费已经超过了与特许经营商商定的启运费，董事会 希望未来不要再发生这样的情况。 2.特许经营商收入的10%的将支付给Maddy, 以换取IT 基础设施、持续的IT 和 营销支持，以及在Maddy 品牌下的交易许可证。 注：所有食品必须由特许经营商从 Maddy 处购买，这些费用是特许经营费用以 外的其他费用。 2.Performance reporting Before Maddy continues with the next phase of its growth plans,the board has asked you for advice relating to performance reporting at Maddy. The board wants you to evaluate whether the current performance report(Appendix 1), which it uses on a quarterly basis,is fit for purpose.The board has instructed that you are not required to evaluate the performance of any aspect of Maddy's business 在 Maddy 继续其下一阶段的增长计划之前，董事会询问了你并希望你据 Maddy 业绩报告提供相关的建议。 董事会希望你评估其目前每季度使用的绩效报告(附录1)是否适与其目的相匹 配。你不需要评估 Maddy 的绩效表现。 3.Minimum performance levels All franchisees are subject to minimum performance levels set by Maddy across a range of financial and qualitative measures.If a franchisee fails to meet these levels,a board member will visit the franchisee to help support them to improve performance. Continued failure could lead to termination of the franchise. 所有特许经营商都必须达到 Maddy 设置的一系列财务和定性方面的最低绩效水 平。如果特许经营商未能达到这些水平，董事会成员将访问特许经营商，以帮助 支持他们提高业绩。持续的未达到标准可能会导致总部终止其特许经营权。 Maddy has only recently started to collect data relating to cleanliness of the franchise restaurants.Cleanliness is one measure subject to minimum performance levels and is measured using customer surveys.Customers fill out a paper form giving just one overall score,between 1 and 5,for cleanliness and some other aspects of the quality of service and place these in a box in exchange for a chance to win a free meal.The franchisee collates these responses onto a spreadsheet at the end of each quarter and sends a summary of the results to Maddy for inclusion in the next performance report. Maddy 最近才开始收集有关特许经营餐厅清洁度的数据。清洁度是最低绩效水平 的衡量标准之一，并通过客户调查来具体衡量。顾客填写一张纸质表格，只给出 一个总分，在1到5分之间，然后把这些放在一个盒子里，以换取赢得一顿免费 餐的机会。特许经营商在每个季度末将这些回复整理到一个电子表格中，并将结 果摘要发给Maddy, 让其包含在业绩报告中。 The work the board requires on this area is in two parts: 1.The board would like you to explain the difficulties in interpreting data about cleanliness and advise it on the problems there may be with the data on cleanliness received from the franchisees. 2.The board has then asked you to recommend and evaluate possible alternative methods to assess the area of cleanliness. 董事会在这方面的需求分为两部分： 1.董事会希望你介绍解释清洁数据的难点，并就从特许特许经营商处收到的清洁 数据可能存在的问题提供建议。 2.委员会希望你推荐和评估其他适用的方法来评估清洁程度。 4.Transfer pricing proposal In 20X5,the first Maddy franchise restaurant established in a neighbouring country was opened.This restaurant is geographically close to Maddy's warehouse from where it distributes food items to its own restaurants and franchises in its home country.Food items can move freely between the two countries and there are no tariffs or administrative barriers to doing this. 20X5 年，在邻国建立的第一家Maddy 特许经营餐厅开业。这家餐厅在地理位置 上靠近 Maddy 的仓库，它从那里运输食品到它自己的餐厅和国内的特许经营餐 厅。食品可以在两国之间自由运输，而且没有关税或行政障碍。 Maddy usually negotiates fixed prices with food suppliers for one year,so it is also able to fix the price it charges franchisees for food items for the same period.The franchisee in the neighbouring country,while accepting that it must purchase all food items from Maddy,has asked that it be charged for these at the market price it would pay for the nearest equivalent products in its own country.The board has asked you to evaluate the franchisee's proposal. Maddy 通常与食品供应商商定的是一年的固定价格，因此它也能够确定在同一时 期向特许经营商收取的食品价格。邻国的特许经营商在接受必须从 Maddy 购买 所有食品时，提议按特许经营商所在国的近期同类产品的市场价格收取这些费用。 董事会已要求你评估特许经营商的提议。 5.Appendix 1 Performance report(Maddy)S'000 Year to date

explanation_zh: Requirements(50 marks) It is now 1 September 20X5. Write a report to the board of Maddy to respond to its instructions for work on the following areas: (i)performance reporting (14 marks) (ii)minimum performance levels:cleanliness Note:there are 10 marks available for the first part of the work required on this area and 8 marks available for the second part of the work required on this area. (18 marks) iii)transfer pricing proposal (8 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in communication, analysis and evaluation,scepticism and commercial acumen in your answer. (10 marks) 现在是20X5 年 9 月 1 日 。 向 Maddy 的董事会写一份报告，回应他在在以下领域的工作指示： (i) 绩效报告； (14分) (ii)最低绩效水平：清洁程度方面； 注：该小问所需完成的工作的第一部分有10分，该小问所需完成的工作的第二 部分占8分。 (18分) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (iii) 转移定价的提议； ( 8 分 ) 在回答中展示的沟通、分析和评估、怀疑和商业敏感性将获得专业技能分数。 ( 1 0 分 ) 三、答题思路： 这道题目是需要写一份报告，所以需要拥有报告的基础格式 Report heading 共四行，四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant/A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date: 指定日期/考试日期 标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据 section A 中第一个问题内容一般分为以下2种情况 评估Performance report——Performance reporting+management issues+ 公司名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+ 公司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结 section A 中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduction 能够运用连接词描述 Section A 中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:The board of Maddy From:An Accountant Date:1 September 20X5 Subject:Performance reporting at Maddy This report considers whether the current performance report is fit for purpose as Maddy begins the next stage of its growth plans,it then discusses problems relating to the reporting of minimum performance levels on cleanliness by franchisees.Finally,it evaluates a proposal to use an alternative method of transfer pricing for the first franchise to be established outside Maddy's home country. 本报告考虑了当前的业绩报告是否与Maddy 开始下一阶段增长计划的目标相匹 配，然后讨论了与特许经销商汇报清洁程的最低绩效水平相关问题。最后，评估 了一项 Maddy 在其祖国外建立的第一家加盟店相关的转让定价提议。 (i)Evaluation of the performance report 题目要求评价该报告，评价角度包含评价报告是否有助于实现企业的目标，是否 有包含有关决策的适当信息，是否有得到良好的呈现等。其中，评价报告是否有 助于实现企业的使命或目标是主要得分点。 分析该报告是否有助于实现企业的目标 (最多可获得10分): √ 从总体目标 (overall objective) 角度分析： √ 总体目标是使股东的财富最大化。报告中没有针对这方面的直接评估指 标 。 ·overall objective is to maximise shareholder wealth ■ no direct measure for this √ 报告中使用了投资回报率 (ROCE), 但与经济增加值 (EVA) 等其他 指标相比，ROCE 与股东财富的相关性较低。 ·Return on capital employed(ROCE)is given ·but this does not correlate well with stem_zh: Q2 一 、题干解析 1.Company information Morlich plc is a retailer based in Teeland.The company offers a complete optical care service including eye tests and the prescription and supply of contact lenses, spectacles and optical aids.All prescribed items are ordered by Morlich from supplying companies. Morlich 是一家总部位于Teeland 的零售商。该公司提供完整的光学护理服务， 包括眼睛检查、隐形眼镜和框架眼镜的配置以及其他服务。所有提供的产品都是 由Morlich 从供应公司订购的。 Morlich's main objective is the maximisation of shareholder returns through providing:‘an excellent service which is renowned for being the best in its field and supplying goods of perfect quality. Morlich的主要目标是通过提供：“在其所处的领域众所周知的最好的服务，并提 供完美质量的商品”来实现股东回报最大化。 Morlich has several shops throughout Teeland and all the shops operate to the same processes and procedures.The industry Morlich operates in is increasingly competitive where brand strength is becoming an important critical success factor and customer satisfaction is seen as key.Other companies are increasing their advertising spend to enhance their brand strength and are also keen to maximise their intellectual capital by employing knowledgeable employees because such employees are seen as key in enhancing and developing brand strength. Morlich在 Teeland有几家商店，所有的商店都按照相同的流程和程序运作。 Morlich所在的行业竞争日益激烈，品牌实力正在成为一个重要的成功因素，并 且客户满意度被视为关键指标。其他公司正在通过增加广告支出，以增强品牌实 力，此外还热衷于雇用知识渊博的员工来最大化它们的智力资本，因为这类员工 被视为增强和发展品牌实力的关键。 2.Benchmarking exercise The chief executive officer(CEO)of Morlich has been concerned recently about the decline in Morlich's operating margin.She asked Morlich's management accountant to undertake a benchmarking exercise to try to ascertain if this is an industry-wide issue.He collected the financial data presented in Appendix 1 for both Morlich and its main competitor in Teeland,Shiel,for the last financial year but has now left the company.Included with this data are the measures the management accountant felt the benchmarking exercise should address. Morlich 的首席执行官(CEO)最近一直在担心Morlich 营业利润率的下降。她要求 Morlich的管理会计师进行对标测试，以确定这是否在全行业普遍存在。管理会 计收集了附录1中列出的Morlich及其在Teeland的主要竞争对手Shiel上一个财 政年度的财务数据，但现在他已经离开了公司。这些数据包括管理会计认为对标 测试工作应评估的指标。 The CEO has asked you,as a management consultant in this area,to complete the benchmarking exercise by calculating the suggested performance measures and evaluate whether these measures are appropriate and sufficient for this industry. 首席执行官要求作为该领域的管理顾问的您，通过计算建议的绩效指标来完成对 标测试，并评估这些指标对该行业是否适当和充分。 3.Current process The current process for ordering the spectacles and contact lenses involves the optician asking an and commercial acumen in your answer.(5 marks) 回应Morlich CEO在以下领域的工作请求： (b)目前的流程(8分) 在回答中表现出的分析和评估技能、怀疑精神和商业头脑将被授予专业分数。(5 分 ) 三、答题思路 本道题目分成两部分回答。 第一部分，给出BRP 的定义，1分 第二部分，评估如何通过业务流程改善(BPR) 来改进当前的订货和收货流程， 一 点一分。 √Business Process Reengineering(BPR)定义 ■ 业务流程再造(Business Process Reengineering,BPR)寻求发起剧烈的、根 本性的变化，而不是对现有流程进行改进。它从是否需要进行这些活动 这一基本问题的前提出发。 · BPR eeks to initiate dramatic,fundamental change rather than make improvements to an existing process. · starts from the premise of the basic question as to whether these activities need to be undertaken at all √ 如 何 改 善 ■ 减少供应商数量。 似乎有太多的供应商，应该减少到少量的认定的供应商。如果负责发起 订单的工作人员实际亲自下订单，也可能对Morlich 更有利。眼镜商可 能可以在自己的计算机系统上完成这一操作，而不必将订单提交给管理 员 。 ● reduce the number of suppliers it deals with. · have too large a number of suppliers · should be reduced to a small number of approved suppliers. · the staff responsible for initiating the order actually place the order · do this on their own computer systems rather than taking the order to an administrator ■ 控制交付日期和时间。 可以指定送货的时间(例如，周二上午9点到12点之间),并确保在当天 下午3点之前联系所有客户。如果有必要，可以针对这个时间段提供额 外的行政支持。 · having more control with regard to the delivery dates and times · denote a specific time for all deliveries(for example,between 9 and 12 on a Tuesday morning) · ensure that all customers are contacted by 3 pm on the same day · ensure extra administrative support,for this time. ■ 改变流程。 眼睛商直接向一小部分供应商下订单，然后由这些供应商直接将货物送 到客户手中。即使这会让Morlich 在一开始有成本支出，但是最终会节 省资金，因为Morlich 目前花时间检查货物，但根据它的检查，这些货 物接近完美，并且很少受到客户的投诉。这也可以减少丢失货物的可能 性，丢失货物肯定会损害财务状况和客户满意度。这可能就是目前客户 满意度(只有50%)相对较低的原因。与 Shiel相比，目前的流程肯定是造 成利润率相对较低的原因，至少是部分原因。 · for opticians to place the order directly with a small group of suppliers · for those suppliers to send the goods directly to customers ·involved an initial cost · probably save money · remove the possibility of losing goods · responsible for the relatively low customer satisfaction rating of 50% · certainly likely to be responsible,at least in part,for the relatively low profit margin ■ BPR 可能需要改变公司文化。 这家公司是分层结构，订单被传递给管理员进行处理，管理员负责检查 货物并向客户提供建议。BPR 传统上更偏向扁平化结构，这意味着需要 改变分层结构，因为任何潜在的问题都成为整个团队的问题，而不是某 个部门的问题。眼镜商可能不会满足于承担传统上被认为是行政性质的 任务，尽管事实上这将在整个过程中节省Morlich 的钱。 · require a shift in culture · hierarchical in nature · BPR traditionally flattens structures · a shift from a hierarchical structure as any potential problems become the problems of the entire team and not of a certain department · Opticians may not be content to incur tasks which were traditionally seen as being administrative in nature · despite the fact that it would be saving Morlich money over the course of the entire process

Q1. 一、题干解析 1.Company information It is made up of three divisions:Doilet,Essan and Fada. 它由三个事业部组成：Doilet,Essan 和 Fada。 Doilet makes basic refigerators which are sold across all of its geographical markets. Diolet 生产基础款冰箱并在所有地区销售。 Essan makes high-quality,premium-priced refrigerators for sale in the wealthier markets in which it operates. Essan生产高质量、高价的冰箱，销往其经营的富裕市场。 Fada makes a variety of hardware and software systems which link refrigerators and other household goods to a home management system which,for example,in the case of the refrigerators,will automatically scan the contents of the refrigerator and reorder food from web-based suppliers as required. Fada生产各种可将冰箱和其他家庭用品与家庭管理系统连接起来的硬件和软件 系统。例如，就冰箱而言，该系统将自动扫描冰箱中的物品，并根据需要从网 络供应商处重新订购食品。 The business has concentrated on growth over the last five years but its weak share price performance has led to complaints from its investors,who feel that their wealth is not being maximised.The board believes that they need to take an overview of the whole business,beginning with its performance measurement methods.They have engaged a consultant to perform a Boston Consulting Group(BCG)analysis of the position of the three divisions and from this,they want to look in more detail at the performance measurement and management issues within each division. 过去5年，该公司一直专注于增长，但其疲弱的股价表现引发了投资者的抱 怨，他们认为自己的财富没有得到最大化。董事会认为，他们需要从绩效评估 方法开始，对整个公司进行总结。他们聘请了一名顾问对三个事业部的情况进 行 BCG 分析，并希望从这些分析中更详细地研究每个部门的业绩评估和管理问 题。 2.Divisional performance measurement Calavie uses return on investment(ROI)as a strategic performance indicator to assess the three divisions.There has been debate at the board level as to whether this is an appropriate divisional performance indicator.The bonuses of the management of each division are assessed against this indicator.As the year's performance report is being prepared,the chief executive officer(CEO)has suggested that you evaluate the performance of the three divisions using both ROI and a suggested replacement, residual income(RI). As part of this work,she wants you to include an analysis of the different ways these measures could be calculated,taking into consideration the effect of head office costs and the effect of the research and development and brand marketing costs.She needs the calculations you provide to be clear and justified. Calavie 使用投资回报率(ROI)作为战略绩效指标来评估三个事业部。对于这是 否是一个适当的部门绩效指标，董事会一直存在争论。每个事业部管理人员的 奖金是根据这一指标来评定的。在准备年度业绩报告时，首席执行官(CEO)建 议您使用ROI和 RI 来评估三个事业部的业绩。作为这项工作的一部分，她希 望你考虑到总部成本的影响，以及研发和品牌营销成本的影响，对这些指标的 不同计算方法进行分析。她需要你提供的计算清晰合理。 She also wants you to evaluate the appropriateness of ROI and RI for divisional performance measurement.At this stage,she does not want any other indicators to be considered .She has supplied you with data in Appendix 1 to do this. 她还希望你评估 ROI 和 RI 对事业部绩效衡量的适用性。在这个阶段，她不希 望任何其他指标被考虑。她已经为你提供了附录1中的数据。 3.BCG analysis The consultant's BCG analysis is given in Appendix 2.The CEO wants you to assess how this can be used to assist in performance management generally and then,using your knowledge of performance measurement to apply it to each division in turn, recommending,with justification,up to two suitable,financial key performance indicators(KPIs)for each division. 咨询师的 BCG 分析见附录2。CEO 希望您评估如何使用这一方法来辅助绩效管 理，然后使用您的绩效衡量知识将其依次应用到每个事业部，并为每个部门推 荐最多两个合适的财务关键绩效指标(kpi),并进行论证。 4.Management information The existing information systems at Calavie have been developed within each division and the divisions separately supply reports to head office for use by the company's executive. Calavie 现有的信息系统是在每个事业部内部开发的，它们分别向总部提供报 告，供公司执行层使用。 Each division operates on a functional basis with its own manufacturing,sales and marketing and administration departments.As a result,the board feels that they lack a clear understanding of what is driving the performance of each division.The CEO wants to redesign existing information systems to bring the divisions and the board into a closer information can improve the communication from Calavie's divisions to the company's executive. 每个事业部都有自己的生产、销售、市场和行政部门。董事会觉得他们对推动 每个部门业绩的因素缺乏清晰的理解。CEO 希望重新设计现有的信息系统，使
