Doilet为其所有地理区域市场生产基础款冰箱。管理层的目标是在增长不明显 的市场中成为成本领先者。 Essan makes high-quality,premium-priced refrigerators for sale in the wealthier markets in which it operates.The divisional management has successfully created a market-leading brand which is seeing high growth in both sales and profits as its markets are becoming wealthier still.However,the competition and requirement to spend heavily on brand-building makes this a riskier business sector. Essan生产高质量、高价的冰箱，销往其经营的富裕市场。部门管理成功地创造 了一个市场领先的品牌，随着市场变得更加富裕，销售和利润都在高速增长。 然而，竞争和在品牌建设上要投入大量资金，使这一业务部门的风险更高。 Fada was set up to create a system to link refrigerators to a home management system. This project was initially successful and as a result,it was realised that there were other opportunities to link household items into the internet.Fada has pursued a number of such development projects to launch a number of new products.However, there have been technical difficulties and varying levels of sales of these new products.As a result,Fada is only one of many similar sized companies within this market segment and it has seen weak financial results,while requiring considerable investment to support its development. Fada 的建立是为了生产一个连接冰箱和家庭管理系统的系统。这个项目最初是 成功的，因此，人们意识到还有其他机会将家庭用品连接到互联网上。Fada 已 经进行了一些这样的开发项目，推出了一些新产品。然而，这些新产品存在技 术上的困难和不同的销售水平。因此，在这个细分市场中，Fada 只是众多类似 规模的公司之一，它的财务业绩很弱，需要可观的投资支持其发展。 BCG categorization: Doilet can be reasonably treated as a cash cow as it is one of the two largest businesses by market share in a low growth market. Essan is the star of Calavie as it is the market leader in a rapidly growing market. Fada is a problem child as it is in a high-growth market but does not have a large market share. Doilet 可以被合理地视为现金牛，因为它是一个低增长市场中市场份额最大的 两家企业之一 。 Essan 是 Calavie 的明星，因为它是一个快速增长的市场的领导者。 Fada 是一个问题儿童，因为它在一个高增长的市场，但没有很大的市场份额。 二 、问题解析 Write a report to the board of Calavie to respond to the CEO's instructions for work on the following areas: 写一份报告给Calavie 的董事会，以回应CEO 在以下领域的工作指示 (i)divisional performance measurement 评估每个事业部的业绩表现 (ii)the BCG analysis BCG 分析 (iii)management information at Calavie Calavie 的管理信息 三、答题思路： (i) 事业部业绩评估16分。需要根据案例里division 段落中的描述把问题拆分以 下三个部分。
1. 使 用ROI 和 RI 两个指标，评估三个事业部业绩。都算对给1分，三组不同 的 ROI 和 RI 共计6分。

2. 分别算出不同部门的ROI 和 RI, 从以下三个角度： 1)从部门角度，可包含不可控成本，直接带入附录数字不做任何调整 2)从部门经理角度，只考虑可控成本，加回head office cost 不可控成本 3)从可以带来长期收益的角度，类似于经济利润，同时在operting profit和 capital employed中加回R&D,marketing expense。 讨论和评价算结果。每一点1分，最多8分，需要应用案例信息结合数据分 析每种计算角度的特点。 3 . 对 比ROI 和 RI 不同的业绩评估作用，每一个点1分，最多5分。 · 计算三个事业部的ROI 和 RI Workings: Doilet Essan Fada Simple measures: Non-controllable ROI (operating profit/capital employed) 16% 28% 23% Non-controllable RI (operating profit-notional charge)($m) 33·4 45·3 3·6 Adjusted measures: Controllable ROI(HO costs added back to operating profit) Controllable RI(HO costs added back to operating profit) 22% 69·4 34% 59·3 29% 5·6 Long-term spending as an asset(R&D and brand marketing added back to operating profit and to capital employed) Non-controllable ROI Non-controllable RI 17% 37·8 32% 56·9 38% 10·7 · 讨论和评价算结果。 √ 从部门角度分析 (Simple measures): ■ 指出以部门角度评估的优点： They make a healthy ROI beating both the cost of capital and the industry average. all divisions make a positive residual income which again implies healthy returns. 所有部门都表现良好。它们的投资回报率高于资本成本和行业平均水 平。此外，所有部门的剩余收入都是正的，这也意味着健康的回报。 ■ 指出以部门角度评估的缺点： do not take account of the controllability of the profits of the divisions nor the long-term effect of some of the spending of the divisions. 没有考虑到各部门利润的可控性，也没有考虑到各部门某些支出的长期 影响。 √ 从可控性角度分析： The appropriate measure of the divisional management's performance should only include those elements which are controllable by them. it would be counter-productive if the divisional management felt this was being measured unfairly. 评估部门管理者绩效的适当指标应只考虑他们可控制的因素，所以总部 分摊的成本应该排除。这一点尤其重要，因为管理者的薪酬取决于这一 衡量标准，如果部门管理者认为这一衡量标准不公平，就会产生反效 果 。 √ 从能带来的长期收益的角度： The capitalisation and amortisation of these costs may encourage divisional management to persist with these plans for the long-term benefit of Calavie. Essan通过营销建立长期品牌， Fada 通过研发建立产品组合。应当考虑 是否适当将这些项目支出作为期间成本，还是应将其资本化，然后在较 长时期内从资产负债表中冲销。这些成本的资本化和摊销可能会鼓励部 门管理层为了Calavie的长期利益而坚持这些计划。 √ 一次性成本对利润计算的影响： the use of operating profit in all of these calculations avoids the problem of including one-off costs(e.g.the restructuring costs)which would occur if profit before tax were used. 在所有这些计算中使用营业利润避免了包括一次性成本的问题。如果使 用税前利润，就会产生重组成本。 ·Comparing ROI and RI √ROI 的优缺点 ROI is a simple,commonly used measure of divisional performance. However,it can encourage divisions to delay investment in new assets since this measure improves as assets are depreciated with age. ROI是衡量部门绩效的一种简单、常用的方法。但是，随着资产使 用年限的增加，可能会导致各部门推迟对新资产的投资。 √RI 的优缺点 RI offers the possibility of applying different costs of capital to divisions with different risk profiles which is appropriate for Calavie,especially at the higher risk Fada. RI提供了部门面对不同风险应用不同资本成本的可能性，这适用于 Calavie, 特别是在风险较高的Fada。 RI would not help to judge relative divisional performance at Calavie as the divisions are not of similar size and so an absolute measure is not comparable. RI因为各部门的规模不同，所以绝对度数方式评估业绩是不可比较的。 √ROI 和 RI 共同的缺点 neither of the indicators is directly aligned with the aim of increasing shareholder wealth and so do not ensure a detailed match between divisional and corporate goals. 这两个指标都与增加股东财富的目标不直接相关，因此也不能确保部门 目标与公司目标之间的详细匹配。 Both ROI and RI have the disadvantage of being based on profit measures of performance rather than cash. ROI和RI 的缺点都是基于业绩的利润衡量，而不是现金。净现值和经济 增加值等指标使用的是现金流，它们受会计准则解释的影响较小，与股 东利益更直接相关。 (ii) 需要根据案例关于BCG 段落中描述把问题拆分以下两个部分。该题目可以 得到的分数会比18分多，请同学找到自己擅长的easy mark来作答。
1. 整体评价BCG 模型帮助企业进行有效的业绩管理，也就是BCG 应用对组织 业绩的优缺点。每点1分，最多6分

2. 应用BCG 模型对每个division 分别分析。每个division 最多6分，三个 division 最多18分。 每个division 分析可以通过以下三个方面展开： 1)根据案例的信息和在BCG matrix中的位置，识别每个division的战略。 2 分 。 2)建议两个评估指标。每个1分，共2分。 3)评价每个指标。每个1分，共2分。 ● 整体评价BCG 模 型 √ 优 点 ： it allows the company to view the prospects of its different divisions.A different style of management should be applied to each division based on this analysis. 公司看到其不同部门的前景。根据这种分析，每个部门应该采用不同 的管理风格。 举例： ■ Those businesses which are in faster growing sectors will require more capital to be invested and may not generate cash as efficiently from profits(e.g. Fada). 那些在快速增长领域的业务将需要更多的资本投资，并且可能无法从 利润中有效地产生现金(例如 Fada)。 ■ those businesses in slower growing mature markets should have a focus on cost control and cash generation. 那些在增长较慢的成熟市场的企业应该把重点放在成本控制和产生现 金上。如现金牛特别是瘦狗业务部门，不应该被关闭，因为如果管理得 当，它们可以在耗尽时提供丰富的现金来源。 √ 根据不同的division 在 BCG 中的定位建议不同的指标 · 举 例 ：The metrics for high growth prospects,Essan and Fada,will be based on profit and ROI while those in lower growth,such as Doilet,will be focused on margins and cash generation. 高增长率的Essan 和 Fada 可选择利润和ROI 做为评估指标，而增长较低 的 Doilet将专注于利润率和现金流。 √ 缺 点 ： using relative market share measured against the largest competitor 使用相对市场份额来对比最大的竞争对手，其中1和0被用作大和小之 间的分界线，这意味着每个市场只有一个star 或一个cash cow。 · BCG was designed as a tool for product portfolio analysis rather than performance measurement. BCG 是为分析产品组合而设计的，而不是绩效评估工具。作为一种绩效 体系，它似乎降低了利润和股东财富等传统的绩效衡量标准，可能与所 有关键利益相关者的目标不太一致。尽管这在过去可能是一个合适的观 点，因为Calavie 专注于增长，但现在可能不再是这样了。 ■ different products within each business unit may not fit the unit's classification.For example,Fata seems to have a variety of products performing at different levels. 每个业务单元内的不同产品可能不符合该单元的分类。例如，Fata有各 种不同水平的产品。 ■ The model also fails to consider the links between the business units 模型也没有考虑到业务单位之间的联系，例如，在Essan开发的品牌和 产品可能对Doilet产品有重大影响。 · 应 用BCG 模型对每个division分析 Doilet √Doilet 的战略 ■ Doilet should focus on cash generation to fuel the growth of the other divisions 作为cash cow,Doilet应该专注于产生现金，以推动其他需要品牌建设 和研发的部门的增长。 ■ It should also focus on cost control in order to meet its aim to be a cost leader. 为了达到成为成本领导者的目标，它还应该关注成本控制。 √建议评估指标+评价指标 ■ cash flow ROI or more simply net operating cash flow for the period may be better overall measures. 现金流ROI或更简单的当期经营性净现金流可能是更好的综合衡量指 标。 gross or operating profit margin compared to the industry average could be suitable. 为了实现成为成本领先者的目标，与行业平均水平相比的毛利率或营业 利润率都是合适的。这些措施之间的决定将取决于与竞争对手相比，非 生产间接费用的重要性。 Essan √Essan 的战略 ROI or RI should be used depending on the board's decision about which is to be the measure of divisional performance. 作为明星，Essan的衡量标准是利润。因此，ROI 或 RI应该根据董 事会的决定来作为部门绩效的衡量标准。It would appear that growth has been important in the past to Calavie and √建议评估指标+评价指标 ■ as the principal generator of growth for the company,this should continue to be monitored by growth of profit before tax.在过去，增长似乎对Calavie 很重要，作为公司增长的主要动力，这应该继续通过税前利润的增长来 监控。 ■ the strength of Essan's brand which appears important from its marketing spending. Essan品牌价值，从其营销支出来看，这一点很重要。 Fada √Fada 的战略 Fada depends significantly on research and development in order to develop a portfolio of new products. 为了开发一系列新产品，Fada 很大程度上依赖于研发。 √ 建议评估指标+评价指标 ■ revenue growth as a method of measuring the success of these new products.R 应该以收入增长作为衡量这些新产品成功与否的标准。在产品开发的早 期阶段，以利润为基础的衡量标准可能并不合适。 the research and development spending since this willneed to be maintained in the face of failures as the division seeks to find successful products for its portfolio. 第二个衡量指标可以是研发支出，因为在面临失败的情况下，该部门需 要为其产品组合寻找成功的产品，因此需要保持研发支出。 (iii) 需要根据案例管理信息段落描述把问题拆分以下三个部分。

3. 关于质量的优质信息的特点，以及在本案例中的应用，每一个特点2分，共 计最多8分，如果不结合案例仅仅概述特点，最多给4分。 ● 管理信息系统的作用 √The general aims of management accounting information are to support measuring performance,controlling the business,planning and making decisions. 管理会计信息的一般目的是支持衡量业绩、控制业务、计划和决策。 · 安东尼管理模型 √Performance measurement will occur at different levels within the organization 业绩评估需要贯穿于组织的每个层级。 √It also links to the assessment of the performance of individuals 与个人业绩的评估挂钩，例如，支付给部门经理的奖励是基于部门业 绩。 √allows the business to be controlled by measuring performance against targets or budgets. 通过评估业绩是否达成目标或预算来进行控制。要及时提供这些信 息，以协助制定计划和预测。 √managers must make decisions at strategic,tactical and operational levels of the business. 管理者必须在企业的战略、战术和运营层面做出决策。这些通常需要如 利润率或在运营层面的生产一个组件的平均时间的管理信息。 · ACCURATE 原则，分别举例阐述。 √ Accurate -That is fair and free from bias. 举例：There is a danger that,motivated by the desire for the reward payment,divisional management provides an overly positive view of their performance. 精确意味着公平并没有偏见。例如，受奖金欲望的驱使，部门管理层对 他们的业绩提出了过分积极的看法是会带来威胁的。 √Complete -All information must be reported. 举例：project failures at Fada must be reported so that lessons can be learned for further new product development. 完整是必须报告所有信息。例如，必须报告Fada 的项目失败，以便为进 一步的新产品开发吸取教训。 √Cost-beneficial-The information should be more valuable than the cost to produce it. 举例：This would be especially true at Doilet since the business is mature and may not merit heavy investment as it is a well-understood division. 成本效益要求信息应该比生产它的成本更有价值。在Doilet 尤其如此， 因为该业务已经成熟，可能不值得投入大量资金，因为它是一个很好理 解的事业部。 √User-targeted-It is important that the divisions do not swamp the executive with detailed operational information so that they are unable to obtain an overview of the business. 以用户为目标。各部门不要向高管传达过于详细的运营信息，以免他们 无法获得业务的总体信息。 √Relevant-Different board members will have different skills and areas of interest and they should be supplied with more detailed information appropriate to those responsibilities,while all of the board should receive the same overview information. 相关。不同的董事会成员有不同的技能和感兴趣的领域，他们应该得到 与这些职责相适应的更详细的信息，而所有的董事会成员应该得到相同 的总体信息。 √Authoritative -The source of the information should be suitably qualified. 举 举例：This may require board information to be reviewed and signed off by senior divisional management if it is produced at a lower level within the division. 权威指信息的来源应该是适当的限定。这可能要求董事会信息由部门内 较低级别的高级部门管理人员审查和签署。 √Timely-Information must reach the executive in time so that they can make strategic plans in time. 及时。信息必须及时到达管理层，以便他们能及时制定战略计划。 √Ease to use -The information should be formatted for easy understanding. 举例：Financial information should be presented in a standardised format to make for easy comparison between divisions. 易于使用指选择合适的信息格式将易于理解。财务资料应采用统一格 式，以便各部门之间进行比较。使用单一的、商定的部门业绩衡量标准 将有助于做到这一点。

4. 应对虚拟世界中出现的新形式的犯罪 新部长希望在前三个方面得到明显改善，因为她当时政治竞选活动就是以批评上 届政府在这三面方面的明显失败为基础的。普遍认知，在第二个领域，主要的问 题是如何抓住罪犯，因为根据历史经验，罪犯一旦被抓住就很有可能被送上法庭。 第三个领域，为了查明和解决犯罪的原因，目前正在通过增加地方社区的参与来 解决这个问题。第四个领域虚拟世界犯罪(使用计算机而推动的犯罪)在上届政府 中几乎没有建树，部长希望看到在这个方面建立一个特别工作组，负责发展侦测 和检控虚拟犯罪的技巧。 2.CSFs and KPIs In a recent meeting with the CEO,the Minister indicated that she felt that the four key areas were too vague and in order to better focus actions,the Minister's adviser has suggested the following critical success factors (CSFs): 1.Greater protection and more support for those at risk of harm 2.Be better at catching criminals 3.Reducing the causes of crime by increased involvement with local communities 4.Create a task force to develop skills in detection and prosecution of virtual crime Initially,the CEO did not see why the four key areas originally given could not be used as CSFs.He wants you to provide justifications in the light of the Minister's concerns for the changes which the adviser has made to each of these.Then,using the above CSFs,he wants youto provide justified recommendations ofup to twokey performance indicators(KPIs)per CSF in order to measure performance. In order to help you with the KPIs,the CEO has provided you with a table of data (Appendix 1)which has been used in the past when considering DP's performance. However,you are allowed to suggest new data which would help in measuring performance.The CEO has made it clear that at this stage,no calculations are required. 最近部长在与首席执行官的一次会谈中表示，她认为四个关键领域过于模糊，为 了更好地采取行动，部长的顾问建议了下列成功的关键因素：

4. 成立一个特别行动小组，负责发展侦测和检控虚拟犯罪的技巧 最初，CEO 不明白为什么最初的四个关键领域不能用作CSFs 。他想让你说明部 长的顾问对每一处改动的理由。然后，根据上面的CSFs, 他希望您为每个 CSF 提供最多两个合理的绩效指标(KPIs)的建议，以便衡量每一个成功关键因素的绩 效表现。 为了便于制定 KPIs,CEO 为你提供了一个数据表(附录1),这是过去在衡量 DP 的绩效时使用的数据。不过，你可以提出有助于衡量绩效的新数据。CEO 已经明 确表示，关于这部分，不需要进行任何计算。 3.Value for money Since DP is funded wholly through Deeland's general taxation,the CEO wants to be able to report on whether DP is providing a value for money(VFM)service as required by the new mission statement.He has heard of the 3Es(economy,efficiency and effectiveness)but needs an explanation of these three headings and how this links to the work on CSFs and KPIs already requested.Then,he requires an evaluation,using the data given in Appendix 1,of whether DP provides such a service.He understands that the evaluation may be limited,as Appendix 1 may not give a data set to perform a full VFM exercise. 由于DP 的资金完全来自Deeland 的税收，CEO 希望能够报告DP 是否按照新使 命的要求提供了物有所值(VFM)的服务。他听说过3E(经济性、效率性和效益性), 但需要解释这三个标题的具体含义，以及这些与之前要求的 CSFs 和 KPIs 之间 的联系。然后，他要求使用附录1中给出的数据对DP 是否提供这样的服务进行 评估。他知道这个评估可能是不全面的，因为附录1可能没有提供执行完整VFM 所需的所有数据。 4.League tables The Minister is interested in benchmarking as this was often done during her days in business.As a result,she joined an international initiative for creating a league table of fire service data by sharing information with other nearby countries.The CEO believes that the Minister will want to introduce this idea for DP and so wants an evaluation (including recommendation)of the use of an international police force performance league table and its link to targets for DP.The CEO is especially concerned about the police officers'reaction to this new idea as they have a powerful union,which has widespread public support.Therefore,he also needs you to explain how the use of league tables and targets might affect police officers'behaviour. 部长对标杆管理很感兴趣，因为这是她还在企业工作时经常使用的工具。因此， 她加入了一个国际倡议，通过与其他邻近国家共享信息，创建一个消防服务数据 排行榜。首席执行官认为，部长会想要在 Deeland警力引入这一想法，因此希望 对使用国际警察部队业绩排行榜及其与 Deeland 警力目标的联系进行评价(包括 建议)。首席执行官特别关心警察们对这个新想法的反应，因为他们有一个强大 的工会，得到了公众的广泛支持。因此，他还需要你解释使用排行榜和目标对警 察行为的影响。 5.Appendix 1 Deeland Police data for each year ending 30 June 20X5 20X4 20X3 Population('000s) 11,880 explanation_zh: A ll页 教 育ON It is now 1 September 20X5. 108,347 297,954 7,624 84% 2,248 2,026 20X5 11,880 37,930 12,320 541,735 108,347 297,954 7,624 84% 2,248 2,026 106,180 300,934 7,512 86% 2,226 2,103 20X4 11,761 38,005 12,197 530,900 106,180 300,934 7,512 86% 2,226 2,103 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 104,056 303,943 7,483 87% 2,203 2,141 20X3 11,644 38,400 12,075 520,282 104,056 303,943 7,483 87% 2,203 2,141 Write a report to the CEO of the Department for Internal Affairs to respond to his instructions for work on the following areas: (i)the critical success factors and key performance indicators for Deeland Police;(16 marks) (ii)an evaluation of the value for money service provided;and(14 marks) iii)the use ofleague tables in measuring the performance of Deeland Police.(10 marks) Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in communication, analysis and evaluation,scepticism and commercial acumen inyour answer.(10 marks) 现在是20X5年 9 月 1 日 。 向内务部首席执行官写一份报告，回应他在以下方面的要求： (i)Deeland 警察的关键成功因素和主要绩效指标；(16分) (ii)评估所提供服务的物有所值；和(14分) iii)使用排行榜衡量Deeland 警察的工作表现。(10分) 在回答中展示的沟通技巧、分析和评估、怀疑精神和商业头脑将获得专业分数。 高顿教育 CANE GEEY.RAFNNGOLDEN EDUCATION CANE GEEY.RAFNN (10分) 三、答题思路： 这道题目是需要写一份报告，所以需要拥有报告的基础格式 Report heading 共四行，四要素中缺少一个不得分，四要素顺序错误不得分 To: 接收对象+公司名 标准：正确的接收对象，可无公司名称 From: 指定角色/Management accountant/A accountant 标准：除文中指定角色，其它均可 Date:指定日期/考试日期 标准：指定日期优先 Subject: 根据section A 中第一个问题内容分为以下2种情况 评估performance report— Performance reporting +management issues+ 公司名 其它知识点——Performance measurement and management+公 司名 标准：除以上原则外，可总结section A中问题的知识点(可参考2019 M/J) Introduction 能够运用连接词描述 Section A 中所有问题；缺少一个问题描述不得分。 To:The CEO,Department of Internal Affairs (DIA) From:An Accountant Date:1 September 20X5 Subject:Performance measurement and management at Deeland Police(DP) This report recommends and justifies critical success factors(CSFs)and key performance indicators(KPIs)for DP based on the four critical areas of performance. DP is then evaluated on the value for money(VFM)provision of its service.Finally, the use of a league table of police performance and the setting of targets for DP is assessed,with comment on the employee reaction to such a management approach. (i)Critical success factors(CSFs)and key performance indicators(KPIs) 需要解决以下两个问题： 1.provide justifications in the light of the Minister's concerns for the changes which the adviser has made to each of CSFs, 给 出CSF 更改的原因。 在构建答案时，需要说明新的CSFs, 并针对每一个新的CSF 具体说明修改 原因，所以可以用每一个 CSF 作为回答的副标题。修改的主要是让 CSF 要 符合SMART 原则，也就是Specific 明确的，Measurable 可衡量的，Achievable 可达成的，Relevant 相关的，Time-limited 有时限的。所以可以从这几个点来 回答 √Greater protection and more support for those at harm ■ a straight-forward improvement 更明确 √ Be better at catching criminals ■ bringing them before the courts does not appear to be critical 更明确 √Reducing the causes of crime by increased involvement with local communities ■ improvement using the mechanism suggested 更明确 √Create a task force to develop skills in detection and prosecution of virtual crime ■ as desired by the Minister 更明确以及可衡量的 2.using the above CSFs,he wants you to provide justified recommendations of up to two key performance indicators(KPIs)per CSF in order to measure performance 根据上述的CSFs, 每一个提出最多2个合理的KPI 因此在构建答案的时候需要给出最多2 个可以衡量的 KPI, 给多会对 professional marks造成影响。此外给出的KPI 还需要进一步分析，说明这些 KPI 为什么可以衡量相应的CSF √Area 1 ■ 关于 protecting的 KPI -Percentage change year on year of the number of victims of violent crimes ■ 关于 supporting的 KPI -Percentage change of staff hours spent with each victim on average in support activities. ■ 进一步分析 · 两个指标目前都无法衡量因为没有数据 ◆ Neither can be measured ◆ data is not collected · 第一个指标可以通过衡量暴力犯罪的受害者人数来间接解决，如果 得到更好保护，这个指标应该下降 ◆ indirectly addressed by measuring the number of victims of violent crimes ◆ a fall if those at risk are better protected √ Area 2 ■ 关于 clear-up rate的 KPI -the percentage change in the percentage of crimes solved. ■ 进一步分析 · 将抓住的罪犯送上法庭并不是重要衡量领域，因为不送上法庭概率 很低 ◆ bringing the criminal before the courts once caught does not appear 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 高顿教育 to be a critical area ◆ low risk possibility · 关键衡量领域是确保犯罪案件被解决并送上法庭 ◆ Ensuring crimes are solved and criminals are brought before the courts' √Area 3 ■ 指标： -the percentage change in the total number of crimes in Deeland in the year. ■ 进一步和分析 · 减少犯罪原因可以让这个 KPI 长期下降，用三年数据通过移动平均 方法得出趋势 ◆ create a long-term trend downwards ◆ better to use a three-year moving average of the change · 犯罪的根本原因无法准确衡量，因为影响因素很多，给出的指标很难 衡量改变是否可能长期稳定 ◆ underlying causes of crime may not be accurately measured ◆ whether the changes are sustainable in the long term,which will be difficult to do √ Area 4 ■ 指标： -percentage of roles in the task force filled 因为是新领域，可能不知道需要有多少员工和应该具备什么资质 -percentage of virtual crimes reported which are solved 此指标可以显示任务组的效率 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM ■ 进一步分析 · 目前数据无法衡量这两个指标 ◆ not sufficient to measure this. (ii)Value for money(VFM) 需要回答以下三个方面的问题 1.an explanation of these three headings解 析 3E 的意思 √Economy 经济性 ·the optimisation of the resources资源最优化 ensuring the appropriate quality of input resources are obtained at the lowest cost 确保以最低的成本获得合适质量的投入资源 √Efficiency 效率性 ·the optimisation of the process by which inputs are turned into outputs 如何投 入产出流程最优化 √Effectiveness 效益性 how the outputs of the organisation meet its goals 产出如何满足组织的目标 2.how this links to the work on CSFs and KPIs already requested 3E 如何跟之前的CSF 与 KPI 相关联 √Effectiveness与效益性有关 √The KPIs measure the achievement of the goals of DP. KPI 衡量是否达成 DP 的目标 √outcomes rather than processes or inputs in this case 因此与结果有关，与流 程或者投入无关 3.Considering the situation at DP specifically 衡量 DP 在 3E 方面表现如何。这部分需要包含计算，并且需要说明改变的 情况和含义 ■因为没有外部数据，所以这份衡量是根据历史数据比较 ■ no data is given ■ VFM can only be judged against previous years’data ■Economy-looking at the cost of buying inputs ● 衡量指标 ·the principal input is staff-90.1%of total costs ● the cost per employee -$40,318 · 改变情况 ·3·8%reduction on the previous year · 原 因 ◆ mix of staff is changing with more administrative staffreplacing police officers ◆as police officers may be more expensive ◆ useful to obtain the average police officer salary ■ 含义(目前无法判断，需要跟相似国家的或者其他外部指标比较) · should compare to external figures such as the national average wage · or the average salary of staff in other police forces in similar countries ■ Efficiency ● 衡量指标 ·Solved crimes per police officer- 20X5:7.855,20X4:7.918,20X3:7.915 · Solved crimes per employee(police officers and admin staff)- 20X5:5.929,20X4:5.994,20X3:6.022 · Police officers per 1,000 population- 20X5:3.19,20X4:3.23,20X3:3.30 · 改变情况 ·The trend in the number of police officers is downward ·The number of crimes which each is solving is falling -down 0·8%from 20X3 ■ 含义：Performance in this area is therefore poor. ■ Effectiveness-从四个CSF 方面衡量 ■ Protection and support of those at risk ● 衡量指标 ◆ The percentage of violent crime ◆ no measure of support provided. · 改 变 情 况 ：remains flat over the three years of data at 20%of the total number of crimes reported · 含 义 ：remains broadly unchanged ■ Solving crimes ● 衡量指标 ◆ The clear-up rate ◆ no measure of support provided. ● 改 变 情 况 ：fallen from 56.7%to 55.0% · 含义：reflects the change in staff mix as police officer numbers have fallen ■ Causes of crime ● 衡量指标： Number of crimes reported in the year · 改 变 情 况 ：upwards with an increase of 2%each year over the last two years · 含义：reflect the falling numbers of police officers in DP ■ Virtual crime ● 衡量指标： not possible to measure (iii)League tables 本道问题也涉及两个方面的回答 1.an assessment of the use of an international police force performance league table and its link to targets for DP 评估排行榜以及说明跟DP 目标的关联，答题的框架也就是排行榜的优点及 缺 点 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM √ 优 点 ： ■ effectively benchmarks performance ■ positive effect on behaviour ■ can indicate areas of best practice ■ offers the possibility of improving performance by copying that best practice. ■ relative performance. √ 缺 点 ： ■ only measures relative performance. · The best force could be producing an unacceptable performance in absolute terms ■ Different external environments ■ Difficult to get a single measure √ 与DP 目标的关联 ■ how to rank the different forces ■ selection of the areas &the weighting given to them · affect the position of the different forces ■ what gets measured,gets done · DP management will change their priorities · undermine the alignment of their behaviour with the given mission ofDP ■ calculation of the rank must encompass the key variables which will drive DP’s desired performance 2.How the use of league tables and targets might affect police officers'behaviour 排行榜对警员行为的影响 √whether they feel a sense of accountability for the score ■ do not feel that they can affect the rank ·ignore it · actively undermine it in public through their union's public statements present the government with difficulty ■ police are considered the experts ■ criticism will carry weight with the electorate √demotivated by the league tables ■ rank does not reflect the valuable work which they do · 举例：creating the new virtual crime task force ■ rank is driven by factors outside of their control. · 举例：the budget for the force may be cut,or there may be a link between the number of crimes reported and the economic conditions in Deeland

stem_zh: Q2 一、题干解析 Company information Coruisk is a clothing manufacturer in Teeland which produces a range of dresses which it sells to Ericht.The range of dresses are the only products which Coruisk produces and Ericht is its only customer. Ericht is a well-known retailer in Teeland.Ericht has recently been affected by changes in consumer purchasing preferences to buying clothes online and,as a result,is keen to reduce its inventory holding as a way of reducing its costs.Ericht is also finding that it has an excess of goods which it has to discount as,consumer tastes appear to change more quickly than in the past. 公司是 Teeeland 的一家服装制造商，生产一系列的服装，卖给Ericht 。这一系列 的服装是Coruisk 生产的唯一产品，而 Ericht 是它唯一的客户。 Ericht 是 Teeeland 的知名零售商。最近，消费者在网上购买服装的购买偏好发生 了变化，因此，Ericht 需要减少库存，以降低成本。Ericht 还发现，由于消费者 的口味似乎比过去变化得更快，导致商品过剩，而不得不打折出售。 Current purchasing policy Coruisk currently obtains its raw material from four suppliers.Each of these suppliers operates differently in terms of the processes and procedures which they adopt in trading with Coruisk.Coruisk has been agreeable to this,as the quality of the raw material supplied has generally been acceptable. More recently,however,Coruisk has found reason to question the accuracy and quality ofthe raw material delivered from one supplier.Additionally,another supplier now only despatches material to Coruisk in full-load quantities as it wishes to optimise the use of its delivery vehicles. Coruisk 目前从四家供应商采购原材料。这些供应商在与 Coruisk 进行贸易时采 用的流程和程序各不相同。Coruisk 对此表示同意，因为所提供的原材料的质量 一般是可以接受的。 然而，最近 Coruisk 发现有理由质疑一家供应商提供的原材料的精确性和质量。 此外，另一家供应商现在希望优化其运输车辆的使用，所以只有当原材料装满车 辆时才向Coruisk 发货。 Current production method The performance metric at Coruisk for production efficiency is the number of dresses 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION produced per period.Coruisk's method of production is to produce individual dresses in long production runs which has helped in maximising output.Staff working in the production department have their bonus based on this metric. Coruisk has a practice of testing goods at the final stage of production and before they leave the factory.Goods which have not been produced to the required standard have traditionally been rejected at the end of the production process.Coruisk's production control manager has indicated to you that the current production methods have been successful,as the company only has 5%of its goods returned from Ericht due to poor quality. 评估 Coruisk 生产效率的指标是每期生产的裙子数量。Coruisk 的生产方法是长 时间生产单独款式的衣服有助于产量最大化。在生产部门工作的员工的奖金是基 于这个指标的。 Coruisk 在生产的最后阶段和出厂前都会对产品进行检测。没有达到标准的产品 通常在生产过程的最后阶段才会被拒绝。Coruisk 的生产控制经理已经向你表示， 目前的生产方法是成功的，因为公司只有5%的货物因为质量问题从Ericht退货。 JIT and costs of quality Ericht would like to move to a just-in-time (JIT)system of purchasing its goods from Coruisk and as a result Coruisk is contemplating major changes to its working practices. Coruisk's CEO has asked you,as a management consultant,to assess the changes which Coruisk will have to make in the areas of purchasing and production in order to supply goods to Ericht on a JIT basis. Ericht 希望从 Coruisk 采购产品时采用 JIT, 因此Coruisk 正在考虑对工作进行重 大改革。Coruisk 的 CEO 要求你作为管理顾问评估使用JIT 将在采购和生产领域 发生的变化，以便向Ericht 供应商品。 Coruisk's CEO has also made available to you a cost of quality report which she believes addresses all relevant costs of quality.This report is in Appendix 1. Coruisk 的 CEO 还向您提供了一份质量成本报告，她认为该报告涵盖了所有相关 的质量成本。这份报告在附录1中。 She would like you to discuss the potential quality cost changes in light of the proposed move to JIT.She indicated that some of these costs have never been measured before and have been given financial values to help you in your discussion.She also told you that Coruisk's current revenue is $4.5million. 她想让你讨论一下，考虑应用JIT 后潜在的质量成本变化。她指出其中一些以前 从未评估过的成本是否具有财务价值，来帮助您进行讨论。她还告诉你 Coruisk 目前的收入是四五百万美元。

4. 使用VBM 可能遇到的困难。 3.Measuring value ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM The directors are unsure of a suitable financial performance indicator for them to use to measure whether Totaig is creating value.As an illustration,they have asked you to evaluate,by calculating economic value added (EVA),whether Totaig has generated value for the year to 30 June 20X5.You should use the financial information given in 董事们不确定是否有合适的财务业绩指标来衡量该公司是否在创造价值。他们要 求您通过计算经济增加值 (EVA) 来评估Totaig 是否在资产负债表日为20 X5 年 6月30日的这一年中产生了价值。计算 EVA 时需使用附录2中提供的财务信 息 。 Appendix 1 Four steps in implementing VBM Step 1-Produce a strategy for maximising value Step 2-Define performance targets Step 3-Create a plan to achieve the targets Step4-Set up measurement and reward systems Appendix 2 A B C D E F G H 1 J 1 Income statement for the year to 30 June 20X5 2 3 $'000 4 5 Operating profit 10,000 6 Interest expense Gd (1,500) 7 Profit before tax 8.500 8 Tax at 22% (1,870) 9 Profit after tax 6,630 10 11 Notes: 12 1.During the year $450,000 of advertising cost that will generate sales in future periods was expensed to the income statement 在这一年中，能在未来期间给企业带来收入的$450,000的advertising cost 作为费用记入了利润表。 13 2.The allowance for doubtful debts at the end of the period was $300,000,a reduction of $200,000 from the beginning of the period allowance for doubtful debts的在年末的金额是$300,000,期间(一年中) 减少的金额是$200,000 14 3.The capital employed at the beginning of the period was $88,944,000 期初的CE为$88,944,000。 15 4.Totaig's after-tax weighted average cost of capital(WACC)is currently 9%.The company is financed by a mixture of equity and fixed and floating rate loans 加权平均资本成本WACC为9%,公司的资金来源是股权及固定利率和 高顿教育GOLDEN EDUCATIONCANE GEEY.RFNN 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION CANE GEEY.RFNN 浮动利率贷款。

Q1. 一、题干解析 1.Company information Belivat Manufacturing (Belivat)is a world leader in the manufacture of temperature sensors used in many industrial processes.It aims to deliver growing returns to its shareholders in the long-term. Belivat Manufacturing(Belivat) 是生产在许多工业流程中使用的温度传感器的 世界领导者。它的目标是在长期内为股东带来不断增长的回报。 It operates in an increasingly competitive environment where profit margins are under pressure.In order to address these forces,the board of Belivat has decided that they need to change their strategic approach.They intend to increase revenue and drive down costs by becoming more innovative in the two keys aspects of the business:the development of new products;and the production process. 在竞争日益激烈的环境中，公司的利润率面临压力。为了解决这些问题， Belivat董事会决定他们需要改变战略方针。他们打算通过在两个关键业务方面 的创新来增加收入并降低成本：研发新产品；以及生产过程创新。 Currently,the business uses standard costing and incremental budgets in order to control costs.The same methods of production and accounting have been used for many years at Belivat.The board recognises the need for a cultural change to fit the new strategic approach.The board also believes that they have an excellent workforce which is under-utilised.It has been decided that this can be capitalised upon by two changes (one to product development and the other to the general production process). Product development should be addressed by a more project-based approach,where products are developed by teams of workers.In addition,the organisation of production of all products will also now be handled by teams whose aim is to reduce costs as far as possible while maintaining competitive levels of quality. 目前，企业使用标准成本法和增量预算来控制成本。Belivat多年来一直采用相 同的生产和财务核算方法。董事会意识到需要进行文化变革，以适应新的战略 方针。董事会还认为，他们拥有一支优秀的劳动力，但利用率不足。公司已决 定通过两项改革来提高优秀劳动力的利用率(一项是产品开发，另一项是生产 流程)。产品开发应采用基于项目的方法，由团队开发产品。此外，所有产品 的生产现在也将由团队负责，其目标是尽可能降低成本，同时保持具有竞争力 的质量水平。 The board has begun discussing these changes and the chief executive officer(CEO) has asked you,as a performance management expert,for your assistance on a number of proposals relating to changes to costing and budgeting at Belivat.There is also a plan to improve the operation of the warehouse by introducing new technology in inventory management. 董事会已开始讨论这些变化，首席执行官 (CEO) 已要求您作为绩效管理专家 ,就成本和预算变化相关的多项建议提供帮助。此外，还计划通过在库存管理 中引入新技术来改善仓库的运营。 2.Product development budgeting It is proposed that a new budgeting method be used for new product development and it has been suggested that zero-based budgeting(ZBB)may be a more useful approach. 有人建议将新的预算方法用于新产品开发，并建议零基础预算(ZBB ) 可能是 一种更有用的方法。 The CEO wants a critical comparison of ZBB with the existing method of budgeting. This should include a description of the ZBB approach and how this fits with Belivat's plans and aims. 首席执行官希望对ZBB与现有预算方法进行批判性比较。这应包括对ZBB 方法 的描述，以及该方法如何符合Belivat的计划和目标。 3.Kaizen costing The board has been investigating new methods of production and cost control in order to achieve the cost reductions needed to remain competitive.The board has been considering various Japanese production control techniques and has shown particular interest in the possibility of introducing Kaizen costing to replace the existing standard costing system. 董事会一直在研究新的生产和成本控制方法，以实现保持竞争力的同时降低成 本。董事会一直在考虑各种日本生产控制技术，并希望引入Kaizen成本法以取 代现有的标准成本法。 As none of the board are experts,the CEO has requested an explanation of the process of Kaizen costing,the implications of the change in costing method for production management and a recommendation as to whether this change is appropriate for Belivat. 由于董事会成员都不是专家，首席执行官要求解释Kaizen成本计算流程、成本 计算方法的改变对生产管理的影响，并就此改变是否适用于Belivat提出建议。 4.Interaction of ZBB and Kaizen In the discussion of the budgeting and costing changes at a recent board meeting,one director suggested that ZBB should become the method of budgeting for the whole business (beyond just product development).Another director expressed concern that Kaizen costing did not fit with ZBB,neither on practical nor cultural terms.The board meeting then dissolved into a confused discussion of the new costing and budgeting methods. The CEO would like you to provide the board with an evaluation of whether Kaizen costing would fit with ZBB in controlling production costs at Belivat. 在最近一次董事会会议上讨论预算和成本变化时，一位董事建议ZBB应成为整 个企业的预算编制方法(不仅仅是产品开发)。另一位董事表示担心，无论是 在实际操作还是文化方面，Kaizen成本法和ZBB有冲突。董事会会议随后陷入 了对新成本计算和预算方法的混乱讨论。 首席执行官希望您向董事会提供一份评估报告，评估Kaizen成本法是否适合于 使用ZBB控制Belivat的生产成本的企业。 5.Inventory management Belivat has large warehouses containing a large inventory of many different types of sensors so that they can offer quick solutions to customer orders.However,as the business has grown,the scale of the warehouse operation has outgrown its ability to efficiently pick products for orders and identify obsolete items.The CEO believes that by tagging all items with radio-frequency identification devices (RFIDs)picking would be made more efficient,inventory control would be simpler and obsolescence reduced.She is aware that this has cost implications beyond merely buying and placing tags on each item in inventory and she wants your advice on the costs and benefits of introducing such a new system.As part of this advice,she has asked that you quantify your conclusions where possible using the illustrative data for one warehouse in Appendix 1. to those packages deemed acceptable within the overall budget limits. 将资源分配给那些在总体预算限额内被认为可接受的决策包。 2.比 较ZBB和incremental budgeting(最多获得10分) √两种预算方法本身特点，先写出不同，在分别描述两种方法的特征。 ·the starting point预算起点不同 √process of continuous improvement is achieved by elimination of waste and the improvement of the quality of manufacturing activities. 持续改进的过程是通过消除浪费和提高生产活动的质量来实现的。 √Continuous improvement is an incremental process where the employees work in teams and make changes to day-to-day activities. 持续改进是一个渐进的过程，员工在团队中工作，并对日常活动进行更改 √This process is incremental and not radical.It fits with the plan to move to team- based production where quality circles are set up in order to drive these small improvements to activities. 这个过程是渐进的，而不是激进的。这符合转移到基于团队的生产的计划 ,在那里建立质量圈，以推动这些活动的小改进。 2.Kaizen costing对生产管理的影响-(最多获得6分) √对比与标准成本，首先介绍标准成本法的特点 ·control rather than reduce costs.控制而不是降低成本 ■ assume manufacturing processes are not changing 假设生产过程没有改变 Standards are set often for a year and improvement. 在文化上，员工被赋予权力，并被视为解决需要改进的解决方案的来源。 ·fit with the target of reducing cost and being more innovative in production processes. 符合降低成本和在生产过程中更加创新的目标。 addresses the competitive pressures on ZBB代表了对现有增量预算控制方法在文化上的巨大变化。 2.Kaizen costing与增量预算的相同和不同之处，以及和ZBB 在文化和实施方面 的不同。 √ 与增量预算的相似点 ■ has some similarities to incremental budgeting in that each period sees changes based on the previous control targets. 与增量预算有一些相似之处，因为每个时期都会根据以前的控制目标进行变 化 。 √ 与增量预算不同之处 ·different in that it demands reductions on these targets rather than the inflationary increases 不同之处在于，它要求削减这些目标，而不是随着通胀增加成本目标。 √ 论 述Kaizen costing 和ZBB在文化和实施方面的不同 ZBB:Starting from scratch with each period's budget does not fit with Kaizen costing ZBB 从零开始，不符合Kaizen成本法 ·Kaizen costing:builds its targets on the previous period's costs with agreed reductions applied. Kaizen 在前一时期的成本基础上制定目标，目标是成本降低 √ 总 结 ： ·Although both approaches build their control of costs from the bottom-up and have the similarity of demanding improvement,ZBB demands a more dramatic rethinking of budgets and so there will be a cultural mismatch. 尽管这两种方法都是从自下而上建立成本控制，并且具有要求改进的相似性 , 但ZBB 要求对预算进行重新思考，因此会出现文化上的不匹配。

Q2 一 、题干解析 1.Company information Eck is a privately owned,capital-intensive manufacturing business.It has several similarly sized divisions which operate as profit centres.These divisions operate in different regions of Eck's home country,where the average tax rate is 40%and where the average rate of interest for commercial lending is 6%.Eck is financed by equal amounts of equity and debt. Eck是一家私立的、资本密集型的制造业企业。它有几个规模类似的部门作为利 润中心运作。这些部门在Eck所在国家的不同地区经营，它们的平均税率为40%, 商业贷款的平均利率为6%。 Eck的资金一半来股权融资一半来自债权融资。 Eck's overall objective is to maximise shareholder wealth.The company's board of directors,who are also the shareholders,make allinvestment and financing decisions. Eck的总体目标是使股东的财富最大化。公司董事会成员(他们也是股东)负责 所有的投资和融资决策。 The board is considering expanding Eck's product range,which will require the company to purchase a large amount of new plant and machinery.The shareholders are unable to provide any more capital and are unwilling to issue any form of equity finance. Eck is already close to breaching borrowing conditions and limits set by its lenders and is unable to raise any more debt finance. 董事会正在考虑增加Eck的产品系列，这将需要公司购买大量的新工厂和机器设 备。股东无法再追加投资，也不愿进行任何形式的股权融资。Eck目前已经快要 违反贷款条件和债权人设定的约束条款了，因此也无法进行更多的债权融资。 Eck has recently revised the estimated useful economic life of existing large items of manufacturing plant,which is permitted under local accounting regulations. Eck最近修改了对现有大型制造工厂的预期使用寿命的估计，这是当地法规所允 许 的 。 2.Measuring divisional manager performance The board has recently been told that if the plans to expand its product range are to be successful,Eck needs better systems for measuring the performance of divisional managers and rewarding them.None of the divisional managers have any financial qualifications or experience.The board is,therefore,considering two possible measures of divisional manager performance:EBITDA(earnings before interest,tax, depreciation and amortisation)and EVA(economic value added)and would like you, as 1. 评估用EBITDA 评价部门经理绩效的可用性. 评估时候可结合其优点和缺点进行分析，官方参考答案在分析时候主要从其优点 (Proxy to cash flow 、easy to calculate and objective 、Clear view of operating performance) 的角度进行了展开，最后提及了少量缺点： √Proxy to cash flow ■ calculated by adding back interest,tax,depreciation and amortisation to net profit EBITDA 是通过在净利润的基础上加回利息、税、折旧和摊销来计算的。因 此，它通常被视为现金流的替代品。 ■ align managers'objectives with the need to maximise cash flow during this period 董事会正在考虑扩大该公司的产品范围，使用EBITDA 来衡量部门经理绩效 表现有助于使得经理的目标与公司的需要(这一时期最大化现金流)相一致。 " shareholders are unable to provide finance for the expansion and unwilling to allow new equity to be issued; unable to take on further borrowings; seems reliant on cash generated from trading operations to fund the expansion 目前股东无法为扩张提供资金也不愿公司发行新的股权，且公司也无法获取 额外的借款，这意味着公司可能会依赖于日常经营产生的现金来进行扩张。 ·a proxy for cash generated from trading operations; be considered a relevant measure for Eck 现金流对 Eck 来说显然很重要。由于EBITDA 是经营活动产生的现金流的替 代性指标，它可以作为评价Eck 的一个相关指标。 not take into account the cost of purchasing plant and machinery and investment in working capital required for the expansion; other measures relating to cash flow may also be needed EBITDA 没有考虑到购买工厂和机械的成本，以及扩张所需的营运资本。因 此，还可能需要使用其他与现金流相关的指标。 √EBITDA is easy to calculate and objective ·be easy to calculate using figures from the statement of profit or loss EBITDA 可以较容易的通过利润表中的数字算出来。 ·not have financial qualifications or experience,and who are familiar with having their performance measured using divisional net profit 但目前还不确定这是否能被部门经理理解，因为他们没有任何财务资质或经 验而且已经习惯了用部门净利润来衡量自己的业绩。 ·need some training or support in order to fully understand the calculation of EBITDA 部门经理可能需要一些培训或支持，才能充分了解EBITDA 的计算。 excludes subjective assessments,such as the useful economic lives of assets and the amortisation period for development costs allows managers'performance to be measured more objectively EBITDA 排除了资产使用寿命和研发成本的摊销期这些主观因素的影响， 这使得 EBITDA 可以更客观地衡量经理的绩效。 √Clear view of operating performance ·not include finance costs and tax to lenders and to the government respectively; gives a clear assessment of operating performance EBITDA 不包应分配给债权人和政府的利息和税(利息和税不反映经营业绩)。 因此可对企业的经营业绩进行清晰的评估。 removes these uncontrollable factors,as well as depreciation,from the measurement of managers'performance; to increase their motivation to improve performance; Eck operates in a high tax economy. 用 EBITDA 进行绩效评估移除了(利息、税)这些不可控因素以及折旧、摊 销的影响，这有助于激励管理层提高业绩表现。考虑到Eck 在高税率地区运 营，这些因素的影将是显著的。 √ 用EBITDA 衡量部门绩效的缺点： value of capital employed ·changes in working capital used to generate the EBITDA 2.EVA 的计算 √ 计算 NOPAT: $m Controllable net profit 50.0 Add back:Interest net of tax at 40%($20m×0.6) 12.0 Add back:Development costs 5.0 Less:Amortisation of development costs($5m/5) (1.0) NOPAT 66.0 调整： DELIVERY-PLATINUM · 加回净利息 (interest (1-tax rate)=$20m×(1-40%)=$12.0m因为是从税后利润 开始调整的(net profit是税后的)。 · 加回本年度的研发支出$5.0m, 因为它是未来可为公司带来利益的，需要资 本化而不是费用化。 ·研发支出资本化后需要在5年里进行摊销，因此需减去今年的摊销 $5m/5=$1m √ 计 算 期 初 CE (即本题中的Assets) $m Opening net assets 496.0 Economic value of net assets 496.0 研发支出资本化影响的是期末CE而不影响期初的，所以此处不用调整。 √ 计算WACC Equity:50%×15% 0.075 Debt:50%×12%×(1-40%) 0.036 0 ·111 or 11 · 1% √ 计 算EVA: EVA=NOPAT-CE×WACC=66.0-496×11.1%=10.9 √ 结 论 ： EVA为$10 ·9m, 即Blue division这年为股东创造了价值。

Q3 一 、 题干解析 1.Company information Scye is a listed company of architects who imagine concepts for new buildings and then prepare detailed plans for their production.The business'performance has fluctuated over years and recently seen a reduction in profits. Scye是一家上市的建筑师事务所，公司的主要服务是为新建筑提供设计图以及 详细的建造计划。这家公司的业绩多年来起伏不定，最近利润有所下降。 The shareholders have demanded greater focus on their long-term returns rather than the quarterly dividend and a new chief executive officer(CEO)has been put in office, along with several new directors,in order to achieve this aim. 股东们要求公司更多地关注他们的长期回报，而不是季度股息。为了实现这一 目标，该公司聘请了新的首席执行官(CEO) 和几位新董事。 The new CEO has identified that the system of performance measurement and management is at fault in the business losing focus.It is based on a dashboard containing a wide mix of more than 15 financial performance indicators drawn from the financial reporting records from across the activities of the organisation.The report then benchmarks these indicators against competitors.Regular reports on these indicators are used at board meetings to guide the management of the business. 新任首席执行官已经认识到，目前的绩效评估和管理系统存在问题，会让公司 失去重点。目前的系统是基于一个仪表盘，其中包含超过15项财务绩效指标， 这些指标来自该企业记录的各个活动的财务报告。然后，将这些指标与竞争对 手进行比较。关于这些指标的定期报告会在董事会会议上用于指导业务管理。 2.Value-based management The CEO was at a recent meeting of business leaders where he heard that a move to value-based management(VBM)might help achieve the shareholders'goal. However,he was warned then that the use of economic value-added(EVATM)as a primary measure would not be ideal for VBM.Also,one of the new,non-executive directors at Scye commented that he had found EVATM to be complex to understand and so Scye's board has agreed to avoid its use. 这位首席执行官在最近的一次商业领袖会议上听说，改用以价值为基础的管理 (VBM)可能有助于实现股东的目标。但是，当时有人警告说，使用经济增加值 (EVATM) 作为主要评估指标对于以价值为基础的管理(VBM) 并不理想。此外 ,Scye 的一位新的非执行董事说，他发现EVAT 很难理解，所以Scye的董事会 都同意不使用EVATM。 The CEO requires you to provide an understanding of the basic principles of VBM and then evaluate VBM compared to the existing performance dashboard,which is based around traditional profit-based measures of performance.He wants your evaluation to include both how VBM would affect the different management levels (strategic,tactical and operational)in Scye and how its implementation would affect the organisation. 首席执行官要求您了解VBM的基本原理，然后将VBM与现有的业绩仪表盘进行 比较，后者是基于传统的以利润为基础的绩效衡量方法。他希望你的评估既包 括VBM 将如何影响Scye的不同管理层(战略、战术和运营),也包括它的实施将 如何影响公司。 3.New project appraisal The next work the CEO requires is an example calculation of shareholder value (using the net present value(NPV)method)and he has given you information in Appendix 1 in order to allow you to do this for a new project at Scye.The project is the purchase and use of a new graphic visualisation system which will give a virtual tour of any new building design. CEO要求的下一个工作是一个计算股东价值的例子(使用净现值(NPV)方法),他 在附录1中给了你信息，以便让你对Scye的一个新项目做这样的计算。该项目是 关于购买和使用一种新的图形可视化系统，该系统可以对所有新的建筑设计进 行虚拟参观。 A non-executive director had also mentioned modified internal rate of return(MIRR) as another indicator that he had seen used to assess projects and so the CEO also wants a calculation of this for this same project and a final recommendation. 一位非执行董事也提到了用于评估项目的另一个指标-修正内部收益率(MIRR) ,因此首席执行官也想你对同一项目进行MIRR 的计算，并提出最终建议。 4.Appendix 1 Information gathered on the new graphic visualisation system: 1.The system is expected to earn an additional $6.4m each year after operating costs. 2.Operating costs include $8m of depreciation per year. 3.Additional costs beyond those in operating costs for marketing and training staff are estimated at $0.7m in year 1. 4.Tax willbe charged at 20%paid in the year profits occur and all costs including depreciation are deemed allowable. 5.There willbe an initial spend of$25m to purchase the system,which will be totally replaced as new systems become available. 6.The project will last for 3 years. 7.It is reasonable for this exercise to assume that all revenue and costs will be paid or received in the year incurred. 8.Working capital of 10%of the revenue after operating costs will be put in place at the start of year 1 and then working capital will be recovered at the end of the project. 9.Scye's discount rate for such projects is 10%based on its cost of capital. 关于新的图形可视化系统收集的信息：
8. 收入扣除运营成本后的10%,将作为营运资金在第1年开始时投入，然后 在项目结束时回收该营运资金。 9.Scye 对此类项目的贴现率是10%,这个比例是基于它的资本成本得出的。 10 公式

3. 结 论 ：The impact of Chairn's brand on revenue is a benefit of $43·2m(= $88·2m-$45m)per year.This is consistent with the 20X5 retail revenue figure for the company of $86·8m.Chairn 品牌对收入的影响是每年43,200万美元(=88,200万美元-4500万美元)。 这与该公司20X5 年零售收入86,800万美元的数字一致。 问题2 .Explain what standard deviation means in the context of this report and assess its importance to the results. Standard deviation标准差，每点1分，最多6分 √ 解释定义： o The standard deviation of a population measures the degree to which the population is accurately characterised by its mean. 总体的标准差衡量的是总体的均值准确表征的程度。 o A high standard deviation implies that many of the population are far away from the mean and so it is risky to draw conclusions using the mean in calculations. 标准差数值高意味着总体偏离平均值，因此在计算中使用平均值得出 结论是有风险的。 √ 结合案例说明(根据附件2中信息): o the standard deviation of 17 is near this highly polarised situation, suggesting people are either strongly aware or unaware of Chairn's brand. 1 ·7的标准差接近高度两极分化的情况，表明人们对 Chairn 的品牌要 么有强烈的认知，要么没有认知。 o This may be a result of the way the questions were asked in the survey,such that those sampled only felt they could give answers at the extremes. 这可能是调查中的提问方式造成的，被抽样者觉得他们在现场只能给 出极端的答案。 o it would be incorrect to assume that most of the population had an awareness characterised by the score of about 3(2·9). 这意味着假设大多数人的知名度给分约为3(2 ·9)是不正确的。 o important in designing the marketing to improve brand awareness 这对于设计提高品牌知名度的营销活动非常重要。 o the aim will be to target those scoring 1(unaware)in awareness,not 3(who are a small segment of the population) 因为营销活动的目标是针对那些在知名度上给分为1(不知道)的人， 而不是3分(他们只是群体中的一小部分)。

Q2 一、题干解析 1.Company information Avich is a recent start-up company in the gas exploration industry and sells,after some re-processing,the natural gas which it extracts from the ground to larger energy companies.Avich is based in Deeland where it currently operates two sites(Avich A and Avich B)and is looking for a third site,to be known as Avich C.The global market price of gas is at an all time high and Avich plans to exploit this by opening up to eight new sites,also in Deeland,in the next five years. Avich是一家最近刚成立的天然气勘探公司，它从地下提取天然气，经过一些加 工后，出售给更大的能源公司。Avich 总部位于 Deeland, 目前在 Deeland 运营 着两个站点(Avich A和 Avich B),并正在计划建立第三个站点Avich C。目前全 球天然气市场价格处于历史最高水平，根据这一情况，Avich 计划在未来五年内 在 Deeland开设多达8个新站点。 Avich obtains gas using a process called fracking.This involves pumping water at high pressure deep underground,which forces gas up to the surface.The gas is then processed and sent by tanker to Avich's customers. Avich 使用一种叫做水力压裂的方法来获取天然气。这个方法是用高压将水注入 到地下深处，迫使气体上升到地表。然后，这些气体经过处理，由油轮运送给 Avich的客户。 Fracking is a controversial process which has attracted criticism.It is alleged that fracking may release toxic pollutants into the surrounding environment and can also create earth tremors which could damage property.Fracking is also criticised for maintaining reliance on fossil fuels,such as gas,rather than developing greener and more sustainable alternatives,such as wind or solar power. 水力压裂法是一个有争议的方式，也招致了很多批评。据称，水力压裂法可能 会向周围环境释放有毒污染物，还可能造成轻微地震，有可能损害财产。水力 压裂法还被批评会让企业继续依赖天然气等化石燃料，而不是开发更环保、更 可持续的替代方法，如风能或太阳能。 Environmental protests led to the closure of Avich B for several weeks recently,as local residents were angry that the site was allowed to operate in an area of scenic beauty and scientific interest.All fracking sites in Deeland require government permits in order to operate and must do so under strict environmental and operating conditions. 最近，环境抗议活动导致Avich B关闭了几个星期，因为当地居民对 Avich B被 允许在一个风景秀丽和具有科学价值的地区运营感到愤怒。Deeland 的所有水力 压裂站点都需要政府许可才能运营，并且必须遵循严格的环境和操作条件。 2.Environmental management accounting(EMA) Avich has recently recruited a new chief financial officer(CFO),who has a strong record of helping start-up companies with high growth potential to obtain an early listing on the Deeland stock exchange.She has never worked in the gas industry, however,and is unfamiliar with some of the management accounting practices within it,specifically on the reporting and management of environmental costs.She has been reading about environmental management accounting(EMA)and asked for your help on two matters: Avich最近招聘了一名新的首席财务官(CFO) 。这位 CFO 在帮助具有高增长潜力 的初创公司在Deeland 证券交易所尽早上市方面有着充足的经验。然而，她从未 在天然气行业工作过，对该行业的一些管理会计实践，特别是环境成本的报告 和管理并不熟悉。她一直在阅读有关环境管理会计(EMA)的知识，并在两件事 上向您寻求帮助： -An allocation of the environmental costs for Avich A provided in Appendix 1 to the following categories of environmental costs -environmental prevention costs, environmental detection costs,environmental internal failure costs and environmental external failure costs.As part of this work,the CEO has asked that you justify your allocation and calculate the annual cost for each of the four categories ofenvironmental costs,where relevant. -将附录1中提供的Avich A的环境成本按以下环境成本类别分配-环境预防成 本、环境监测成本、环境内部失败成本和环境外部失败成本。作为这项工作的 一部分，首席执行官要求你证明你的分配的合理性，并计算四类环境成本中每 一类的全年相关成本。 -Advice on how consideration of environmental matters could help Avich to manage performance in areas other than identifying and managing environmental costs. -就考虑环境事项如何有助Avich 管理除确定及管理环境成本外其他范畴的表现 提供意见。 3.Life cycle costing Avich has not yet found a suitable location for the new site,Avich C.Finding a new location involves undertaking test drilling to establish the existence of underground gas reserves at different sites.This requires the work of geologists who need to determine if there are enough reserves to make fracking at the site financially worthwhile.Test drilling also requires the use of heavy equipment which is expensive to rent.Avich would also have to engage independent experts to assess the potential impact of fracking on the surrounding environment.Only after all this is done can Avich apply for a permit to operate at the site.The Deeland government currently approves 10%of all applications for fracking permits. Avich尚未为新站点Avich C找到合适的位置，寻找新站点需要进行试验钻井， 以确定不同地点的地下天然气储量。这个工作需要由地质学家完成，需要他们 确定现场是否有足够的储量，让水力压裂站点具有经济价值。试验钻井还需要 租用昂贵的重型设备。Avich 还必须聘请独立专家来评估水力压裂对周围环境的 潜在影响。只有在所有这些都完成后， Avich 才能申请站点运营的许可证。 Deeland政府目前只批准了所有水力压裂许可证申请中的10%。 The CFO has heard of a concept called life cycle costing and wants you to explain the benefits of using life cycle costing for the management of performance of the new site, Avich C. 首席财务官听说过一个叫做生命周期成本的概念，他希望你解释使用生命周期 成本来管理新站点Avich C在绩效方面的好处。 Environmental costs at Avich A during the year ended 30 June 20X5 截至20X5 年 6 月 3 0 日Avich A的环境成本 1.A local farmer has issued a legal claim against Avich for $300,000 for rebuilding a 200-year-old barn.He alleges that the barn was destroyed by an earth tremor caused by fracking at the Avich A site,which is 20 kilometres away.Avich does not accept liability for this but is prepared to offer $50,000 to avoid any bad publicity arising from the case. The farmer is believed to be willing to accept this.

1. 一名农民向Avich提出法律索赔，要求 Avich为重建一个有200年历史的谷仓 支付30万美元。他声称谷仓是被20公里外的Avich A的水力压裂引起的地震破 坏的。Avich不接受这一指控，但准备提供5万美元，以避免任何由此案件引起 的负面公众影响。据信，农民愿意接受这个条件。 2.Avich pays an independent scientist to monitor ten local rivers for traces of pollutants which might be caused by fracking.The cost of this is $2,500 per river each month. 2.Avich 雇佣了一名独立科学家来监测当地十条河流中可能由水力压裂法产生的 污染物。每个月每条河的费用是2500美元。 3.Waste water from fracking cannot be stored in open pools or tanks,but must be stored in special sealed tanks so that pollutants do not soak into the ground.Avich A has three tanks which cost $120,000 each and will last for the four-year economic life of the Avich A site,after which they will need to be de-commissioned at a total cost of $240,000 for all three tanks.Avich only became aware of the new environmental regulations driving the high value of these costs after the Avich A site became operational. 3.水力压裂法产生的废水不能储存在开放的水池或容器中，必须储存在特殊的 密封容器中，这样污染物就不会渗透到地下。Avich A有三个容器，每个花费12 万美元，可以使用四年。四年后需要处置这些容器，三个容器的总处置成本为 24万美元。在Avich A站点开始运营后，Avich 才意识到新的环境法规让这些成 本增高。 4.A consignment of gas delivered to one of Avich's customers was found to have a slightly different chemical composition to normal,which meant the customer had to be given a refund of$175,000,which was 5%of the value of the consignment. 4.交付给Avich的一位客户的一批天然气被发现与正常的天然气的化学成分略有 不同，这意味着需要退这批货物价值的5%给客户，也就是退款17.5万美元。 Note:A vich has many environmental costs and these costs for Avich A are only a small number of them. 注：Avich有很多环境成本，这些关于Avich A的成本只是其中的一小部分。

Q3 1.Organisation information Gare University(GU)is a university in Beeland.It is a private,fee-paying university and this sector is highly competitive in Beeland.The lecturers at GU are under pressure to ensure that students perform well and,though currently pass rates are high for most of the individual courses offered at GU,there is a trend of students not performing well in the final examination. Gare 大学 (GU) 是位于 Beeland 的一所大学。这是一所私立的付费大学，它在 Beeland 非常有竞争力。大学的讲师面临着确保学生表现良好的压力，尽管目前 大学的大多数个人课程的通过率很高，但学生有在期末考试中表现不佳的趋势。 Assessment of students at GU is consistent across most courses and comprises a mid- term coursework assignment and an end of term final examination.The student's final grade is a combination of the marks achieved in both these components of assessment. 对大学学生的评估在大多数课程中是一致的，包括期中课程作业和期末考试， 学生最终的期末成绩等级受这两部分分数影响。 2.Examination performance model The head of the Business School at GU,known as the Dean,is looking at ways in which the final examination mark can be improved,given certain variables of student performance and activity in a course. GU 商学院的负责人，即院长，正在分析学生在课程中的表现和活动的某些变量， 以寻找提高期末考试成绩的方法。 To help develop a predictive model,she has chosen,as a representative data set,a second-year course which was run in 20X4 and identified the following main variables as possible indicators of final examination performance: 为了建立一个预测模型，她选择了20X4 年的第二年课程作为一个具有代表性的 数据集，并确定了以下主要变量作为可能影响期末考试成绩的指标： Number of activities accessed-activities include virtual and pre-recorded lectures, quizzes and internet links 活动的访问数量——活动包括虚拟的和预先录制的讲座、小测验和互联网链接 Performance in coursework(graded A,B,C,Dor E) 课程成绩 (A 、B 、C 、D 或 E 级 ) Total time spent on the virtual learning(VL)platform 花在虚拟学习 (VL) 平台上的总时间 Number of practice quizzes undertaken 所进行的小测验的次数 Number of questions in the quizzes omitted 小测验中遗漏的问题的数量 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Frequency with which the VL platform is accessed 访问VL 平台的频率 Number of lectures attended (attendance is recorded automatically) 上课次数(自动记录) This data and the final examination mark achieved will then be entered into the predictive model in order to identify which variables were the strongest indicators of examination performance. 这些数据和所达到的期末考试成绩将被输入预测模型，以确定哪些变量是最影 响考试成绩的指标。 One lecturer has argued that some important variables have been omitted and she has suggested that student grades on entry to the university and performance in previous university courses are variables which should be included.Another lecturer has argued that it would be unhelpful to include any more variables into the model. 一位讲师认为， 一些重要的变量被忽略了，她建议将学生进入大学时的入学成 绩和以前大学课程的表现包括在变量内。另一位讲师认为，在模型中加入更多 的变量是不会有什么帮助的。 The Dean has asked you,as a performance management expert,to specifically comment on the views of the two lecturers and make a recommendation as to whether the additional variables suggested should be included. 院长希望您，作为一名绩效管理专家，对两位讲师的意见进行具体评论，并就 是否应包括所提及的附加变量给出建议。CATION 3.Lecturer performance Recent use of the predictive model for a course in another department at GU found that students who spent more time on the virtual learning(VL)platform and who accessed a larger number of activities performed better in the final examination than those who did not. 最近在 GU 另一个系的一门课程中使用的预测模型发现，在虚拟学习 (VL) 平 台上花费更多时间、参加了更多活动的学生在期末考试中比没有参加的学生表 现更好。 The Dean has suggested that lecturer performance on individual courses should be assessed only on the two variables of the amount of time spent by students on the VL platform and the number of activities accessed by students.She is convinced that if she assesses lecturer performance in this way,student performance in the final examination will improve.In support of this,she has said:'the black box data that we have is very clear in what will improve performance and the data does not lie.' 院长建议，讲师在个别课程上的表现应该只根据学生在VL 平台上花费的时间和 学生访问的活动数量这两个变量来评估。她相信，如果她以这种方式来评估讲 师的表现，学生在期末考试中的表现将会有所提高。为了支持这一观点，她说： “我们所拥有的黑箱数据非常清楚是什么能提高表现，而且这些数据不会说谎。” The lecturers,however,are concerned and have suggested that this narrow focus on the two activities specified above could be damaging to lecturer behaviour and,ultimately, the students'learning experience.The Dean has asked you to assess these concerns and recommend,with justification,whether her suggestion for measuring lecturers' performance should go ahead. 然而，讲师们对此表示担忧，并认为，对上述两项活动的狭隘关注可能会不利 于讲师的行为，并最终影响学生的学习体验。院长要求你评估这些问题，并就 她对于衡量讲师表现的建议是否应继续进行这一问题给她提供有依据的建议。 4.‘My programme'app The Dean has also heard of a scheme being used at another university in which all students have to download the university's 'My Programme'app to their mobile phones and she wants to introduce this at GU.This would be part of the induction process,for both new and continuing students.Students give their consent to the university's conditions and regulations when they are asked to sign paperwork during the induction process though these conditions and regulations are read in full by few,if any,students. All students must have gone through the induction process to undertake any learning or assessment activities. 院长还听说另一所大学正要求所有学生都必须下载大学的“我的计划”应用程 序到他们的手机上，她想在 GU 大学介绍这个方式。这将是入学过程的一部分， 无论是新生还是老生。在入学过程中，十当学生被要求签署文件时，他们会直接 同意大学的条件和规定，很少有学生会阅读全文。所有学生必须通过入学培训 过程才能进行后续的学习或评估活动。UCATION The 'My Programme’app can track students'movements.It registers when students are on campus,highlights where on the university campus they are at any given time, and when they leave.This data is also shared with all the catering outlets on the campus.The outlets can use this data to send students a range of personalised messages. For example,if the phone has remained stationary for over an hour,then a message can be sent directly to it to advise the student to take a break and have a coffee.Other messages highlighting the lunch options for the next day are sent to those students who tend to spend some part of most days on campus.The outlets can use the data to build profiles of individual students and their meal preferences. “我的计划”应用程序可以跟踪学生的活动。它记录学生在校园的时间，他们 在大学校园的位置，以及他们离开的时间。这些数据也可以与校园里所有的餐 饮网点共享。这些店可以利用这些数据向学生发送一系列个性化的信息。例如， 如果手机已经静止了一个多小时，那么就可以直接向它发送一条信息，建议学 生休息一下，喝杯咖啡。其他的强调第二天午餐选择的信息也会发送给那些经 常在校园里度过大部分时间的学生。这些机构可以利用这些数据来建立个别学 生的个人资料和他们的饮食偏好。 The Dean believes this is an excellent way to show that GU has student well being at the top ofits agenda by being able to advise students when it is right to take a break and she also feels that this will boost revenues for the catering outlets by giving them the chance to sell their products directly to the students. 院长认为，通过建议学生什么时候休息是正确的能很好的体现 GU 把学生的健 康放在首位，她还认为，这将增加餐饮店的收入，让他们有机会直接向学生销 售他们的产品。 Some lecturers have argued that the student data could be used in an unethical way with this app and the Dean has asked you to assess ifyou believe these concerns arejustified. 一些讲师认为这个应用程序可能会以不道德的方式使用学生数据，院长请你评 估一下这些担忧的合理性。

2. 以前大学课程的表现 √ 在大学以前的其他课程的表现可能是当前课程表现的更好指标。 may be a better indicator of performance in the current course being undertaken √ 理由：这些课程可能处于类似的智力水平，刚刚进行和完成的课程可能 能更及时的反映出学生智力表现。 ■ similar intellectual level "just undertaken and completed " probably offer a much more up-to-date representation 讨论第二位讲师的观点： √ 在模型中引入太多的变量可能会导致模型的效率降低。 ·introducing too many variables into a mode...lead to a less effective model √ 理 由 ： 1.引入的变量越多，这些所谓的自变量之间就越有可能存在关系。 ·more likely there is to be a relationship between these supposedly independent variables 2.变量太多，降低了统计能力，增加了误差的机会。 ■ reduces the statistical power...increases the chance oferror 3.统计能力可以被描述为当存在需要检测到的效应时，研究将检测到效应的 可能性。变量过多会影响模型检测哪些变量有最显著的影响能力，削弱模型 的统计能力。 ■ the likelihood that a study will detect an effect when there is an effect there to be detected ·affect the model's power to detect which variables have the most significant effect ·weaken the model's statistical power 4.尽管讲师希望在模型中使用更多的变量是很自然的，但这种活动并不一定 能提高模型所产生的数据的可靠性。 ·desire to have more variables in the model is natural ■ does not necessarily enhance the reliability of the data which the model produces 总结/建议： √ 很明显，以前课程的表现不仅是学生表现的更近期的指示，而且也可能 是一个满足所需智力水平的更准确的测试。因此，建议在模型中包含这 个变量，但不需要包括在入学考试中的表现变量。 ·performance in previous courses.…a more recent indication of student performance ...a more accurate test of the intellectual level required this variable is included in the model but not the variable of performance in the entry level examinations
